name: Voter Action Project
subject: Fighting suppression in every state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Fighting in every state that's trying to suppress voters doesn't mean we're going to ignore the big purple states that get all the attention, Team. But the truth of the matter is that the time and resources spent to protect voting rights are not evenly split across states , harming some of our fellow citizens because they live in one state instead of another.
It's on us to fix that and ensure we're fighting for your ability to cast a ballot everywhere. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us defend our fundamental right to vote across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081725_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Team -- Opponents of voting rights have made a strong bet. They've doubled down on it the last few years, too.
Their bet was that we'd only care about certain states. That as long as we were focused on the swing states like Arizona, Georgia, Pennsylvania, and others, they would be free to suppress votes in states like Utah, South Dakota, Mississippi, or Kentucky. And you know what? That bet has paid off for them.
When Wisconsin tried to ban drop boxes, there was an immediate reaction and lawsuits. But not when South Dakota did the same. When Texas started messing with changes to voter ID requirements, people howled. But when Utah functionally suppressed the youth vote with new ID requirements, they got away with it.
They've created a feedback loop: States with restrictive voting laws receive little attention because they aren't electorally competitive. But part of the reason they aren’t competitive is because their state laws prevent large segments of the population from voting .
Team, we cannot afford to skip any state when it comes to protecting our fundamental right to vote. Step up and give $25 or whatever you can today and help us make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081725_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081725_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081725_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081725_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081725_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081725_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=081725_2&amount=35]
We've highlighted things in these things in the past , like voter ID in Utah or court decisions in Kansas or the most suppressive state-level voting law in Indiana, but we have to fight harder there.
The danger in ignoring the voting rights of citizens in more than half the country is that it creates a two-tiered democracy . Voters in the swing states benefit from attention and legal actions, while voters everywhere else are left to navigate increasingly onerous and burdensome requirements without meaningful support or scrutiny.
We have to fight everywhere. Donald Trump is actively dismantling democratic institutions and undermining the rule of law . Only through free and fair elections can we hope to restore our republic. But that requires free and fair elections in every state, not just in a strategic few.
Fuel our efforts to fight for voting rights everywhere with $25 or more and make every vote count >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=081725_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081725_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081725_2&amount=20]

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=nrVrG4S2lN2oZORt5qI9O%2B904BvG7F1NBTDsJ%2FC7BKuAU5PTCpiS7Zy6udFSkDYTH4JnUZyAwaMxEMzys1LhMZO5DeTYknFG3aelndfw2cWfDPYWw4D2JqNLT5LP9NN6aKPO3TA2pW8Llok4A7b%2BsVQ4nIXJv6PtZgRC0WFpi7QF53plcO8cbHv5wAVdCwhTFsJsSDUiTvAf0ew%2Fc0AuJUI9NYd0GKywVmHUUK4VWj4la89ezHcoR2yhu26NxSVUepLGkLvbipuBS%2BaQwXx6Cy08vYdRFgbhBsFadxas9RcWOC%2BofZ2roTHDRr0wvHfSOjpJn%2FqDZdD87lkI1Rv70DsVMevD0ZtzaAr26AYAXTMPaD7qs9zYKEuogpys6y765L5zH52bngy9uNmY5E3rNEnlZZ4TAiAAVhkW8J1sc1k%3D .
clean_body: Fighting in every state that's trying to suppress voters doesn't mean we're going to ignore the big purple states that get all the attention, Team. But the truth of the matter is that the time and resources spent to protect voting rights are not evenly split across states , harming some of our fellow citizens because they live in one state instead of another. It's on us to fix that and ensure we're fighting for your ability to cast a ballot everywhere. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us defend our fundamental right to vote across the country >> [] Voter Action Project [] Team -- Opponents of voting rights have made a strong bet. They've doubled down on it the last few years, too. Their bet was that we'd only care about certain states. That as long as we were focused on the swing states like Arizona, Georgia, Pennsylvania, and others, they would be free to suppress votes in states like Utah, South Dakota, Mississippi, or Kentucky. And you know what? That bet has paid off for them. When Wisconsin tried to ban drop boxes, there was an immediate reaction and lawsuits. But not when South Dakota did the same. When Texas started messing with changes to voter ID requirements, people howled. But when Utah functionally suppressed the youth vote with new ID requirements, they got away with it. They've created a feedback loop: States with restrictive voting laws receive little attention because they aren't electorally competitive. But part of the reason they aren’t competitive is because their state laws prevent large segments of the population from voting . Team, we cannot afford to skip any state when it comes to protecting our fundamental right to vote. Step up and give $25 or whatever you can today and help us make every voice heard in our elections >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] We've highlighted things in these things in the past , like voter ID in Utah or court decisions in Kansas or the most suppressive state-level voting law in Indiana, but we have to fight harder there. The danger in ignoring the voting rights of citizens in more than half the country is that it creates a two-tiered democracy . Voters in the swing states benefit from attention and legal actions, while voters everywhere else are left to navigate increasingly onerous and burdensome requirements without meaningful support or scrutiny. We have to fight everywhere. Donald Trump is actively dismantling democratic institutions and undermining the rule of law . Only through free and fair elections can we hope to restore our republic. But that requires free and fair elections in every state, not just in a strategic few. Fuel our efforts to fight for voting rights everywhere with $25 or more and make every vote count >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. I'm Retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris -- and **I'm running against the most dangerous voice in Congress, Marjorie Taylor Greene.** When I was a kid in rural Georgia, summers meant gathering under the big elm tree at my neighbor's house. That's where the county delivered free lunches -- peanut butter sandwiches, fruit, milk -- so no kid went hungry. We laughed, we played, and we looked out for each other. Now Marjorie Taylor Greene wants to gut SNAP and slash the local programs that made moments like that possible. She's forgotten what it means to look out for your neighbors. I never will. I served this nation for 40 years. I'm running for Congress to protect the lifelines that help our kids, our families, and our communities thrive. But I can't do it alone. Can I count on you to contribute to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor of Virginia?

Peter, I've seen a lot of tough races in my time, so let me tell you:
_This one is as important as it gets._
The Virginia Governor's race is a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election of Trump's second term, and it will set the stage for Democrats in 2026. _If we don't win big here, we'll be facing a rough road ahead._
**[So, before I continue, can I count on you to split a donation between Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor of Virginia and State Democrats Committee today? This election is for all the marbles – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment.
Remember, we only have one opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025 and it's in Virginia.
And right now, we're seeing that Democratic Governors are our first line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump Administration.

clean_body: Can I count on you to contribute to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor of Virginia? Peter, I've seen a lot of tough races in my time, so let me tell you: This one is as important as it gets. The Virginia Governor's race is a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election of Trump's second term, and it will set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don't win big here, we'll be facing a rough road ahead. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Here's what's got me terrified, and I won't mince my words: Republicans are going to flood the state with MILLIONS of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor's seat red. This election is for all the marbles – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, we only have one opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025 and it's in Virginia. And right now, we're seeing that Democratic Governors are our first line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump Administration. Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment. That's why I'm asking you to step up today. The money that's coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you, James Carville Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). That's why GOTV PAC exists. We don't recycle the same Get Out The Vote program that hasn't been updated since the Obama-era. We don't spend millions on consultants who are better at losing than winning. We build smarter, leaner, sharper campaigns that put every dollar where it counts, talking to the voters who will actually decide these elections. And it's working! In 2025, we've helped win every race we've jumped into, from statewide to local elections. But if we're going to rewrite the story of 2026, if we're going to prove that Democrats can actually run and win like it matters, then we need you with us. subject: Bernie Sanders is LEADING this fight >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You need to see this:
| **🚨 BREAKING: DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93109?t=6&akid=20961%2E878179%2EGcp1Bz) Bernie Sanders is LEADING the charge to take on Trump and save our Democracy. We’re _THRILLED!_

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already going after him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93109?t=7&akid=20961%2E878179%2EGcp1Bz) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93109?t=8&akid=20961%2E878179%2EGcp1Bz)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93109?t=9&akid=20961%2E878179%2EGcp1Bz) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93109?t=10&akid=20961%2E878179%2EGcp1Bz)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20961%2E878179%2EGcp1Bz). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20961%2E878179%2EGcp1Bz).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20961%2E878179%2EGcp1Bz) to request fewer emails. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: re: Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Did you see this headline?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Nothing to see here! Just the Secretary of Defense casually supporting the disenfranchisement of more than half the U.S. population!
Serious question: Is Pete Hegseth *trying* to disqualify himself from his job even more than he already has??
I know some of the reaction to this headline and these posts from Hegseth are going to be along the lines of: Relax. It’s not a big deal — he doesn’t actually mean that!
To that I say: Just like the GOP didn’t actually mean Roe should be overturned...?
I’m not interested in being told to calm down when a senior member of the United States government is echoing and praising an extreme anti-woman voice — and one that is explicitly calling for the end of women’s right to vote.
That’s not all Hegseth’s favorite pastor has said, by the way. He also said God created women “to make the sandwiches” and that homosexuality should be criminalized, among many other disgusting, offensive views.
This kind of bigoted extremism has in recent years been considered “fringe” — but news flash: when the U.S. Secretary of Defense is platforming and re-posting this stuff, it can no longer be thought of as outside the realm of possibility!
I’m writing to you about this not just to vent — although we all need to do some of that these days. I’m reaching out because this kind of rhetoric from those leading our country HAS to be met with a real response from those of us who see how horrific it is.
We don’t want to legitimize it, but we also can’t just shrug and say, “well, that was crazy!” and move on with our days.
My suggestion: We should respond by winning elections.
We should roll up our sleeves, capture every little bit of anger and outrage, and channel it into flipping the House next year and chipping away at the extreme GOP’s triple majority in Washington.
That’s how we make a real statement.
I’m all in on this — my team and I are laser-focused on retaking a Democratic majority, working to support Democratic challengers and incumbents, and of course winning my own re-election. If you’re in, too, will you chip in today to support our work? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Your donations directly support my efforts to flip the House, re-electing strong Democrats and supporting new candidates all around the country.
Thanks so much for anything you can give, and for staying in touch!
Let’s do this.
-Sara Jacobs
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Kim Schrier (personal)
subject: I need you to hear this from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter,

I know November 2026 feels far away, but in this race, we can’t wait until the last minute to fight back.

We already have a Republican opponent who is raising money, building his movement, and getting ready to come after this campaign.

That’s why we’re treating every month like it matters. The work we put in now will impact whether we have what it takes to hold on to this seat and take back the House majority next year.

Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline and we’re close to closing the gap. I would really appreciate your help to get there before midnight tonight. If you believe in the work we’ve done together, like protecting reproductive rights, fighting for families, and standing up to this administration, I’m asking you to please chip in now so we can keep building the foundation we’ll need to win in 2026. >> **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-august-2025?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113502812/564009062/-1487867385?refcode=em25_250817_mm3_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250817_mm3_fndd_gq_act___ks_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=21c6add7-cc7b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&refcode2=21c6add7-cc7b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWM2YWRkNy1jYzdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r97cQ0ZM1J-CV7YOd8NZ7XYCcuKWYNaGvcT1nPLDtsM=)**

clean_body: Peter, I know November 2026 feels far away, but in this race, we can’t wait until the last minute to fight back. We already have a Republican opponent who is raising money, building his movement, and getting ready to come after this campaign. That’s why we’re treating every month like it matters. The work we put in now will impact whether we have what it takes to hold on to this seat and take back the House majority next year. Tonight is our mid-month fundraising deadline and we’re close to closing the gap. I would really appreciate your help to get there before midnight tonight. If you believe in the work we’ve done together, like protecting reproductive rights, fighting for families, and standing up to this administration, I’m asking you to please chip in now so we can keep building the foundation we’ll need to win in 2026. >> = Thank you for your ongoing support, Kim | Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. | Team,
Early voting begins in just 33 days. We've been working hard to inform as many people as possible about all Republican candidates. All three statewide offices and all 100 House of Delegates seats are on the ballot this November. Personally, I've been knocking doors, writing checks, putting ups signs, and [waving good morning](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a0yBBeQhRbWyPhEfld7G8JE7rcYDWIi-VkBVsZf0vJPeOxfp0zYTeOmOdAtNrMlhBbQ36YH6RILZ5Zu0Q19Q8CQ6HnaeCZ9xx2S8AOXltQ2wLngcx8wxb213KMICeIz75MrsmUxmvUS3hh0xaD2FdB7NC8HZI7ZhJffPmRvyxN6GUp1sHbD48NOqg8MX2o9K&c=E0e_EdWKZe8ylMc9ZyOzgy0tMBthOtJP7MBXaRWIs-0YuJZxCf8N9Q==&ch=OXrw33Lw98wTlxPQfrlAYEzyuRd0rol00B38oiUzCUhLCaAcqAvofA==) all over the 5th congressional district.
I recommend you vote early so then you can then focus your time on helping us get your family, friends, and others to vote. Winsome Sears and the rest of the Republican ticket are right on the issues, but it won't matter unless we can turnout the vote.
Here is some of what we have been up to:

| The One Big Beautiful Bill Act
---
| |
---
| President Trump, and House and Senate Republicans Delivered for the American People. We proudly passed the One Big Beautiful Bill Act to:
✅ Prevent the largest tax increase in American history ✅ Lower costs for families and businesses ✅ Secure the Southern Border ✅ Unleash American energy dominance ✅ Strengthen Medicaid ✅ Invest in a stronger National Defense
The One, Big, Beautiful Bill propels America into its Golden Age! ✅ A Secure Border ✅ No Taxes on Tips & Overtime ✅ Increased Child Tax Credit ✅ Social Security Tax Cuts

Republicans have the winning message and policies to lead our country toward a safer, stronger, and more prosperous future.
I nominated President Trump for the Nobel Peace Prize due to his remarkable efforts in brokering five peace deals and working diligently to end the war in Ukraine. His leadership and our incredible men and women in our military helped prevent Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons, saving millions of lives in the process.
Seven Wars Ended in Eight Months
✅ Azerbaijan and Armenia ✅ Cambodia and Thailand ✅ Israel and Iran ✅ Rwanda and DR Congo ✅ India and Pakistan ✅ Egypt and Ethiopia ✅ Serbia and Kosovo
The One Big Beautiful Bill codifies 28 of President Trump's executive orders. It's bringing real growth and opportunity to all corners of the country.
Under Trump's leadership, we've seen:
✅ A secure border ✅ Lower murder rates ✅ The first federal budget surplus in a decade ✅ Historic trade deals, boosting the economy and creating millions of jobs ✅ The Gulf of America Initiative, advancing energy dominance and economic prosperity ✅ A commitment to patriotism and national pride ✅ Record military recruitment, thanks to rising morale ✅ The restoration of traditional values, including a return to clear distinctions between boys and girls in sports and bathrooms ✅ President Trump has worked tirelessly to bring Washington D.C. back to the people and to strengthen our country both at home and abroad.
Let's continue Making America Great and the world Great Again!

| Proud to stand with my Navy SEAL brother Cameron Hamilton and his incredible wife Karen Hamilton, who is running to represent us in the Virginia House of Delegates. Karen is a strong, fearless conservative who will fight for our families, our values, and our Commonwealth.
***If you want a voice in Richmond who puts God, family, and freedom first, Karen is the one. Let's send a fighter to the House of Delegates! Make a plan to vote. Spread the word. Support Karen Hamilton***

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Thank California for showing how to fight back against GOP Redistricting and Election Rigging
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Thank California for fighting back against Texas Redistricting and Election Rigging](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc538a1cd-5e25-4eeb-927d-97ac982e75b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8cdba7ed-0b4c-4445-b06f-e64a269cc1b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Republicans in Texas are trying again to rig the vote — pushing wildly gerrymandered districts that basically make House elections irrelevant, fly in the face of voting rights, and lock in GOP control of the US House, even if most Americans don't want it. **But California is fighting back -- and[fighting fire with fire](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe9a5767-c953-4baf-835b-78aa7372f4aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).** California leaders are pushing their own changes in response, creating districts that will favor Democrats and offset the Texas changes if Texas moves ahead with them. **This is how we win -- fighting back hard, smart, and with our eye on the goal.** When Republicans try to rig the rules, we need Democrats — and democratic states — to rise up and say NO. We thank California, and urge other states to follow its lead. [**Add your name today to say: Thank you, California, for fighting back against Texas Republican election rigging, and for democracy.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T349fb917-002e-40dc-8bac-e906d27dca49/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07cfc7e1-a423-4693-9147-ff7766395a4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1566559-b6cc-4945-be8f-165c4ba1413b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5edd9107-f46f-4a6b-98b3-4dfc4177661e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Power Generator 2500X
subject: Deadly Strike Coming To America's Power Grid!!...
body:
THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635)
---
| | |
---
_August 18th, 2025 at 12:35 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | **FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635)
---
**Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635)
---
Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_ Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/95f25026327426bc03950c4fcfa3477aaba0359c/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635)[**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635)
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635)
---
**YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2500X** The Patriot Power Generator 2500X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. With this NEW Patriot Power Generator 2500X... You get MORE power... You get FASTER recharging... And it can even power your FRIDGE! It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2500X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The [**Patriot Power Generator 2500X**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635) is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,500 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight. Plug in the solar panel. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun! Amazingly, it takes just 90 minutes to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **ORDER TODAY AND GET 15 FREE GIFTS WORTH $1,391.70!**
* FREE 100-Watt Solar Panel ($499.95 Value)
* FREE Roll & Go Generator Cart ($69.95 Value)

* FREE Report: Top 7 Reasons Grid Will Fail

* FREE $25 Gift Certificate
* FREE Lifetime Technical Support ($149 Value)
* FREE Private VIP Phone Line ($99 Value)
* FREE Shipping & Handling ($200 Value)
* FREE Senior & Military Discount ($50 Value)
* **Total Savings of $1,391.70!**

**_And YES! There's also an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!_** **PLEASE DON'T WAIT
TO LEARN MORE** But don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/95f25026327426bc03950c4fcfa3477aaba0359c/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635)[**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21812/6374453/c52c7a22390b15173ee8fea5cd900140982817a9/a8b25835984a142dd2ed6b8b1c7a672683471635) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Love Their
Patriot Power Generators!**

---
**Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Because families shouldn't have to wonder who the hell is throwing taking their loved ones
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Stop ICE Agents From Wearing Masks When Conducting Arrests](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3535a22b-8a8c-4dcf-8a4d-937026bcb665/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a7af3ce-a286-4693-9e1b-0858860424c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers are increasingly hiding their faces behind masks when they take people from their homes, workplaces, and communities. And in many cases, they are refusing to identify themselves or show a badge, leaving terrified onlookers to wonder who the hell is taking their loved ones -- including American citizens. [**This practice is unacceptable, and it must stop now. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T31211c70-db3c-4617-9be4-210b388ac3c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **No other branch of law enforcement routinely hides its officers' faces during standard operations. ICE should not be allowed to operate in the shadows.** We call on the Department of Homeland Security and ICE leadership to immediately end the use of masks by ICE officers during enforcement actions, except in rare, specific circumstances where genuine health or safety risks require them. Government must be transparent, accountable, and humane. Masked raids are none of these. [**Add your name to demand that ICE stop hiding behind masks**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T683851dc-5a4b-4fed-bb90-f126bde2cf3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T744e237e-3cf4-4807-8991-a2bd4f4197e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6250adc3-a05a-457d-b9ed-6aac4e25c2dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf170249b-379a-47a8-8cf5-adad9b9a3314/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a933e64-0252-41e6-b76a-875be4da7787/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---

# Monday, August 18, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1872, Aaron Montgomery Ward started what would become a 113-year business with the [first mail-order catalog](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd7YeYGJSUGzjLttuaWHzsFmBXwRvEvnvR5lfmP7qnqPz77E8fMrp3P_6go4jLSe-W0ZmrMtGjSnulTasCVvB7M_kW8ZFgTI92F7aJfiUr2XsgouICnWHTk7GGCnNfeoOp7dpjWMMCGDvYGAMViutjYS7tWs0XXKfN7DSSoCbNkO4WfATeKm9X0c9iREwJKY6_Kd08oExX_TCOmxUuuwO5mcT-o9Qs1Bzw_C1YVivIzWmeg1rpr09iT9roWYFUgo1gxVqLnTyTgXr1b99Df3m2Wfah4NL7qoLz3fKObXbx2AvPuUfIv8q08up7wAAAP__VzJ8Sw) on a single sheet of paper. In honor of this, today the U.S. celebrates National Mail Order Day. Today's _Podcast Extra_ unwraps the surprising state fair sensation: Dubai chocolate desserts. Our team even staged an emergency tasting mission (not easy to pull off, as the chocolate is hard to come by). Have you spotted Dubai chocolate where you are? And--be honest--did you love it? Reply to this email to let us know. Listen to today's podcast episodes on [Spotify](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFOrDAUxvGngd2QtlDoLLq4i8vCOBiNxuiGHOgpHHOghDYzGZ_e4Cu4__L7kv_7pb8AMa1TBwva5EO_4i0ypoR7P4aYgp_2MOJOGBdkWAkiY6-E0idhTtL0DojvfZU76xEVljla2WitpdTnJp-ta7xv6krL0ihQoxmGunaDkjiMgwDEnOyhCSONFKIudeFqI6ARIEuAoSqbrBLoKIW9-Aq0phk938MV92IMS852TmmLWfkvU22m2rDhWsQtJPL3Y5CpNs7hlqm26q4vD0_f_Nzx9NY9vn6s_8_yM9-t227ETLE-nqYFiH_l9KccV6t-AgAA___mr3RK), [Apple](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb8GOpA9YEMKF6-hy2u3tCb2OMzKYGR7E-XvV6xWygdsO3N1ztX9uNorcuT9_h83MjUku9OzRKqVsnWp1BTuOTnKTGWjiDtjiWRBgOrE3MnZeuT4smPrTSACGloyclJKSakuU7saj-BIOzXfRgEjTTevJxJjwEDkL5paNidNzHKWQuhB9V7PAieBckC8jcPUjII815T7z8R7XSnEV3pQ7l3a2mjWWo_SDP8aWBpYjuQdllp6PI5IZ6SB5au8Pw0sdaXul9G9r-zPBjDARcs2G388OUYu-vTfN-T446t_Gulh4DsAAP__SS97mw), or [YouTube](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LtuwyAYBeCnMZstLubigaFLtnSqlBH9ht8xFTYRkFh5-8rtI3Q9R-cbzu3qrhBT3O-fsKFtS3Y7HjVha1icz7Xl5V6yxxKxbphgj1ATOk657KnpmXEBYnq7kQS7IHIUBC3TUkrG5KTJaicIzAvUs5qQGa7NpJjGhYrAhaezItGeGjXMMEqVkENQhoKmwATAPArdjRRDbLkM3znubcUlvfMLy-DzRpJdW3vUTnx0_NLxy3Ecwzs_23PGsz_Dkd6g-bX_WrG__E1JseFxxJRiVad_3yCmX6_964SX5T8BAAD__9hbcFM). ## Putin Concedes to Key Measure for Ukraine
[Russia has agreed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2upDAMhuGrCZ1HSfidgmIburPtlsgQh_FOSFBizoi7X7G3cGpLj15_f77mL-TAcfuNO43i0xzpUwKJUJ7XVCT5LaeVMlPZKWBkLIFmq20LegAzzA45XHNTudETWaorGk3ftq0x7bOvXuNa26W3xtmhWRbsamqbxTfoume32s48Kx5vTQ9mMFp3dftw3aCx12hqxKWpe9VociwpP_4mjvIiH670Tfmxpr0K40vkKKr-peyk7BSvIxW5T8pON6zspAdlJ9MrO50F7v-UnY5TOAJumciBJIgoCYpcgeAsUGg9M8sF24kZoxAV8CnD-c7IkQAFMGB5I5Rz31ngw_JO3kPB69arPLrjwyFw6e7-bUcO_3vlRyN_j_ZfAAAA___D7JJR) to allow the U.S. to provide security guarantees to Ukraine as part of ending the war, according to President Trump's special envoy Steve Witkoff, who attended Friday's peace summit between Trump and Russian President Putin in Alaska. The security guarantee would essentially treat Ukraine as a member of NATO in the event of a future Russian invasion. Article 5 of the NATO alliance treats an attack on one member as an attack on all. The announcement comes ahead of President Trump's meeting with Ukrainian President Zelensky today at the White House. A potential [land swap](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.-6-qXt38DAAD__9HollU) with Russia will be central to the discussion. Zelensky will be joined by European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen, U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer, and other European leaders in working toward "[ironclad security guarantees](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2ypSAUhFeDGRbgf0AwidmddELrKK2XGQQL8Frufsr3lvDSc7q6v-4_r-lF1lm__aYdOq9h8riSQ86I0xJSDusWw4JokXY48paSw6SEarjouewnQ9bdU10YvQIKVQEtu6ZppGyGrnhrNcxr29TtvAK1lKhmKFpqMyyVGZZ1Lqx-3EQveylEWzWlaXtBnSBZEc111bFawNgcYvk3WJ_fWN0dPojlEvbC6XfOR2LVL6ZGpsbrukqcMTw1HgFT437z53KAqfGJYmoUPVOjbJkavz_kuQMZxMQjyNw8B57O4wgx8xyto4xIju9Atn7jM_IFeH4mfv6LZD04ecPjmZKlImpzXNY5m9qHfdvJui_W_KOBP1r9DwAA__86Y5KQ)" for Ukraine.
## Three Red States to Assist in DC Crackdown
Three Republican-led states have [committed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu2zAMRb9G3hhIcmzrDR66aHtdOxqMRDtqZdGQmAT--8L9hS5ciHtwz_31vXxjyqlsP3GnWVZeCn1aJhGqS-AmvG6VA9VEbaeMJWHLtFhtB9AOjFsipnwu9y7OK5GlvqPZTMMwGDN8Td1zDhGd-7KjdVpjHFYXcXRDfw_TI5IxY5fmi6adcUbrsR9ucXQaJ42mR3zc-0ndNcUkXG-_ORV50ppPflO9Bd67PD9Fjqb6H8p6ZX05D25yvZT1F1hZr52y3kzK-leDy09Zv3MlkCcWmLSGgpK4YIbthTWCVOajwVp5hx42PiBThCYo1OCTcoYHQaQj80kRhCGG6z44N6EKUl_7AaFi-BP5U5T1XZ3jcQVTGy-fbceU__WX_xr9Pdu_AQAA__80H5bK) National Guard troops to Washington, D.C., after President Trump enforced a federal intervention in the city last week, citing "complete and total lawlessness." West Virginia, South Carolina, and Ohio will deploy more than 700 troops combined to D.C. in the coming days. West Virginia Gov. Patrick Morrisey said his state "is proud to stand with President Trump in his effort to restore pride and beauty to our nation's capital." The move follows a request from the Pentagon's National Guard Bureau and will roughly double the Guard's presence in the capital. [Troops will assist](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOrDAQRE8DGcg2NHgCBz8hm59uiHpwA71q7JFtDeL2K_YKm5VU0tOr-nrOT2ThsP3Hg1xZ4xzozEKlUJqXmEtctxQXSkz5IMHAmIVmoww0yjbazh5ZrrmvvVuJDHU1OT0CgNbwGOvdrajBGPLQd9q_oKPXww6wDCuCIvRjze6mKautVmrooPWDVTgq1B3iq-_GqlfkucTUfkcOZadVrvih1C7xqMXtpbxz1f2rzFSZ6TzP9sI9xrutzHTPqcyEqfAidMeTcmk-nDYOjM12k0JMjae3xKsJWDgGlEaDAegfVrV7OaROzr9PFuE83ELbgSy_AuVPr32c-QkAAP__uHaCYg) with patrols, security, and crowd control near landmarks like the National Mall and Union Station.
## List: US Cities with Most Expensive Groceries
A [new data visualization](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL8GMlGSQCAHCi4h86UXUmNphOZKIBcam_Lfb7HB_sDmXd393r_7cgfKtK9_YUPHsSw7njUjMx6LL5VLXI_i8SCsG2bYCWrGRUtthLRC2SUA5c8ytMFFRI19i05NxhilzG1qk0PEaIMMQYfRSzBR4qjsMOkH4s171ZK72qRVVkk59qYLo5UwSVA9wGPop2aQGIjL0f0vtHPCmD_ljUfny9Zml5iften_NHpu9HyeZ_em-oLs4UkMmSpfwUbPL1GFJyas4iROghOKRGvCyuJCFSWKH9hGz-3hwvOknKmO14l1A8rfo_wrU2-nvwIAAP__49N_5Q) ranked the top 20 American cities with the highest cost of groceries, with Honolulu at the top--food prices there run over 20% higher than in New York City. The index uses NYC as the baseline at 100: San Francisco scores 100.1, Seattle 95.3, and Boston 90.5. Less expected entries include Atlanta (79.9) and Denver (77), where grocery costs now rival those in traditionally pricey coastal cities. Honolulu's high prices are driven by isolation and import costs, while mainland cities are feeling the effects of rising meat prices, farm labor shortages, and inflation across the supply chain. [See the full list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL8GMlGSQCAHCi4h86UXUmNphOZKIBcam_Lfb7HB_sDmXd393r_7cgfKtK9_YUPHsSw7njUjMx6LL5VLXI_i8SCsG2bYCWrGRUtthLRC2SUA5c8ytMFFRI19i05NxhilzG1qk0PEaIMMQYfRSzBR4qjsMOkH4s171ZK72qRVVkk59qYLo5UwSVA9wGPop2aQGIjL0f0vtHPCmD_ljUfny9Zml5iften_NHpu9HyeZ_em-oLs4UkMmSpfwUbPL1GFJyas4iROghOKRGvCyuJCFSWKH9hGz-3hwvOknKmO14l1A8rfo_wrU2-nvwIAAP__49N_5Q).

On this day in 1872, Aaron Montgomery Ward started what would become a 113-year business with the on a single sheet of paper. In honor of this, today the U.S. celebrates National Mail Order Day. Today's Podcast Extra unwraps the surprising state fair sensation: Dubai chocolate desserts. Our team even staged an emergency tasting mission (not easy to pull off, as the chocolate is hard to come by). Have you spotted Dubai chocolate where you are? And--be honest--did you love it? Reply to this email to let us know. Listen to today's podcast episodes on , , or . A game changer from today's sponsor , offering the best hearing aid device of 2025. | Putin Concedes to Key Measure for Ukraine to allow the U.S. to provide security guarantees to Ukraine as part of ending the war, according to President Trump's special envoy Steve Witkoff, who attended Friday's peace summit between Trump and Russian President Putin in Alaska. The security guarantee would essentially treat Ukraine as a member of NATO in the event of a future Russian invasion. Article 5 of the NATO alliance treats an attack on one member as an attack on all. The announcement comes ahead of President Trump's meeting with Ukrainian President Zelensky today at the White House. A potential with Russia will be central to the discussion. Zelensky will be joined by European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen, U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer, and other European leaders in working toward "" for Ukraine. Three Red States to Assist in DC Crackdown Three Republican-led states have National Guard troops to Washington, D.C., after President Trump enforced a federal intervention in the city last week, citing "complete and total lawlessness." West Virginia, South Carolina, and Ohio will deploy more than 700 troops combined to D.C. in the coming days. West Virginia Gov. Patrick Morrisey said his state "is proud to stand with President Trump in his effort to restore pride and beauty to our nation's capital." The move follows a request from the Pentagon's National Guard Bureau and will roughly double the Guard's presence in the capital. with patrols, security, and crowd control near landmarks like the National Mall and Union Station. List: US Cities with Most Expensive Groceries A ranked the top 20 American cities with the highest cost of groceries, with Honolulu at the top--food prices there run over 20% higher than in New York City. The index uses NYC as the baseline at 100: San Francisco scores 100.1, Seattle 95.3, and Boston 90.5. Less expected entries include Atlanta (79.9) and Denver (77), where grocery costs now rival those in traditionally pricey coastal cities. Honolulu's high prices are driven by isolation and import costs, while mainland cities are feeling the effects of rising meat prices, farm labor shortages, and inflation across the supply chain. . ## Paxton Escalates Fight Against O'Rourke
Texas House Speaker Dustin Burrows indicated Friday he expects the chamber to make quorum when it convenes at noon today. House Democratic Caucus Chair Gene Wu signaled that members would be [returning to Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFvwyAUhH-NvWEBwTEdGLp4S9eO1rN5tlExRLyXkPz7Klk7djvd6U6n7_syXSDEkLYvONDxY81TwkoRmbFMIa25QiGCiCsQI_FWcg1p0lL3Qlqh7OQhxOdkWu9m6T9Ui04Nfd8rYwfZ7m62Jw0LImq1KIPSghm8niXas1Q9-ja415i0yiollbTdSw6-N3NvVvAaGyPRB86l4x0ZH0BrfOY7lm7JRxvdznyl5vTZ6LHRY621-3lAeoWNHomBUeRVvIt_DEFXXAJEQUgUchJazLiFRKIG3sWeb4TC45GXAkziiSw4i4J8K6nRY1ucv9YQY6Dz0Bi5HRDi-xb_D-bd6d8AAAD__yxejLE) over the weekend, saying "people are exhausted." A congressional redistricting plan was filed with only slight revisions from that proposed during the first special session. On Saturday, Beto O'Rourke [led a rally](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAQhp_G3rCAQHEGhi7e0rWjhc3hnIrBglNI3r5ylj5At9OdvtP__d-3-eYwYtq-3A6WniHPCVqNQARlxhRyc6VWFyG4SlBpK7lhmiWXmvGRiXH2DuNrVr23C_dX0YMVRmst1Gh4f7dcj1o5E5bVKHG5wCKUumoutAkGhFA92vMZH8UoBBd8HM7ReK0WrYLzEjrFwSPlMtAdCJ6uhvjKDyjDmvc-2jvRUbvLZyenTk6tteHn6dJ57OR02nRyemPsyBEJ179FyIW5GFlxMb7YUfKpWFmCxgp4rFRwJUwb291xUn2x_mgYI9YP0ym-7Q7jOwb9r7yHlb8BAAD__3UDhf4) opposing the redistricting effort at the Texas Capitol, urging thousands of activists to "not allow this moment to pass without a fight." Meanwhile, O'Rourke's Powered by People PAC announced it had [donated over $1 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGy4yAQRE8jZagAwRcKCDZR9jfdUIXFIE8tAhcz_rJvvyVfYbMOuru635_v9TtgxrL_Dgd4fqW6FjgpAzO0FUuqZ2hEIUMKxEC8t3piWbXUVkgnlFtjwPxeTR_9TcZZ9eDVZK1Vxk2yv3tlJum2MekxWj1CmqycYZTzl1Mwu9n06K8y6ZRTSirphktO0ZqbNSlEDZ2REJFrG_gODK9AKb_rD7Rhq0ef_Z35Qd34q9NLp5fzPIdUX1N4EmO5LJ1erk-dXj5hEeGoWwtM4gZcRW312f6CSM8SW0DCsgt6wIYhCwIirEU0iEjccGMse998fJyYM9LX1Bm5HwHzZwv_H8Efr_8FAAD__62riSg) to the Texas House Democratic Caucus and other groups during the special session. Earlier this month, Attorney General Ken Paxton secured a court order blocking the group from fundraising for the quorum-breaking lawmakers. In response to O'Rourke's announcement, Paxton [secured an amended order](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOpC92NgpXFxDl2uvRIu9BEsGcvZenLz9ibzC303xzYz0_bnPd4wpHo_fuJPj93rOB9WSiJnyHI_1rJhLwUQrFqbCj3zWeMwgQHfCdtLOAWP6zKoNbhHhJlty0mitpbJGtJsLYEc_LABK0yoG8FIEE9CbsHgwENrorjFhpZVSSGH7K5qg1aLVigGoUYJC5DP3vBHTG8uaPueLcu_PvU1uY36WZvjVwNTAVGu9OE8HUy5__2Gmi2tg-lYbmDBz9Ilmi4Be33QXBhw6JUbs7Hjz3bKMNGo0OAjVb7ynNrvwrDGlWEbTKPHYMabvOf9M2cvB_wAAAP__2ox_vQ) blocking the PAC from transferring funds out of state and asked the judge to revoke its charter. "_In Texas, lawless actions have consequences, and Beto's finding that out the hard way_ ," said Paxton.
## Judge Orders Infowars Sale
Talk show host Alex Jones has been ordered to [sell his Infowars assets](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHS4yAMhJ8Gd_YIGQwpKK6hy7VXepQADjfEZICL47e_4Z_5n-CvpELa3W__XNcrxRT37Tc9vWmfkNfdHzX51nxZ4x7yQaVWSj5Qbb62reQj7isCyhH0yPXqKKZzFYMzN3AXPnjDlZSSC61geBhxQwlB8Rkui9L3gFItTs13seAFISxDNF0MNNecAwc99VU5KW5SBHLomQDvYstlag_f_IdqSGd--zLd83NI5tHaq7L5F0PL0B7HMf2r1LKjsx8wtLXlcjK0nawPajHvDG33ZWhBM7RcMLSU_Gf8m3dfx2_0MeQydv6RNor9S8tlkXyWAIqhHYpxryOmFOuimIDtSTF9BWs_q_Nt8H8AAAD__weEhow) to pay over $1 billion owed to families of the 26 victims of the 2012 Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting, which Jones claimed was a hoax aimed at stripping Americans of their guns. A court-appointed receiver is expected to take control of Austin-based Infowars in the coming days. Jones [blasted the decision](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3SAQRb8Gd_MEBC9sQZGGbtOmtLAZbDYYLA_7_Pz3EZHyBduNZqQz99zfH9OHTzmV9Zff0bZXrFPBizK2hueUSqyXP4l8xuipIbX1rFcqk-RyBG5AmCn4lO9JDcHOPLyLAa3Q4zgKZTQfNiu1eguLUMus9fK-SByj5wqNQDQxBD0k22HcCCMEF9w8-qjDqOZRRR8kMsUxpFbPR9uw4ctTzHd94vlY6j5ku7V2EPvxk0nHpCv3Uan1E5Ouk5l03DDphGLSfRF0Pyadz_iCz1qQ4L8meCJsBFfKGWYEqjlAq3D4G_o_EDOkAgHnRn1PvoQbtlr_QPR7ygkJPr_Ciky64bTh6KBEb5opvu4-5X-B2_dqflr5NwAA___yD5NX) on his radio show Thursday, saying he had another studio ready to go and promising "they won’t get me off the air." Last year, the satirical outlet _The Onion_ [won an auction](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAUhJ8Gd1iAzY8Litu4y22i1ZbWsTk4RMRYwMbJ26-80j7BdiONNJrv-7xMFwgxbOt_eKCtL5-mDY8SsVbMU9h8OiCXAhE9lIqlrjkdYZsEE5IyQ7mZHIT4nvrG2Zm5gTdouZZS8t5o1tyscnIWnfIL8q5bjNcDaDZoMNKjVrxrgj3HmOGGc8aZac-onexn2XtwAknP0IWacltvWPEFxcd3emJul_Roor3VuhfS_SNiJGKEeTkJ2jWdNRHjx5WI8QgZrzXlNxHj_cutSGHfU9hqoRkXDE_MtGCMNHlPIeKL3tOGpdBfBZSLXik-KNFk6_YjxBiK0qRn6wNC_LlS_ybwacV3AAAA__9-loZU) to purchase Infowars, but a federal bankruptcy judge ruled the bidding process was flawed. A representative for the company indicated continued interest in turning the website into a parody outlet. Jones said his attorneys would [appeal the latest ruling](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAQRk-DO6yBgCEFxTbusu2WFoYhZkWMBSQkt1850p7g75400hu9789tudmY4n7_bR9o2jvkZcdeE7aGZYl7yN2WWm3CYGvD2u4l97gvHLikoCnTi7cxfRYxeLOCv7IBDVNSSia0gmEzHCZ1XRWsTujVX65KCXcJoIOeJpCODdGcMtBMMwYM9Hii8lKsUgTrORIB6GPLZWwbNnzbGtInv7CMLj-GZLbWjkouvwifCZ9776PbSt7PK-Gze6b2LEj4bEuLLn0p4Zv-zTtW-j-RfsX0LKUcNFNCqPHYjqEYf_SYUqyTIgLuDxvT93H72Vwvw_8FAAD__9P2f3A), and he has asked the U.S. Supreme Court to dismiss the financial judgments against him.
## Galveston's Record-Setting Sidewalk
A 7.3-mile section of Galveston's famous seawall doubles as the longest continuous sidewalk in the world. A representative from Guinness World Records will [certify that distinction](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb_G7rAAQ4wLF9uke9tuaWEzOKM3hieYhOTvV95f2O5oNDq69_75Wr88Eqbjtz9h4XfMa4JWCZihrJhibr7U6gmirwyVj5IbplVLbYV0Qrk1eKTPavqwbDLMqodFTdZaZdwk-8cipR29hC0oayCGfbQu3uJsdzPexn2ce1wumXTKKSWVdMOFU7Bmsyb6oKEzEgJyLgM_gOHta6RPfkEZ9nz2tDyYf2o3_ur0vdP31tpweHpdNa6HTt8v7PT9ukLlnEQF3zyR2KEwRoQgKKcDKotn2kr-hiQqBmievgUm8axi-4jjiSlBvUy-MO4Eq5XSbSY6MYd9F3acnJiV9mK-GZBBWSVhHB58Ul-W8NOQCOtt6ow8To_0Lz7_3-ivRf8NAAD__-h4l-o) at an event on Sept. 6. The seawall was built in sections in the years after the devastating hurricane of 1900, which killed up to 12,000 people and remains the deadliest natural disaster in U.S. history. It has protected the city on numerous occasions since then. Official recognition from Guinness has been [discussed for years](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL8GOiPb2AEKF9fQ5dor0YIXsLTByN7Eyd-fuF-4bjQjjZ7ez326Q6BwbN_wQMfvNU4HlkzIjGkKxxoLpJyBcIXMmHlLsYRj0lJbIXuh-slDoM9kau9m6QdVo1OdtVaZvpP17sC0ANJ7c5vt0HYG_aD0vHR27doB7FAHd53JXvVKSSX75oqdt2a2ZgWvsTISfeCYGt6R8Q15pU98YWqW-KjJ7cxnrtqvSo-VHkspzbKneFxrpcftSatYImSu9AiJw0J41UAvzBwPkREKEIntGQ7MWZSYyIuES0xeaNmrwbaqOfezTs6fJRCFfOsqI7cHBPpj4P-Zezn9GwAA__8zgYRN) by Visit Galveston, the city’s tourism office. The designation surpasses the record previously held by Tampa's 4.5-mile Bayshore Boulevard. "_This isn’t just a record. It's a testament to our town's resilience_ ," Galveston Mayor Craig Brown said. The office is asking 8,000 people to [line the seawall](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAUhE-DOyzAEHBBsY27bLulhXkPGy0xEZCQ3H7lvcLfjTSj0cz3577eXUzx3H-7B9r2CXk9sdeErWFZ4xlyd6VWlzC42rC2veQez1UwoSgzlJsVXEzfVQ5gNwYzH9ByrZTi0mg2HNZwP0lufFAcJPd-u4GZmDFivk16MnqI9ipjhhvOGWdmvKQGJTclgwOBRDKE2HIZ24ENP66G9M1vLKPPjyHZo7VnJdMvIhYilt77-PfIr8skYnGlRZ-QiOX6RcSSsneJiGV36Y215ZPur3ieWCvtuSSgBX0uQCu67tKVFEZRDXpCD0D9LJFKCYE6AE4NkyHMWqGCbSgWnj2mFOtNE8n2h4vp_8b2M7JvK_4FAAD__3-vjK4) during next month's event, which will coincide with the 125th anniversary of the storm.

Invest in The Flyover today by visiting . | Paxton Escalates Fight Against O'Rourke Texas House Speaker Dustin Burrows indicated Friday he expects the chamber to make quorum when it convenes at noon today. House Democratic Caucus Chair Gene Wu signaled that members would be over the weekend, saying "people are exhausted." A congressional redistricting plan was filed with only slight revisions from that proposed during the first special session. On Saturday, Beto O'Rourke opposing the redistricting effort at the Texas Capitol, urging thousands of activists to "not allow this moment to pass without a fight." Meanwhile, O'Rourke's Powered by People PAC announced it had to the Texas House Democratic Caucus and other groups during the special session. Earlier this month, Attorney General Ken Paxton secured a court order blocking the group from fundraising for the quorum-breaking lawmakers. In response to O'Rourke's announcement, Paxton blocking the PAC from transferring funds out of state and asked the judge to revoke its charter. "In Texas, lawless actions have consequences, and Beto's finding that out the hard way ," said Paxton. Judge Orders Infowars Sale Talk show host Alex Jones has been ordered to to pay over $1 billion owed to families of the 26 victims of the 2012 Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting, which Jones claimed was a hoax aimed at stripping Americans of their guns. A court-appointed receiver is expected to take control of Austin-based Infowars in the coming days. Jones on his radio show Thursday, saying he had another studio ready to go and promising "they won’t get me off the air." Last year, the satirical outlet The Onion to purchase Infowars, but a federal bankruptcy judge ruled the bidding process was flawed. A representative for the company indicated continued interest in turning the website into a parody outlet. Jones said his attorneys would , and he has asked the U.S. Supreme Court to dismiss the financial judgments against him. Galveston's Record-Setting Sidewalk A 7.3-mile section of Galveston's famous seawall doubles as the longest continuous sidewalk in the world. A representative from Guinness World Records will at an event on Sept. 6. The seawall was built in sections in the years after the devastating hurricane of 1900, which killed up to 12,000 people and remains the deadliest natural disaster in U.S. history. It has protected the city on numerous occasions since then. Official recognition from Guinness has been by Visit Galveston, the city’s tourism office. The designation surpasses the record previously held by Tampa's 4.5-mile Bayshore Boulevard. "This isn’t just a record. It's a testament to our town's resilience ," Galveston Mayor Craig Brown said. The office is asking 8,000 people to during next month's event, which will coincide with the 125th anniversary of the storm. | Flying together with our sponsor Designed to curb appetite, regulate blood sugar, and promote sustainable fat loss, MedVi’s doctor-prescribed treatment is a science-backed way to take control of your health. | ➤ Statewide: Five Texas school districts are at risk of a state takeover after at least one of their campuses received a failing grade five years in a row: Connally, Lake Worth, Beaumont, Wichita Falls, and Fort Worth. name: Paul Dans, Director of Project 2025
subject: It’s time for Lindsay Graham to retire
body:
We can’t afford another sellout.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0if/?__vbtrk=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, I need your support to help retire Lindsey Graham.
I know that South Carolina deserves a conservative champion and if we are going to deliver on the America First agenda that gave Republicans control of the Senate then we cannot afford to send a swamp creature like Graham back to Congress.
**[I’m Paul Dans, founder of Project 2025, and I’m running to knock Lindsey Graham out of the Senate in the 2026 Republican primary.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0if/?__vbtrk=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
Graham has spent the past**** 30 years in Washington**,** cozying up to the Uniparty and**** playing both sides**,** while our conservative values get tossed aside.
The facts don’t lie:

* **He’s the king of flip-flopping.** The people of South Carolina know this. They know that Graham is a RINO whose values shift whichever way the wind blows, and it’s why he has a dismal** 34%** approval rating from voters.
* **He’s one of the biggest allies of the Uniparty.** Graham’s record as Senator shows that time and again he has delivered for the D.C. establishment that wants to increase the size of government but not the people voting for him that voted for their Senator to put America First.
* **He’s one of the fiercest advocates for involving our nation in endless wars.** Lindsey pushes for a war-hawk doctrine that has failed America. While our nation suffers at home he has been egging Trump on to bomb Iran, pushed for us to join endless foreign conflicts, and he even got slapped with an international arrest warrant for supporting Ukraine too fiercely.
* **And he’s out of touch with Americans who suffer because of his failed leadership.** Which is why South Carolina conservatives are booing him at Trump rallies. They too know just how detached from the real issues that matter to folks like you.

His rack record is abysmal. We can do better for South Carolina, and we can do better for America.
**[Lindsey Graham is too entrenched in the Swamp, he is too compromised by special interests, and it’s time for a change.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0if/?__vbtrk=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
Right now, Republicans have control of the White House, the Senate, and the House. Additionally, our party controls state houses across the country and the majority of the Supreme Court are constitutional conservatives.
**This is a once in a generation moment to make consequential change for our country. That’s what Americans voted for.**
If you feel that the mandate given to conservative Republicans last fall isn’t being delivered it’s because of politicians like Lindsey Graham who have no interest in change. We cannot waste this moment and that’s why I am running to send him packing.

[FIRE LINDSEY GRAHAM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0if/?__vbtrk=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, at Project 2025,**I helped design a blueprint to shrink government, secure our borders, protect family values, and to put America First.**
Now I’m bringing that battle to the Senate to forge a new path for South Carolina and America**.**
But let's be real: Graham’s massive war chest and insider network isn’t going to go down without a fight.
You and I both know Graham is going to go out on a crusade against me, he will launch massive smear campaigns, tarnish my good name, and lie to deceive voters.
That’s why I am reaching out to conservatives across the country to stand with me as I launch my campaign.
**It’s never been more crucial for me to build up my grassroots army so I can launch our hard-hitting programs to drown out their attacks and expose the TRUTH to the people of South Carolina.**
But without the support of patriots like you, I'll be fighting with one hand tied behind my back against Lindsey’s war chest.
**_[I need your help - and I need it today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0if/?__vbtrk=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0if/?__vbtrk=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[JOIN TEAM DANS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0if/?__vbtrk=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This is our chance to take down one of Washington’s biggest villains that have been dragging our country through the mud.**__**
**__**
**_Fights like these are the only way we can ensure our party is filled with conservatives who actually work to put America First so we can take our country back once and for all._**

Remember in 2024, South Carolina proudly stood with Trump and his agenda.Now, let's give him a Senator who believes in the principles of MAGA and will deliver that agenda for the American people -******not betray us.****__**
**__**
**_[Join our fight today by chipping in $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to help me retire Lindsey Graham](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0if/?__vbtrk=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
Together we’ll overcome Lindsey Graham and his donors and send a message to the Senate that we will fire any politician that fails to deliver and abuses their power.

_For America and South Carolina,_

**Paul Dans**
Candidate for U.S. Senate, South Carolina
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0if/?__vbtrk=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTM3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|

------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Aug 18, 2025 05:52 am
Novartis, a New Jersey pharmaceutical company, has sued the State of Maine over new regulations imposed earlier this year on a federal discount drug program for certain health care providers. Originally introduced as LD 1018 and ultimately enacted as part of the biennial budget, this initiative sought to strengthen the federal 340B Drug Pricing Program [...]

name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: When Hell Freezes Over: Hillary's Stunning Trump Confession Stuns America
body:

subject: Fewer Poor Kids
body:
As you know, I hate the big dark bill that passed earlier this summer because it reduces health care coverage, hurts our move toward sustainable energy, and explodes the deficit in service of tax cuts for the least needy among us.

* * *
# [Fewer Poor Kids](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=171200332&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMjAwMzMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTU1MTg5NDMsImV4cCI6MTc1ODExMDk0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.qljIhP_NX9MYRCtHNrQy3dY0OgXFF2Ja9n8BbvRZXik)
| | [Andrew Yang](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---
| Aug 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@andrewyang)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=171200332&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMjAwMzMyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTUxODk0MywiZXhwIjoxNzU4MTEwOTQzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg3MzA0Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.a3qP3atZj-YiMMliLWG-G7MgiLGHNOMJgU5Iaf8l_Og&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=171200332&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMjAwMzMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTU1MTg5NDMsImV4cCI6MTc1ODExMDk0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.qljIhP_NX9MYRCtHNrQy3dY0OgXFF2Ja9n8BbvRZXik&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=287304&post_id=171200332&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMjAwMzMyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTU1MTg5NDMsImV4cCI6MTc1ODExMDk0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4NzMwNCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.qljIhP_NX9MYRCtHNrQy3dY0OgXFF2Ja9n8BbvRZXik)
---
| | [](https://substack..gh4Mrq0yfa4uOIxdc95eyHLjbUCAN0iqkzzlm_OM-wY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/fewer-poor-kids?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hello, I hope that your summer is going well.
As you know, I hate the [big dark bill](https://substack.com/redirect/729b7084-fa87-4482-90ea-8a699ec55b81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that passed earlier this summer because it reduces health care coverage, hurts our move toward sustainable energy, and explodes the deficit in service of tax cuts for the least needy among us. It's a step in the wrong direction.
But buried in that bill was a bit of good news. The child tax credit was set to drop to $1,000 per child per year starting next year -- but instead, it was expanded from $1,000 per child in the absence of any legislation to $2,200 per child. A family with 2 kids earning the full credit that makes below a certain amount of money will get a tax break of $4,400 per year. This will put more money into the hands of millions of families and improve the situations of more than 60 million children in America.
Perhaps best of all, the new higher child tax credit is permanent and tied to inflation, so the $2,200 per child will go up over time. And there's no expiration date; this will be the new floor.
Think about that family trying to make ends meet paying for food, clothes, books, and maybe childcare for two or three children. Everything is tight. Then, they get a few hundred dollars back that they weren't expecting, maybe even an extra thousand dollars. They can clear a bill or two and take the family out on a little roadtrip to visit friends or relatives the next state over because they can now pay for the gas. Imagine that playing out among millions of families across the country. Life is just a little bit better, they can breathe a little bit easier. And this will happen every year for that family, with the amount going up with their costs.
The total is about $80 billion a year going back into the pockets of families making their lives better. That's a lot of relief and many roadtrips. Every year, going up over time.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3848edd1-a58b-431d-8fbc-9893b122b00d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Chances are, you helped make this happen.
What do I mean? 5 years ago I started [Humanity Forward](https://substack.com/redirect/2c9d1004-f7ea-49f2-8d15-bcfcd1713dce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), an advocacy org that lobbies for anti-poverty solutions in Washington D.C. I started it based on this [article](https://substack.com/redirect/56511232-1dde-437b-aa92-68473a6bcb95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) I read in the Onion a number of years earlier titled "[American People Hire High-Powered Lobbyist to Push Interests in Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/56511232-1dde-437b-aa92-68473a6bcb95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." This was funny, but also I thought kind of brilliant.
Back in 2020, I was searching for ways to channel the energy from my presidential campaign toward real solutions. Humanity Forward was a cash relief organization during COVID and gave away $8 million to thousands of families. Then, it became an advocacy org that meets with members of Congress on bipartisan or nonpartisan policies on things like reducing child poverty. Over the last 5 years, Humanity Forward has met with dozens of legislators hundreds of times making the case for the child tax credit. Republicans like the child tax credit because it helps working-class families with children, which obviously includes millions of their constituents. Democrats like it because it reduces deprivation in diverse communities.
Now, I personally would prefer more dramatic measures than where this landed. But I'm also someone who is focused on the immediate and concrete and taking advantage of whatever opportunities arise; in this case millions of families are going to benefit from a reinforced and permanent higher child tax credit starting in 2026. That's a real win.
$80 billion a year to families with children, in perpetuity.
So how did you make this happen? If you are reading this, there is a significant chance that you donated to or supported my presidential campaign. That campaign led directly to Humanity Forward. No Yang for President, no Humanity Forward, and quite possibly, no permanently higher child tax credit for millions of families.
Does it make sense that a campaign in 2019 and 2020 would lead to an improvement to legislation 5 years later? When you reflect on it, it kind of does.
Sometimes, good things happen because of years of hard work, in ways you might not expect.
I'll be honest, this is perhaps the biggest highlight of my career. I wake up every morning trying to figure out how to make people's lives a little better. Who can say that they improved the situation for millions of needy families? We helped make that happen. Think about that.
So first, thank you.
Second, congratulations! If you helped my campaign, this is your win too.
You've got to take the victories whenever you can. You never know what or when the next one will be.
This long-in-the-making improvement to the child tax credit proved that we can indeed make awesome things happen. I'll confess though that I'm eager for more. What more can we do? Let's keep pushing and find out. Poverty is the mindkiller, but it is eminently solvable. Let's do all we can.
To support Humanity Forward in their ongoing work, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/37c81752-2fc7-421e-b583-11d6d7b93b53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) - it may be the highest leverage money you will ever invest or give. Thank you for helping make it possible in the first place! For my interview with Sam Bloch about his new book "Shade: The Promise of a Forgotten Natural Resource" click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/2a8f822a-9a41-4cae-9baf-ed8b8b0bb640?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To see what Forward is doing in your area, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/a8c63b15-220e-47d1-9847-eab4b2e7fd4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The next [Offline Party](https://substack.com/redirect/a2cd3228-7b05-47ed-bc6e-a3f165df522f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is on August 21st in New York City! Remember to look up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/75b24374-ea4f-4dc9-b66b-9b56cbcec6a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

But how did we get here? Since retaking office, Trump, his administration, and far-right allies in Congress have launched attacks on our democracy on multiple fronts, including the 2030 Census — the foundation for redistricting. It can all be traced back to Project 2025, which has an entire chapter dedicated to the Census Bureau. In this far-right playbook, MAGA Republicans explicitly state, “Strong political leadership is needed to increase efficiency and align the Census Bureau’s mission with conservative principles.” So much for “unbiased” and “apolitical.” We cannot let Republicans hijack the census for their own political gains. The NDRC is working to protect the census so we have an accurate count and fair representation.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Make no mistake: Project 2025 is already in action. Anti-democracy attacks on the census this year alone include: Rescinding an order that affirmed how everyone in the country should be counted. Wiping previously publicly available data from the Census Bureau website. Suing to stop the 2030 Census from counting all U.S. residents. Proposing a citizenship question, which could undercount the population in areas with high rates of immigrants. It’s clear: Republicans want to use the census to unfairly shift power away from minority communities. The NDRC is committed to defending the census to ensure an accurate count of our population and demographics — and fair maps. = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.
