Don't recognize this sender? [Unsubscribe with one click](https://substack..-59dcxK7arFrXCgaIdFjY1NdZnSHtuejSPgSmJTFlwE?)
Matt Royer recently imported your email address from another platform to Substack. You'll now receive their posts via email or the [Substack app](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cf6a3d7f-3ebc-4ec2-8985-8776d4cff9c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To set up your profile and discover more on Substack, [click here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0fb5d38b-6791-4ed2-926b-a83f342d7d2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/806a9dc5-a951-4f8d-a85e-b36fd313c14f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This week of _By the Ballot_ revisits a topic I touched on in my larger _[Road to Election Day 2025](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/18318091-f035-49ff-864f-809c38f9810d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/18318091-f035-49ff-864f-809c38f9810d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)piece--but this time, I want to drive it home. People always ask where the best place is to boost youth voter turnout, and I will beat this drum to death if I have to: the answer for state legislature and local races is **college towns**.
By the end of this, I'll highlight one specific candidate running in the battleground district of my own alma mater, James Madison University (Go Dukes! 🐶), and ask you to support them. If you want to pitch in without reading the whole spiel, you can do so here:[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmudems](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dddd0b14-e0f3-4624-9e70-5396c98652bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ieXRoZWJhbGxvdC5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWNjb3VudCIsInAiOjE3MDI5MjYyMCwicyI6NTE1NjU2NiwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTUyMTA0MywiZXhwIjoyMDcxMDk3MDQzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.MErWNPgBlpq1w7PAreZso3XG_jtA0XMeHbPtDQou35Y?)
But allow me to explain why investing in College Campus organizing is worth it first:
## **Why Investing in College Campus Organizing Is Worth It**
**Did you know... that college students are counted in redistricting --even if they're not registered to vote there?**
In July 2023, _Politico_ published "How College Towns Are Decimating the GOP," in which Charlie Mahtesian and Madi Alexander outlined how Democrats have been gaining momentum in local and state elections thanks to increased college student turnout in previously solid red areas.
_Of 171 "college towns," 38 flipped from red to blue since the 2000 presidential election. Just seven flipped the other way--and typically by smaller margins. Democrats increased their margins in 117 of those counties, while Republicans gained ground in 54. In raw votes, the difference is even starker: counties that trended blue increased their margins by an average of **16,253 votes** , while counties that trended red increased theirs by only **4,063**._
In Virginia, candidates with college campuses in their districts saw a noticeable increase in turnout in 2023. Many people don't realize that **college students are counted in the census population for redistricting, even if they 're registered to vote in another state**. For example, a student attending UVA but registered in Pennsylvania still counts toward Charlottesville's population for map-drawing purposes.
Virginia has **43 colleges with on-campus housing** , which means **at least 43 House of Delegates districts** could be impacted in 2025 by more students registering to vote where they live. These students typically spend 4+ years in these communities--they have buy-in. Their votes should count where they live.
And at a time when student debt is rising and young people feel increasingly disaffected with government, Democrats **must** be telling them how we'll make their lives better--**during college and after graduation**.
## **Virginia Knows This Works**
Based on this data, the Virginia Young Democrats (VAYD) made a concerted push in summer 2023 to organize college campuses. We printed and distributed hundreds of voter registration pamphlets to college chapters in battleground areas, encouraging students to register at their campus address and take advantage of same-day voter registration.
We also invested heavily in digital outreach, targeting campuses with ads about registering and voting. We had support from the DNC Youth Coordination Team, which visited Virginia Tech, University of Mary Washington, and William & Mary--as well as from youth-oriented PACs like **Leaders We Deserve** , which campaigned for Nadarius Clark and Lily Franklin.
After the election, [VAYD compiled a report ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c016164f-be26-495f-bc6d-e126efa28152?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)on youth voter impact in down-ballot races. College students were a **decisive** boost to turnout.
In HD 41, Young Democrat candidate Lily Franklin faced off against Republican Chris
Obenshain. Out of 24,875 votes cast, Lily lost by 183 (0.74%)
The 41st district contains the entirety of Virginia Tech's campus in Montgomery
County which includes off campus housing as well. The Young Democrats on campus as
well as the surrounding areas took it upon themselves to organize without a large amount of outside funding and were able to pull off an amazing turnout.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6df009b3-ce7d-4a9f-915f-1b5ec5774eeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For 18-35 year olds in Montgomery County:
● In 2015, 3,386 Votes
● In 2019, 3,162 votes
● In 2023, 5,150 votes
That is a 52% increase from 2015 and 62% from 2019, an increase that brought the Democratic candidate that much closer to flipping this district to Blue and can still in the future, with more investment in youth organizing.
In SD-24, Incumbent Senator Monty Mason faced off against Republican challenger Danny Diggs. Out of 67,179 votes cast, Mason lost by 725 (1.08%). However, just like in HD-41, SD-24 includes all of the William & Mary Campus as well as the surrounding housing, and with the help of the Young Democrats on William & Mary's campus, Williamsburg saw a boom in votes as well.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6a40db42-49be-4edf-91c3-a95c41f3d2b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For 18-35 year olds in Williamsburg,
● In 2015, 106 votes
● In 2019, 593 votes
● In 2023, 1,301 votes
That is a 459% increase since 2015 and 119% increase since 2019. With more resources and an investment into youth organizing, we could easily close that 725 vote gap in 4 years.
In HD-65, then former Delegate and Young Dem Joshua Cole ran against Republican Lee Peters to reclaim his old seat that he lost in 2021. Of 29,154 votes cast, Cole was victorious by a margin of 1750 votes (6.00%).
HD-65 includes Fredericksburg City which includes all of the University of Mary Washington and with the help from the Young Democrats of UMW, we saw:
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/345d9349-7fd7-458d-8521-70786b6f5db4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For 18-35 year olds in Fredericksburg:
● In 2015, 356 votes
● In 2019, 1104 votes
● In 2023, 1,787 votes
That is a 210% increase from 2015 and 62% from 2019 and with a
turnout out 1787, Josh Cole's margin of victory can be chalked almost entirely up to the Youth Vote.
These examples show how college organizing **flipped the House and protected the Senate** in 2023. With more investment in youth organizing, turnout can go even higher in 2025.
## Start Early, Win Big
**Turn your attention now to registering college students on campus.** As noted, they count in the population even if they're not registered there--but when they are, we win.
We need to support College Dem chapters early and give them the resources they need to register their peers, especially in red-leaning areas. We can flip even more seats if we stay on this trend.
That's why key candidates like **Lily Franklin, Joshua Cole, Mike Feggans, Nadarius Clark, Kimberly Pope Adams, and Jessica Anderson** all benefit from huge youth turnout at colleges like Virginia Tech, Radford, UMW, Old Dominion, Norfolk State, VSU, and William & Mary.
**We know it works. Now we need to put our money where our mouth is.**
We just have to put our money where our mouth is.
## **[Support Democrats with the Duke Dogs.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/29b70e0e-071f-4f7f-a0d7-81634ecee974?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
I spent my college years in Harrisonburg, Virginia, graduating from James Madison University. It's my home away from home, and I want it represented well in Richmond.
That's why I'm supporting **Andrew Payton** in **Virginia 's 34th House District**.
The 34th includes the City of Harrisonburg (where JMU is located) and parts of Rockingham County--**exactly where most JMU off-campus housing is located**. A perfect match for the college organizing strategy.
Andrew Payton is a learning designer, a husband, a father, and a committed community advocate. He has chaired the Climate Action Alliance of the Valley, served on the Environmental Performance Standards Committee, and is on the executive committee of Renew Rocktown.
In the House of Delegates, Andrew wants to make healthcare and housing affordable, raise wages for Virginia workers, strengthen our public schools, and protect our environment.
Recently, the Virginia House Democratic Caucus added Andrew to their Battleground list, making this a mission critical race for our Virginia House Majority.
On August 21, I am co-hosting a virtual fundraiser for Andrew Payton with fellow JMU alumni Senate Majority Leader Scott Surrovell, Fairfax County Clerk of Court Chris Falcon, Arlington and Falls Church Clerk of Court Paul Ferguson, Lauren Gilbert, Daniel Green, Jamie Lockhart, Dave Mills, and Adam Zuckerman. And this is where you come in.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/545775f6-1243-4011-858e-107ba658da18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
🎓 Donate to Andrew's campaign today:[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmudems](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dddd0b14-e0f3-4624-9e70-5396c98652bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Even $25 can help him register students, knock doors, and mobilize a winning coalition.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dddd0b14-e0f3-4624-9e70-5396c98652bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's flip the 34th, send Andrew to Richmond, expand our majority--and have a little fun doing it.
### **TL;DR:**
College campuses are one of the most effective, underutilized tools for flipping state legislative districts. In Virginia, organizing around universities like JMU, Virginia Tech, William & Mary, and UMW dramatically increased youth voter turnout--often by over 100%--and in several cases, made the difference in tight races.
Students are counted in district populations even if they're registered to vote elsewhere, meaning they _already_ shape the maps--we just need to make sure they vote where they live. With early, sustained investment in college organizing, Democrats can build long-term power, flip key seats, and boost turnout in top-of-ticket races.
The Virginia Young Democrats saw huge gains in 2023 using this model.
Now in 2025, we can go even further--[starting with supporting Andrew Payton in JMU's House District 34.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dddd0b14-e0f3-4624-9e70-5396c98652bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
### **How This Applies to Other States:**
This strategy isn't just for Virginia--**it can be replicated in any state with redistricted college towns and tight legislative margins.**
Here's how:
✅ **Check where college students are counted.** Like in Virginia, most states count students in census population data where they live during the school year--even if they vote elsewhere. That means college campuses often _define_ swing districts, especially in rural or suburban areas.
✅ **Target campuses in battleground districts.** Identify colleges in purple areas--where even modest turnout increases can flip or protect seats. Prioritize districts where margins are under 5%, and where student populations could make up thousands of votes.
✅ **Invest early in local campus infrastructure.** Support College Dems chapters, hire youth organizers, and equip them with voter registration tools, digital outreach, and early voting education. Start before the semester begins--not a month before Election Day.
✅ **Partner with allies.** National groups like **Young Democrats of America, and College Democrats of America** already run youth programs--plug into them for funding, training, and amplification.
✅ **Frame the vote as local.** Students need to understand that their vote matters _where they live now_ --on issues like housing, reproductive rights, transit, and tuition. Make the connection between their daily lives and down-ballot elections.
* * *
If Virginia can shift entire legislative chambers through college town turnout, so can Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Georgia, North Carolina, Michigan, and beyond.

clean_body: Why College Campuses Are Key to Flipping State Legislature Districts | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Why College Campuses Are Key to Flipping State Legislature Districts | | | Aug 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | Welcome to By the Ballot Don't recognize this sender? ? Matt Royer recently imported your email address from another platform to Substack. You'll now receive their posts via email or the . To set up your profile and discover more on Substack, . | | ---|---|--- This week of By the Ballot revisits a topic I touched on in my larger this time, I want to drive it home. People always ask where the best place is to boost youth voter turnout, and I will beat this drum to death if I have to: the answer for state legislature and local races is college towns. By the end of this, I'll highlight one specific candidate running in the battleground district of my own alma mater, James Madison University (Go Dukes! 🐶), and ask you to support them. If you want to pitch in without reading the whole spiel, you can do so here: Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? But allow me to explain why investing in College Campus organizing is worth it first: Why Investing in College Campus Organizing Is Worth It Did you know... that college students are counted in redistricting --even if they're not registered to vote there? In July 2023, Politico published "How College Towns Are Decimating the GOP," in which Charlie Mahtesian and Madi Alexander outlined how Democrats have been gaining momentum in local and state elections thanks to increased college student turnout in previously solid red areas. Of 171 "college towns," 38 flipped from red to blue since the 2000 presidential election. Just seven flipped the other way--and typically by smaller margins. Democrats increased their margins in 117 of those counties, while Republicans gained ground in 54. In raw votes, the difference is even starker: counties that trended blue increased their margins by an average of 16,253 votes , while counties that trended red increased theirs by only 4,063. In Virginia, candidates with college campuses in their districts saw a noticeable increase in turnout in 2023. Many people don't realize that college students are counted in the census population for redistricting, even if they 're registered to vote in another state. For example, a student attending UVA but registered in Pennsylvania still counts toward Charlottesville's population for map-drawing purposes. Virginia has 43 colleges with on-campus housing , which means at least 43 House of Delegates districts could be impacted in 2025 by more students registering to vote where they live. These students typically spend 4+ years in these communities--they have buy-in. Their votes should count where they live. And at a time when student debt is rising and young people feel increasingly disaffected with government, Democrats must be telling them how we'll make their lives better--during college and after graduation. Virginia Knows This Works Based on this data, the Virginia Young Democrats (VAYD) made a concerted push in summer 2023 to organize college campuses. We printed and distributed hundreds of voter registration pamphlets to college chapters in battleground areas, encouraging students to register at their campus address and take advantage of same-day voter registration. We also invested heavily in digital outreach, targeting campuses with ads about registering and voting. We had support from the DNC Youth Coordination Team, which visited Virginia Tech, University of Mary Washington, and William & Mary--as well as from youth-oriented PACs like Leaders We Deserve , which campaigned for Nadarius Clark and Lily Franklin. After the election, youth voter impact in down-ballot races. College students were a decisive boost to turnout. In HD 41, Young Democrat candidate Lily Franklin faced off against Republican Chris Obenshain. Out of 24,875 votes cast, Lily lost by 183 (0.74%) The 41st district contains the entirety of Virginia Tech's campus in Montgomery County which includes off campus housing as well. The Young Democrats on campus as well as the surrounding areas took it upon themselves to organize without a large amount of outside funding and were able to pull off an amazing turnout. | | ---|---|--- For 18-35 year olds in Montgomery County: ● In 2015, 3,386 Votes ● In 2019, 3,162 votes ● In 2023, 5,150 votes That is a 52% increase from 2015 and 62% from 2019, an increase that brought the Democratic candidate that much closer to flipping this district to Blue and can still in the future, with more investment in youth organizing. In SD-24, Incumbent Senator Monty Mason faced off against Republican challenger Danny Diggs. Out of 67,179 votes cast, Mason lost by 725 (1.08%). However, just like in HD-41, SD-24 includes all of the William & Mary Campus as well as the surrounding housing, and with the help of the Young Democrats on William & Mary's campus, Williamsburg saw a boom in votes as well. | | ---|---|--- For 18-35 year olds in Williamsburg, ● In 2015, 106 votes ● In 2019, 593 votes ● In 2023, 1,301 votes That is a 459% increase since 2015 and 119% increase since 2019. With more resources and an investment into youth organizing, we could easily close that 725 vote gap in 4 years. In HD-65, then former Delegate and Young Dem Joshua Cole ran against Republican Lee Peters to reclaim his old seat that he lost in 2021. Of 29,154 votes cast, Cole was victorious by a margin of 1750 votes (6.00%). HD-65 includes Fredericksburg City which includes all of the University of Mary Washington and with the help from the Young Democrats of UMW, we saw: | | ---|---|--- For 18-35 year olds in Fredericksburg: ● In 2015, 356 votes ● In 2019, 1104 votes ● In 2023, 1,787 votes That is a 210% increase from 2015 and 62% from 2019 and with a turnout out 1787, Josh Cole's margin of victory can be chalked almost entirely up to the Youth Vote. These examples show how college organizing flipped the House and protected the Senate in 2023. With more investment in youth organizing, turnout can go even higher in 2025. Start Early, Win Big Turn your attention now to registering college students on campus. As noted, they count in the population even if they're not registered there--but when they are, we win. We need to support College Dem chapters early and give them the resources they need to register their peers, especially in red-leaning areas. We can flip even more seats if we stay on this trend. That's why key candidates like Lily Franklin, Joshua Cole, Mike Feggans, Nadarius Clark, Kimberly Pope Adams, and Jessica Anderson all benefit from huge youth turnout at colleges like Virginia Tech, Radford, UMW, Old Dominion, Norfolk State, VSU, and William & Mary. We know it works. Now we need to put our money where our mouth is. We just have to put our money where our mouth is. I spent my college years in Harrisonburg, Virginia, graduating from James Madison University. It's my home away from home, and I want it represented well in Richmond. That's why I'm supporting Andrew Payton in Virginia 's 34th House District. The 34th includes the City of Harrisonburg (where JMU is located) and parts of Rockingham County--exactly where most JMU off-campus housing is located. A perfect match for the college organizing strategy. Andrew Payton is a learning designer, a husband, a father, and a committed community advocate. He has chaired the Climate Action Alliance of the Valley, served on the Environmental Performance Standards Committee, and is on the executive committee of Renew Rocktown. In the House of Delegates, Andrew wants to make healthcare and housing affordable, raise wages for Virginia workers, strengthen our public schools, and protect our environment. Recently, the Virginia House Democratic Caucus added Andrew to their Battleground list, making this a mission critical race for our Virginia House Majority. On August 21, I am co-hosting a virtual fundraiser for Andrew Payton with fellow JMU alumni Senate Majority Leader Scott Surrovell, Fairfax County Clerk of Court Chris Falcon, Arlington and Falls Church Clerk of Court Paul Ferguson, Lauren Gilbert, Daniel Green, Jamie Lockhart, Dave Mills, and Adam Zuckerman. And this is where you come in. | | ---|---|--- 🎓 Donate to Andrew's campaign today: Let's flip the 34th, send Andrew to Richmond, expand our majority--and have a little fun doing it. TL;DR: College campuses are one of the most effective, underutilized tools for flipping state legislative districts. In Virginia, organizing around universities like JMU, Virginia Tech, William & Mary, and UMW dramatically increased youth voter turnout--often by over 100%--and in several cases, made the difference in tight races. Students are counted in district populations even if they're registered to vote elsewhere, meaning they already shape the maps--we just need to make sure they vote where they live. With early, sustained investment in college organizing, Democrats can build long-term power, flip key seats, and boost turnout in top-of-ticket races. The Virginia Young Democrats saw huge gains in 2023 using this model. Now in 2025, we can go even further-- How This Applies to Other States: This strategy isn't just for Virginia--it can be replicated in any state with redistricted college towns and tight legislative margins. Here's how: ✅ Check where college students are counted. Like in Virginia, most states count students in census population data where they live during the school year--even if they vote elsewhere. That means college campuses often define swing districts, especially in rural or suburban areas. ✅ Target campuses in battleground districts. Identify colleges in purple areas--where even modest turnout increases can flip or protect seats. Prioritize districts where margins are under 5%, and where student populations could make up thousands of votes. ✅ Invest early in local campus infrastructure. Support College Dems chapters, hire youth organizers, and equip them with voter registration tools, digital outreach, and early voting education. Start before the semester begins--not a month before Election Day. ✅ Partner with allies. National groups like Young Democrats of America, and College Democrats of America already run youth programs--plug into them for funding, training, and amplification. ✅ Frame the vote as local. Students need to understand that their vote matters where they live now --on issues like housing, reproductive rights, transit, and tuition. Make the connection between their daily lives and down-ballot elections. If Virginia can shift entire legislative chambers through college town turnout, so can Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Georgia, North Carolina, Michigan, and beyond. Thanks for reading By the Ballot! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? What is By the Ballot? By the Ballot is a free SubStack that features unapologetic dispatches from the New South 's next generation of Democrats. Commentary on stances, tactics, and news on the Left. We don't claim to know everything or always be right, we just want to be a part of the conversation. While there 's many different ways to power and the Right wants to take over our country by hook or by crook, we want to help Democrats help Americans by making a government for the people by the ballot. Make sure to follow us on socials to stay up to date on our work! Twitter- Instagram- BlueSky - Contact us at substackbytheballot@gmail.com | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Matt Royer Herndon, VA 20171 ? ?

name: Dems collapsing
subject: The obscure PAC that could pull off biggest GOP coup of 2025
body:
The GOP is on the cusp of pulling off something horrific here in PA, we have two months to stop them. Let’s move before it's too late.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Vwy3_gnE4ZT_llJQzFXGRkZf-eSB8JgyPbXs1ZFxeO09p78uDxnxNsybK4pbQx4iv8T4XRPsp5AE7O-gc4GPGBpyc-YL5XLhDks3CYcjbboJkwtlb-TNE3lwJ0QxJ_OFdw8Rxc0aox3lAXwwjHF_Lrjaye1bJuuMoALqg_CLkqNbhTVNPGrRT2KjpwYmgzPGMp5Uz4uVwz0-JdIrfLgksAVgHXtmsOELtuwtz0C7I4=&c=3gQRk7QwY3YU5GCF3ZhSRNDcVVylc5jVljToNum8H9a5Am30ZGZi2w==&ch=l7yjuN9E8fEE9A4-aTFXgPqJl5nP7oIuIlgtW3GVJvaKoWQAxuB32g==)
---
| Peter,
A little known MAGA PAC is months, if not weeks, away from pulling off nothing short of the controlled demolition of the Pennsylvania Democratic Party.
With CA moving to redistrict GOP seats in retaliation to TX's push to remove Dem congressional seats, MAGA is desperately searching to find more states to redistrict. One of the key states they've decided on: Pennsylvania.
To tear up the PA map they need to remove the Dem majority on the PA Supreme Court who are up for reelection in November. Enter Early Vote Action (EVA).
EVA is a far-right PAC run by conservative rising star Scott Pressler, its focus is on turning out the GOP base for elections like the upcoming 2025 PA Supreme Court election. Right now they're on the cusp of pulling off the biggest GOP coup of 2025:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Vwy3_gnE4ZT_llJQzFXGRkZf-eSB8JgyPbXs1ZFxeO09p78uDxnxNsybK4pbQx4iv8T4XRPsp5AE7O-gc4GPGBpyc-YL5XLhDks3CYcjbboJkwtlb-TNE3lwJ0QxJ_OFdw8Rxc0aox3lAXwwjHF_Lrjaye1bJuuMoALqg_CLkqNbhTVNPGrRT2KjpwYmgzPGMp5Uz4uVwz0-JdIrfLgkmo3wIitmc6zOnUVe1JMuqE=&c=3gQRk7QwY3YU5GCF3ZhSRNDcVVylc5jVljToNum8H9a5Am30ZGZi2w==&ch=l7yjuN9E8fEE9A4-aTFXgPqJl5nP7oIuIlgtW3GVJvaKoWQAxuB32g==)
---
| | | | Judicial elections like the one coming up in PA are extremely low turnout which is why the GOP is pumping millions into the voter drive being run by Early Vote Action. What they're doing is working and for the first time in history the GOP is weeks if not days from surpassing Dems in voter registration in PA.
Democrats on the other hand are nowhere to be found, Pressler says it himself in the tweet above, at local events the Democratic party has no presence.
It is an open secret now that the DNC is embarrassingly low on funds because of the gargantuan debt saddled upon them by the Kamala Harris campaign. For the second quarter in a row now the GOP has massively outraised us and invested into states like PA while we are still stuck paying off the Harris campaign's debt.
The cavalry from DC won't be coming into save PA this November. We are on our own and to salvage the situation and ensure we don't lose the only thing standing between PA and a GOP redistricting that removes every Democratic seat (our supreme court dems) we're going to need support from every dem in the nation.
[Can you come to the aid of Pennsylvanians in our time of crisis and step up where the national party can't by making a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help us put up a fight here?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Vwy3_gnE4ZT_llJQzFXGRkZf-eSB8JgyPbXs1ZFxeO09p78uDxnxNsybK4pbQx4iv8T4XRPsp5AE7O-gc4GPGBpyc-YL5XLhDks3CYcjbboJkwtlb-TNE3lwJ0QxJ_OFdw8Rxc0aox3lAXwwjHF_Lrjaye1bJuuMoALqg_CLkqNbhTVNPGrRT2KjpwYmgzPGMp5Uz4uVwz0-JdIrfLgkvhw956BbZDZj3fYAvR-ViY=&c=3gQRk7QwY3YU5GCF3ZhSRNDcVVylc5jVljToNum8H9a5Am30ZGZi2w==&ch=l7yjuN9E8fEE9A4-aTFXgPqJl5nP7oIuIlgtW3GVJvaKoWQAxuB32g==)

clean_body: The GOP is on the cusp of pulling off something horrific here in PA, we have two months to stop them. Let’s move before it's too late. | | | | | == | Peter, A little known MAGA PAC is months, if not weeks, away from pulling off nothing short of the controlled demolition of the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. With CA moving to redistrict GOP seats in retaliation to TX's push to remove Dem congressional seats, MAGA is desperately searching to find more states to redistrict. One of the key states they've decided on: Pennsylvania. To tear up the PA map they need to remove the Dem majority on the PA Supreme Court who are up for reelection in November. Enter Early Vote Action (EVA). EVA is a far-right PAC run by conservative rising star Scott Pressler, its focus is on turning out the GOP base for elections like the upcoming 2025 PA Supreme Court election. Right now they're on the cusp of pulling off the biggest GOP coup of 2025: | == | | | | Judicial elections like the one coming up in PA are extremely low turnout which is why the GOP is pumping millions into the voter drive being run by Early Vote Action. What they're doing is working and for the first time in history the GOP is weeks if not days from surpassing Dems in voter registration in PA. Democrats on the other hand are nowhere to be found, Pressler says it himself in the tweet above, at local events the Democratic party has no presence. It is an open secret now that the DNC is embarrassingly low on funds because of the gargantuan debt saddled upon them by the Kamala Harris campaign. For the second quarter in a row now the GOP has massively outraised us and invested into states like PA while we are still stuck paying off the Harris campaign's debt. The cavalry from DC won't be coming into save PA this November. We are on our own and to salvage the situation and ensure we don't lose the only thing standing between PA and a GOP redistricting that removes every Democratic seat (our supreme court dems) we're going to need support from every dem in the nation. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == The GOP is on the cusp of pulling off something horrific here in PA, we have two months to stop them. Let's move before it's too late. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | ==

name: Your America News
subject: The #1 Washing Machine Hack I Wish I Knew Sooner
body:
Tired of musty-smelling laundry? This simple washing machine hack is going viral — and for good reason. It removes hidden mold, grime, and bacteria that regular detergents miss. Thousands are using it to get fresher clothes and a healthier home in minutes. No tools, no scrubbing, just a powerful clean. Discover the #1 washer trick people wish they found sooner!

| Is Your Washing Machine Making You and Your Family Sick?

****

| Don't judge me, okay? But I have to be honest... I'm a 39 year old woman, and I do laundry at my mom's house. I know some people could say that I'm too old to rely on my mother to get my laundry done, but I am a single mother, and I need every bit of help I can get. Plus, when I do laundry over there, it's a great excuse to spend time with her, which she likes, too. But something strange started happening. My laundry started smelling worse and worse, like rot and mildew. And every time I washed them, they smelled worse! I asked my mom if she knew what was going on, but she just shrugged. "It's a new machine, I don't know what to tell you," she said. I decided I had to take it into my own hands, so the next time I went over there, I had a plan. I ran the machine with just bleach, thinking that it could clean the machine and kill the smell. But nope. It smelled worse somehow! I asked my mom again to do something. I told her that my kids are stinking up the place at school, and that I don't want them to get bullied. "Can't you hire a plumber or something to figure it out?" I asked. But she just shrugged, "Why don't you just do your laundry at the laundromat if you want to make such a stink about it." But going to a laundromat? Not a chance. I was going to have to find a solution on my own. Then I had a lightbulb moment: I WOULD go to the laundromat. But just for information- I would ask the workers how they clean their machines. If I cleaned my mom's machine like they did, the stinky smell would be eliminated! When I walked in, I saw a man with coveralls and a name patch, Louis. I pretended like I wanted to do laundry there, then I asked him how he kept his machines clean. "Easy! We use Splash Spotless washing machine tablets," he said. "The dissolve throughout an entire hot cycle, slowly disintegrating," "They professionally scrub every nook and cranny of the machine "It foams up, so the soap can get to the bottom of the residue, washing it away "Leaving our machines clean and smelling so fresh!" I was impressed! These [Splash Spotless](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9b1hgjmk4lm65goqamrgkq5d0e3tre999i078j0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj6epj2cth2bs) tablets sounded great. I asked him if he used anything else, or just Splash Spotless. "Nope, just Splash Spotless!" he told me, "We tried other cleaning solutions, but Splash Spotless is the cheapest, plus it works the best using surfactant chemistry to eliminate the root cause of stinky machines." I hadn't even thought of the root cause! I asked him why machines start stinking. "Bacteria, ma'am" Mario looked freaked out, "Or as I like to call it--"washateria." They love a damp, humid, dark place, so washing machines are the perfect place for them to set up shop. We even saw on the news a few months ago about a customer getting sick from a bacteria-filled laundromat." "But that would never happen here, since we use Splash Spotless every 30 washes," he said, proudly. "Great!" I said, and started out the door. "Where are you going!?" he said, "Are you going to grab your laundry?" I laughed, "Nope, sorry!" When I got home I looked up [Splash Spotless](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z784l27dsn9pqd5tges3v55sqisecmtiebgctvo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj6epj2cth2bs) online to check the reviews. I wanted to double check they worked before I spent my money. And holy reviews, Batman! Splash Spotless had 12,936 5 star reviews!

## No More Grime
"I didn't realize it, but there was a ton of grime building up in my washing machine. I found out the hard way--one of my little girls told me the other kids were making fun of her for being stinky. Luckily, our plumber is super honest and suggested Splash Spotless first. The results after just one tablet were incredible! Now, it is a part of my monthly routine."
## Grandma Stinks
"My grandma has been struggling, ever since my grandpa passed. The whole family pitches in to help, but people spend less time over there because it smelled so bad. I deep cleaned her house, and discovered that her washing machine smelled like rotten eggs. I tried scrubbing it with everything--bleach, apple cider vinegar, baking soda, comet, nothing worked. Then I saw an ad for Splash Spotless, and figured it was worth a shot, since there was a money-back guarantee. I'm so glad I did!! It works so well, and her house is totally fresh again!"
## Mold Allergy
"As someone with a lifelong mold allergy, I am always on the lookout for ways to get every single spore out of my life. I used to scrub my washing machine every week, killing my knees and triggering my allergies. Not anymore! Splash Spotless has eliminated the scrubbing and struggles--just pop it in and let it do all the work. It's eliminated the mold that hid from me, and my whole house feels fresher. What makes Splash Spotless unique is its safe, natural, but powerful scrubbing enzymes, that really get into every nook and cranny of your machines, rooting out the "washateria" that can make your family sick. I highly recommend everyone protect themselves with Splash Spotless!" After reading the testimonials, and seeing what the doctor of toxicology had to say, I was starting to believe that [Splash Spotless](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu9p6rbfgu03mkmgcvsok3p7j5t5e29cqambdp50_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj6epj2cth2bs) was right for me. I breathed a big sigh of relief as I pressed the checkout button. Splash Spotless was on its way. When it arrived, I was impressed with how small it was--could something so small really be that powerful?? When it came, I raced over to my mom's house and dropped one in her machine, and started the hot cycle. And when the cycle was over... The machine smelled so fresh! And looked so clean! The way a washing machine should be. I did a load of my laundry and when it was done, it still smelled amazing! Splash Spotless had scrubbed every inch inside of the washing machine, removing any "washteria" was gone--all the built up grime of mold, germs or bacteria had been erased by Splash Spotless. Even my mom was impressed after she did a load of laundry herself. But she said she wasn't going to be that excited unless the machine was still clean a week later. It was! Even a month later, the smell was gone, but I used another [Splash Spotless](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbma27nt64dr4h5872ue4l7mes7nk6lm4euogs50_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj6epj2cth2bs) just in case. After I realized how amazing Splash Spotless is, I've been buying them for family and friends as an easy present--and they love it, too! I am THRILLED with Splash Spotless. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours.
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1658701/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvYXNiU1FoQlR1NA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTg/LbmNsQUJsRjQ4dg/qP2hpZHM9bmNXR0tDb0FaaEc1NFdscw/gaKMpDA/sdg9f8a06d0)
| |
---
| |
---
Patriot, I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news. BRAVE Books has been invited by President Trump’s DOE to host our **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY** **DAY** at the Library of Congress! Friend, talk about taking back our libraries! Just three years ago, we were fighting to get into local public libraries across the country to counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours. Radical librarians sabotaged our efforts. Leftists cursed us with insults. And now, thanks to unwavering support from patriots like you, on August 16th, we’ll be sharing lessons in humility, freedom, and patriotism with children and parents at the largest library in the world -- America’s Library. But as excited as I am to announce our Library of Congress event, it's also a little daunting. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** just got huge. **[And that’s why I’m sending you this email with a 24-hour deadline.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Patriot, I’m praying you will help BRAVE Books make the most of this incredible opportunity.
---
* Hosting **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress helps us reach hundreds more children and their families in person.
* The media coverage gets our conservative message in front of untold numbers of children and families who need to hear that our country and our God are good.
* And our presence at the Library of Congress sends a powerful message that America is about faith, family and freedom.

---
For too long the Left has filled the hearts and minds of children with lies. What a blessing it will be to share God’s truth on August 16th at the Library of Congress. But friend, the date is barreling towards us and our budget just skyrocketed. The new audio/visual needs alone for an event of this magnitude are more than BRAVE Books can handle without your help. [**Patriot, I hope you’ll rush back your crucial gift in the next 24-hours.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) We simply can’t make the most of this opportunity without you. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress will be our most impactful event yet to counter the radical librarians and leftist school boards who are filling our children’s hearts and minds with horrible books like:
---
| | _A is for Activist._ _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Patriot, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | _A is for Activist_. _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Patriot, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. This book teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And then of course, there are the Scholastic Books. Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. And their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me, one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Friend, in the face of all this it’s hard to imagine that a small Christian publisher like BRAVE Books could make a difference. But listen to this... God’s design is so perfect. Did you know that the British burned our Library of Congress to the ground on August 24, 1814? Then five months later, Congress purchased Thomas Jefferson’s personal library of 6,487 books as the foundation of a new American Library. And for decades, the Left has been dragging our country further and further away from Thomas Jefferson’s original vision for our nation. But on August 16, 2025, “we the people” will bring that vision back to the Library of Congress -- back to America. We can’t do it without you. [**Please help us make SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY a success by rushing back your best emergency gift of $35, $50, or even $500.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) And because it’s so critical that you get your **crucial** gift back in just 24 hours, as a “Fast Response Bonus” for your gift of $100 or more, I’d love to send you the first book I wrote with BRAVE called As You Grow. As You Grow tells the story of a tiny seed that, through the fruit of the Spirit, turns into a mighty tree. Friend, that’s BRAVE Books. All that we do is only possible through God’s grace and your generosity. **[Now we’re at a watershed moment and I’m asking for your support.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Whether your emergency gift is $35, $50, $100 or anything higher or lower -- what’s most important is that you respond in the next 24 hours because August 16th is just weeks away. The Holy Spirit has opened a door for us to host an incredible **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress. Please help us seize this opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to our nation’s capital while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us.
---
Thank you!
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
P.S. Patriot, we began this journey to take back our libraries and help parents pour conservative values into their children just three years ago. Now, this August 16th, we’ll be holding **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress! What a way to turn back the Left! But time is short, and we can’t make this day a success without you. [**Please rush back your emergency gift in just 24 hours.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) When you reply quickly with a gift of $100 or more, I’ll send you As You Grow for a child in your life or you can take it and leave it at your local school, charity shop, doctor’s office or library to reach a child who doesn’t have someone to teach them conservative values. Thank you, Friend! -- Kirk
---
|
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Brave Books** 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1658701/VaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9CcmF2ZUJvb2tzVVM/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTg/LbmNsQUJsRjQ4dg/gaKMpDA/s1q69917ef4) | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1658701/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9icmF2ZWJvb2tzLnVzLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTg/LbmNsQUJsRjQ4dg/qP2hsPWVu/gaKMpDA/sbo1d95d3d2) | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1658701/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0JyYXZlQm9va3NVUy8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTg/LbmNsQUJsRjQ4dg/gaKMpDA/s0j9fd2d741)
---|---|---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1658701/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTg/LbmNsQUJsRjQ4dg/qP2hpZHM9bmNXR0tDb0FaaEc1NFdscw/gaKMpDA/s9nd75b92a3)

body:

#

**_— FOCUS GROUP —_**
**_DEADLINE: 11:59PM TONIGHT_** **[JOIN THE FOCUS GROUP](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93897?t=1&akid=9291%2E614464%2EIVj78e)** _The 2026 elections will decide the future of the U.S. Senate, the U.S. House, and key state + local races across the country._ Before we get into the thick of it, we need your input. **Will you be part of our August 2025 Focus Group?** It takes less than 3 minutes. You can do it from your phone or your computer. subject: Texas and California take center stage on redistricting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Protect Our Democracy Fund
body:
This week could reshape the balance of power in Congress
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K2YNZA031FY5YT51Y8DG9GZV_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, The GOP is pushing new maps in Texas that would hand them extra seats. Democrats brought national attention to the scheme by walking out. Now California Democrats are advancing their own maps to even the playing field. These are not small moves. They are decisions that could decide the makeup of Congress and the direction of the country. [**Read the full story** ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K2YNZA031FY5YT51Y8DG9GZV_1) More soon, Andy
DemsGive.org

name: Automated Message (via VPP)
subject: FWD: STAND WITH PBS! >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We’re reaching to Democrats who have not added their signature to our time-sensitive letter to PBS.
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE**
* * *
We’re reaching to Democrats who have not added their signature to our time-sensitive letter to PBS, following Trump’s _forced closure_ of the Corporation for Public Broadcasting.

Trump gutted **$1.1 BILLION** from public broadcasting — putting news, children’s shows, and educational programs on the chopping block.

**_We’re FURIOUS — and we’re making sure PBS knows just how many Americans have their back in the fight for the free press!_**

[**We have limited spots left. Please confirm your signature is submitted before we close this letter at midnight:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93110?t=6&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL) | [**ADD YOUR NAME WHILE YOU CAN: THANK PBS & STAND WITH PUBLIC BROADCASTING »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93110?t=7&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL)
---
Thank you,
Voter Protection Project
**\- - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - -**
FROM: Thank you, PBS ❤️ (via VPP)
TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: re: Corporation for Public Broadcasting SHUTS DOWN
**We are DEVASTATED!!!**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93110?t=8&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL)
Trump gutted $1.1 BILLION from public broadcasting — putting news, children’s shows, and educational programs on the chopping block for _years to come._

[**We will NEVER forgive Trump or his MAGA minions for destroying public media! So we’re sending PBS a letter to thank them for their decades of service — and to stand with them in this critical fight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93110?t=9&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL)
[**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93110?t=10&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL)
---
TO: PBS
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. To everyone at PBS,

**Thank you.** From Mr. Rogers to Sesame Street to PBS NewsHour and so much more, your freely available programming has meant so much to millions of Americans!

I am FURIOUS with Trump and the MAGA mob for wiping out your funding, but please know that I have your back in this fight.

**I also know that Trump’s attacks on the free press don’t end here — he wants to shut down MSNBC, CNN, and anyone else who holds him accountable.**

It’s not just upsetting, _it’s a dangerous step towards**outright authoritarianism!**_ That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to stop him.

[**I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who defend public media and our most essential freedoms »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93110?t=11&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93110?t=12&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
_\- The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20962%2E878179%2EDYJOEL)
---

---|---
Florida is a testing ground for MAGA’s most extreme policies and dangerous ideas – including what has been described as the _“torturous”_ Alligator Alcatraz detention center. We’re reaching out because Democrats are facing two special elections for seats in Florida’s legislature on September 2nd.**This is a prime opportunity to deal a major blow to Trump, DeSantis, and far-right Republicans in a MAGA stronghold.** [Will you make a donation of $7? name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I need your support from day one to win.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5636ba5d-8729-4c3c-96e5-e490ffe84c00/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab646337-90bf-4c91-874d-7bd72b6c745a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s a government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. [Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between Blue Amp Action and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta5962675-ef9b-44fe-a59b-e5974edae9ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: [Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $20 or $10 now, split between Blue Amp Action and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d5535df-f45b-4e1e-bfc2-c6bddfd78813/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfeaabcbe-f18a-4cf4-b83a-3d957be45113/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s a government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Why We Should Study War
body:
Tech is moving fast. Don’t get left behind. Get your early copy of the Stanford Emerging Tech Review now.

# The Stanford Emerging Tech Review 2025
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z132g4nedrtsljov4oqrjjsjr4rpnkaub5pnqf10_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Wars begin. Freedoms fade. Hard-won peace unravels.

The question is why.

One answer: we've stopped studying military history. And when that knowledge fades, so does our ability to understand today's conflicts--or anticipate tomorrow's.
---
|
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zan97aegvbk8ekjqpe63dsi6k84qdd74c9q7u4t0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs)
---
| | Victor Davis Hanson believes this is no small matter.

In a new ebook from the Hoover Institution, _Why We Should Study War_ , Hanson examines what military history reveals about human nature, conflict, and the cost of preserving peace. His analysis draws on historical case studies and connects them to the challenges facing the world today.

Without knowledge of military history, we risk:
* Repeating past mistakes
* Making uninformed decisions about current and future conflicts
* Undervaluing the sacrifices made for our freedoms

I'd like to share this ebook with you--which includes Hanson's core arguments for studying war along with his answers to key questions about deterrence, WWII, and essential military history reading.

Inside, you'll discover:
* How studying war is, in essence, an attempt to prevent it
* Why human nature and the patterns of conflict remain constant across time
* What battles from Shiloh to Verdun to Okinawa teach us about sacrifice
* How military history provides moral education about the cost of freedom
Why the United States--"born through war, reunited by war, and saved from destruction by war"--must never forget this knowledge
* Understanding the past is essential so we can engage more seriously with the present.

I hope this material deepens your appreciation for military history--and informs how you think about peace, conflict, and public responsibility.

You can request your free copy using the link below:
[https://resources.hoover.org/why-we-should-study-war](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpfsooq81q8s4fj3kcip2cenp7t7qmhulfpqf0d8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs) Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution, 434 Galvez Mall, Stanford University, Stanford, CA 94305 USA
---
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Shane Cory
subject: Urgent: Help Us Close the Gap on Tom Homan's Protection Costs
body:
Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to protect Tom Homan? Let me refresh your memory, because it's a tale of real American heroes stepping up when the government failed us all.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5i6ki5261qq34r8791st01haaq3fbsbtlpjmt40_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4fj5eg1eb249ev4ufslp4eg5bcms5lrlubunkq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to **protect Tom Homan**?

Let me refresh your memory, because it's a tale of **real American heroes stepping up when the government failed us all.**

On December 23rd, a close friend reached out with a somber request.

He had just received a call from Tom Homan himself--President Trump's newly appointed Border Czar.

Tom was hitting the ground running to secure our borders and keep dangerous criminal illegals out, but **he faced a credible death threat**.

Shockingly, the outgoing **Biden Administration left him and his family with zero protection**.

Joe Biden knew about the evil plot brewing against Tom, **yet he abandoned him to the wolves**. That's not just negligence; it's a blatant abuse of power by a corrupt outgoing administration who chose to leave an American in danger due to petty politics.

As founder of American Liberty Fund, I couldn't stand by.

Our mission is to advance liberty through electoral politics and educate folks on corruption and overreach--**like this exact scenario**. But we had to work quietly and it wasn't appropriate to reach out to the public for support as that would have made the situation more dire. So we bootstrapped the costs and put the best men in place to ensure Tom and his family were safe through inauguration day.

Today, we're left with thousands of dollars in expenses that we simply cannot pay. Flights, hotels, equipment. These bills need to go away and [**I need your help as a patriot to make that happen.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcottusvrbdp57fpnnmpno7m8h2jf1ptlg8vqpq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs)

Back in December, we scrambled overnight to fund and assemble a security detail. It was a no-brainer; keeping Tom safe meant protecting the man who would safeguard our nation's freedom from invasive threats. We didn't even think of the expense, **we just had to do it**.

We called on our network of veterans, and seven brave men volunteered immediately. They dropped everything.

Leading them was a Navy SEAL who quit his job on the spot, said goodbye to his family, and glued himself to Tom's side for a full month.

The team included a former Army Special Forces combat medic, three Army vets, and three Marine Corps vets--**all with serious personal security experience**.

One was a tracker, another a retired law enforcement officer, and one specialized in executive extractions.

These weren't polished Secret Service types; they were big, bearded warriors who cleared paths just by walking through crowds. **Mean as hell, experienced, and laser-focused on the mission**.

They racked up over a dozen trips across the country. An advance team scouted ahead, while others guarded Tom's family back home, coordinating with grateful local law enforcement.

If the government had handled this, it would've cost taxpayers hundreds of thousands monthly. But our volunteers pinched pennies, keeping costs low. Still, expenses added up--travel, gear, basics, and that's where you come in. [**Will you donate to help cover these remaining costs?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ggj51i3dlnak2o4huh7cs2g7mp6et84b12s0po_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs)

On January 20th, our SEAL handed Tom over safely at President Trump's inauguration to a new government team.

Mission accomplished. But back in February, we asked for help covering remaining reimbursements and thanking those heroes. Many stepped up, but we're not quite there.

Today, [**we face an urgent shortfall of $5,720**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvivdg1uujb26afte6q6gaov2k5ndef3cgssvebo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs). One unpaid member of that detail--a dedicated veteran--has been covering these bills out of his own pocket, scraping by to make ends meet. I did the same.

We have just seven days to pay this back and relieve his burden. **[**Can you chip in $50, $100, or whatever you can right now to help these patriots?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zltfu1th8pjcgbmt4u1ebn7rsspqmvocn6pti9e0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs)**

[**Your gift will cover the gap and show gratitude for their sacrifice**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7sfndvq4a5uacn237aeurvk5mdnjt11vi2dmpto_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs) and for keeping one of the most important men in the Trump Administration safe and secure.

Since handing off Tom that day, he's been doing incredible work as Border Czar.

Under President Trump, Tom has led a historic crackdown on illegal immigration.

Apprehensions at the border have plunged 70% since he took over, with Title 8 encounters dropping to record lows--just 12,000 last month.

He's overseen massive deportations, eradicating criminal migrants and boosting ICE morale sky-high.

Agents call him "the best person for the job." I knew that as soon as I met Tom. This is his passion. He's protecting lives. Protecting innocent Children and his drive to eradicate the Criminal Cartels is unmatched - and they stand no chance against this man.

Tom's efforts have sparked self-deportations in droves--illegals are fleeing out of fear of real enforcement.

He's partnered with Trump's policies to smash cartel routes, stop human trafficking, and slash drug smuggling. President Trump himself congratulated Tom and the team, calling it "one of the great success stories in the history of borders anywhere in the world."

This is liberty in action: **a small, effective government protecting citizens without overreach**.

But we can't forget the men who kept Tom alive to make this happen.

That $5,720 shortfall is weighing heavy, [**and our veterans need relief now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu83eiuef6uqptm89q6kfsn345l9a73bj9q10gg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs).

**[**Please, donate today --every dollar counts toward closing this chapter honorably**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qva21jav2cjgmuspp4h3j7qeq8tlmm5bta2n1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs)****.**

Tom's positive impact this year has been praised far and wide. From boosting agent morale to driving down visa overstays by 80%, he's proving that real enforcement works without harming innocents or stealing freedoms.

Media outlets note his "ironclad" results, and conservatives hail him as **a hero making America safe again**. But government corruption like Biden's abandonment to Tom reminds us why ALF fights: **to expose and counter it**.

With just seven days left, let's rally. **[**If you can give $25 or more, it would mean the world to these veterans**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhupuqdco4rqc3rv5ndcs2h86h8svvaljvh7ne5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs)****.**

Together, we're advancing liberty one step at a time.

With Deep Gratitude,
Shane Cory
President
American Liberty Fund
Veteran, United States Marine Corps

P.S. The threat against Tom was a vetted, organized plot ignored by Biden--infuriating proof of government failure. Thank God for those seven volunteers. They've earned our support, and Tom's successes this year show their sacrifice was worth it. [**Help us pay the final $5,720 in the next week.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbheaougluid5g426pm5313nk2jf2j3sue5matfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs)

---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3k3q5opbkcojratk1k81e76kqd6vntilk9s9iao_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31c3j60p30c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpe0k6vodev57h4eejdedgge2rmbocc5e3vgl748_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfgt7di8k9uk618d8o3erakoc8e9rtiafl0c13do_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clj69p31cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

It wasn't long ago there was an attempt to _**put Trump behind bars**_.
To _**bankrupt him**_ through legal fees.
And to _**even assassinate him**_ ... twice!
But President Trump has prevailed each and every time.
President Trump has repeatedly stated he wants to _**"demolish the deep state, "**_ and claims this to be his _**" final battle"**_**** against these shadowy figures.
But the truth is... the battle may have only just begun.
Rogue Judges across the country have tried to stop his actions at every turn. Congress hasn't been much help in passing his legislation, and the media is at his throat like always.
So, _**how will Trump bring prosperity to the American People**_ while the Deep State runs rampant, putting up roadblocks for everything he does for America? _**Will he be able to succeed in Making America Great Again?**_
Only time will tell, but thousands of American Patriots are preparing themselves for a worse case scenario. They _ARE NOT_ leaving things up to chance. They are helping to _**protect themselves**_ in case the Deep State has one more potential _ace up their sleeve._

# Illegal immigrant charged with causing horrific highway crash, the White House responds
Harjinder Singh, an illegal immigrant who entered the US in 2018, **[was arrested and charged with three counts of vehicular homicide](https://substack.com/redirect/5ccf53f6-3752-4357-9869-3b988cf8ca56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after allegedly making an unauthorized U-turn with a commercial semi-truck on the Florida Turnpike in Fort Pierce.
* **The illegal U-turn caused the trailer to jackknife and collide with a minivan, killing all three passengers** in the minivan, according to the Florida Department of Highway Safety and Motor Vehicles.
* **Singh obtained his commercial driver's license in California under a 2013 state law** that allows residents to get licenses regardless of immigration status, prompting White House criticism of "Gavin Newscum's pro-illegal alien policies."
* **ICE has issued a detainer for Singh, who remains in custody** on both state vehicular homicide charges and immigration violations, with officials calling the tragedy "totally preventable" and criticizing policies that grant commercial licenses to illegal immigrants.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/56329c75-7b01-4694-ad2d-5f4c9ff2588d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
# Trump reveals exactly how Zelensky can end the war, but he's not going to like it...
Trump claimed Zelensky could end the war "almost immediately" by making **[two major concessions:](https://substack.com/redirect/dd25c8e2-3343-49d0-9d7e-9c555dc9a4af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** dropping Ukraine's bid to join NATO (a long-standing Russian demand) and accepting that there's "no getting back" Crimea, effectively recognizing Russia's 2014 annexation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fa67a34d-b171-4e7c-b7b7-94ba20fbe707?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The statement came ahead of a high-profile White House summit Monday** where Trump is scheduled to meet with Zelensky and several European leaders to discuss next steps in the three-and-a-half-year conflict.
* **Zelensky pushed back on territorial concessions** , arguing that giving up Crimea previously "paved the way for Putin's future invasion" and stating that Ukrainians are "fighting for their land, for their independence," while expressing gratitude for U.S. support.
* **Secretary of State Marco Rubio indicated both sides must make "hard compromises"** for lasting peace, while Putin has demanded Ukraine surrender the remaining quarter of Donetsk region in exchange for freezing fighting in other areas where Russia has struggled to advance.

* * *
