| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113530322/564082773/862233165?refcode=EM_F_250818Clinton_N_HBM_90DO_8_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjNDc4NGE0LTNiN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zl4g2eVIhTpiffc17tUJ0n7SCGvcLXIjk5rmX_nrXDk=)
---
Peter,

In case you missed it, _CNN_ recently aired a profile of a pastor named Douglas Wilson and the influential movement he leads. The piece revealed that his movement preaches that women should not be allowed to vote or hold leadership positions...
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113530324/564082785/862233165?refcode=EM_F_250818Clinton_N_HBM_90DO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjNDc4NGE0LTNiN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zl4g2eVIhTpiffc17tUJ0n7SCGvcLXIjk5rmX_nrXDk=)
---
One of the most appalling moments of the interview was when Wilson said, _“Women are the kind of people that people come out of.”_

We find that statement chilling.

But here’s the thing: While many are sharing the interview because it is flagrant and disturbing, **Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth reposted it in support of Wilson... and subsequently revealed that he is actually a member of Wilson’s church.** We know far too many others in our government subscribe to this ideology, too.

At Her Bold Move, we know the best way to block these men from writing harmful laws is to **elect more women lawmakers.** Women have been left out of conversations about our own bodies, safety, and rights for far too long. **At Her Bold Move, we’re ushering more women into the rooms where decisions and laws are made by offering game-changing support to their campaigns.**

If this video and Douglas Wilson’s movement make you angry and frightened – channel that anger and fear into ACTION. [**Help make sure that when men like Pete Hegseth put forth harmful policies about women, they are always forced to contend with women lawmakers. Rush $20.25 or more to help us elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women to office who will block sexist lawmakers across the country. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-women/?refcode=EM_F_250818Clinton_N_HBM_90DO_8_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

Together,

Her Bold Move

\----------- Forwarded message ---------
---
_“Women are the kind of people that people are meant to come out of.”

“I would support the 19th Amendment to be repealed.”

“Families should vote as a household, with the husband and father casting the vote.” _

**These are all quotes from a massively influential pastor and self-described Christian nationalist named Douglas Wilson. In a recent interview with _CNN_ , Wilson admitted that he would like America to become a patriarchal society where men are dominant and women are expected to submit to their husbands. The interview has been shared widely, and we’re linking to a clip below so you can see it for yourself. **

But while many people are sharing the interview because it is flagrant and disturbing, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth reposted it with the text, "All of Christ for All of Life."

Chief Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell told _NPR_ that Hegseth is a "proud member of a church affiliated with the Congregation of Reformed Evangelical Churches," **which was founded by Wilson.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113530327/564082808/862233165?refcode=EM_F_250818Clinton_N_HBM_90DO_8_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjNDc4NGE0LTNiN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zl4g2eVIhTpiffc17tUJ0n7SCGvcLXIjk5rmX_nrXDk=)
---
We have been sounding the alarm, as many of Trump’s appointees and policymakers in the MAGA movement have made it clear that they support these ideologies. These aren’t just comments by random trolls on the internet. These are the strongly held beliefs of powerful men who are the ones writing policy about our bodies, our safety, our well-being, and our _**_rights_**_.

But here’s the thing: **The _best defense_ against this anti-woman movement is to elect pro-choice, pro-women women to political offices across the country. **

When Wilson was asked if he believes women should be allowed to have leadership roles in government, he answered, “No.”

What other policies should we expect to see from the men in power who follow the teachings of this church? At Her Bold Move, we refuse to wait around and find out...

[**We MUST continue to elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women up and down the ballot to block chauvinistic, misogynistic officials from threatening our hard-fought rights as women. If you are as disturbed by this interview as we are, chip in $20.26 or more today to join us in this fight. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-women/?refcode=EM_F_250818Clinton_N_HBM_90DO_8_G_N_L2&amount=20.26)

clean_body: | | | | | = Peter, In case you missed it, CNN recently aired a profile of a pastor named Douglas Wilson and the influential movement he leads. The piece revealed that his movement preaches that women should not be allowed to vote or hold leadership positions... = One of the most appalling moments of the interview was when Wilson said, “Women are the kind of people that people come out of.” We find that statement chilling. But here’s the thing: While many are sharing the interview because it is flagrant and disturbing, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth reposted it in support of Wilson... and subsequently revealed that he is actually a member of Wilson’s church. We know far too many others in our government subscribe to this ideology, too. At Her Bold Move, we know the best way to block these men from writing harmful laws is to elect more women lawmakers. Women have been left out of conversations about our own bodies, safety, and rights for far too long. At Her Bold Move, we’re ushering more women into the rooms where decisions and laws are made by offering game-changing support to their campaigns. If this video and Douglas Wilson’s movement make you angry and frightened – channel that anger and fear into ACTION. Together, Her Bold Move \----------- Forwarded message --------- “Women are the kind of people that people are meant to come out of.” “I would support the 19th Amendment to be repealed.” “Families should vote as a household, with the husband and father casting the vote.” These are all quotes from a massively influential pastor and self-described Christian nationalist named Douglas Wilson. In a recent interview with CNN , Wilson admitted that he would like America to become a patriarchal society where men are dominant and women are expected to submit to their husbands. The interview has been shared widely, and we’re linking to a clip below so you can see it for yourself. But while many people are sharing the interview because it is flagrant and disturbing, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth reposted it with the text, "All of Christ for All of Life." Chief Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell told NPR that Hegseth is a "proud member of a church affiliated with the Congregation of Reformed Evangelical Churches," which was founded by Wilson. = We have been sounding the alarm, as many of Trump’s appointees and policymakers in the MAGA movement have made it clear that they support these ideologies. These aren’t just comments by random trolls on the internet. These are the strongly held beliefs of powerful men who are the ones writing policy about our bodies, our safety, our well-being, and our rights. But here’s the thing: The best defense against this anti-woman movement is to elect pro-choice, pro-women women to political offices across the country. When Wilson was asked if he believes women should be allowed to have leadership roles in government, he answered, “No.” What other policies should we expect to see from the men in power who follow the teachings of this church? At Her Bold Move, we refuse to wait around and find out... name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: RITE Continues to Defend Proof of Citizenship Requirements for Voter Registration
body:
Defends President Trump’s Executive Order 14248 |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE Continues to Defend Proof of Citizenship Requirements for Voter Registration**
**Washington, DC** – Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections (RITE), a non-profit organization that supports litigation to protect election security and integrity, [has filed an amicus brief](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=52de35c955&e=ea91f782ea) in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia that defends requiring documentary proof of U.S. citizenship for individuals who use a national form to register to vote.

The brief, submitted alongside the Republican Party of Arizona (RPAZ), defends President Trump’s Executive Order 14248, “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” It argues that the National Voter Registration Act empowers the Election Assistance Commission to request documentation, such as proof of citizenship, determined necessary to verify eligibility of the applicant.

The Supreme Court and lower federal courts have already affirmed this authority. The brief also explains why requiring proof of citizenship imposes no unconstitutional burden on eligible voters, as such documentation is routinely available to citizens and serves the compelling interest of ensuring that only eligible individuals are registered. This is the third brief that either RITE or RITE PAC have filed in federal court alongside RPAZ defending legal challenges to the Executive Order. RITE and RITE PAC have also aggressively supported citizen-only voting policies in Vermont, New Hampshire, Arizona, and other states.

“Proving you are a citizen before you can vote in our elections is about as commonsensical as you can get,” said RITE President Justin Riemer. “Most Americans support this most basic election security measure, yet people who oppose election integrity continue to file baseless lawsuits. The experience in states like Arizona that have implemented the requirement shows it works and is not burdensome.”

RITE will continue fighting for measures designed to prevent non-citizen registration and protect the integrity of the election system.
###

---

subject: I’m so proud to support Sherrod, and I’m counting on you to join me.

body:

Friend, I’m reaching out with some incredible news: **My friend Sherrod Brown just announced that he’s running for Senate again in Ohio! I’m so proud to support him, and I’m counting on you to join me.[Will you chip in $10 or more now — split between Sherrod and me — to help give his campaign the strongest kickoff possible?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113530973/564084867/-474134410?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.18_Sherrod-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWVjMGZjNS0zYjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AA6IzYrNQw7Umip66s5qRnwdQG98SMoSUywYR0lfR7M=)** As Sherrod says himself, he never planned to return to public office. But he sees what’s happening in Washington, and he’s called to jump back in the fight. He’s the exact leader we need at this moment. Sherrod has spent his life fighting for the Dignity of Work — the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you come from, or what kind of work you do. Right now, this principle is under threat. Billionaires and corporations are profiting like never before, while workers and everyday people are struggling just to make ends meet. _The system is rigged in favor of the wealthiest among us, and Sherrod is running to change that._ **If there’s one thing I know about Sherrod, it’s that he never backs down from a tough fight. But this is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races on the map in 2026, and he needs to build a massive grassroots movement to win.** [**_I’m grateful to have you on my team, friend, and now I’m asking you to be on Sherrod’s. With so much at stake, will you give $10 or more now — split between Sherrod and me — to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113530977/564084868/-474134410?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.18_Sherrod-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWVjMGZjNS0zYjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AA6IzYrNQw7Umip66s5qRnwdQG98SMoSUywYR0lfR7M=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Lisa Blunt Rochester and Sherrod Brown:_ | | ******[CHIP IN $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113530982/564084873/-474134410?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.18_Sherrod-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWVjMGZjNS0zYjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AA6IzYrNQw7Umip66s5qRnwdQG98SMoSUywYR0lfR7M=)******

name: Shane Cory
subject: Urgent: Help Us Close the Gap on Tom Homan's Protection Costs
body:
Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to protect Tom Homan? Let me refresh your memory, because it's a tale of real American heroes stepping up when the government failed us all.

| [****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfebq4q32tuio8lhp0ig7jhprtvgnb0bkiiqi298_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs)
[****](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqnj6k0rpjo5mebbi5brv3mt149qk6cahsfiu4s8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to **protect Tom Homan**?

Let me refresh your memory, because it's a tale of **real American heroes stepping up when the government failed us all.**

On December 23rd, a close friend reached out with a somber request.

He had just received a call from Tom Homan himself--President Trump's newly appointed Border Czar.

Tom was hitting the ground running to secure our borders and keep dangerous criminal illegals out, but **he faced a credible death threat**.

Shockingly, the outgoing **Biden Administration left him and his family with zero protection**.

Joe Biden knew about the evil plot brewing against Tom, **yet he abandoned him to the wolves**. That's not just negligence; it's a blatant abuse of power by a corrupt outgoing administration who chose to leave an American in danger due to petty politics.

As founder of American Liberty Fund, I couldn't stand by.

Our mission is to advance liberty through electoral politics and educate folks on corruption and overreach--**like this exact scenario**. But we had to work quietly and it wasn't appropriate to reach out to the public for support as that would have made the situation more dire. So we bootstrapped the costs and put the best men in place to ensure Tom and his family were safe through inauguration day.

Today, we're left with thousands of dollars in expenses that we simply cannot pay. Flights, hotels, equipment. These bills need to go away and [**I need your help as a patriot to make that happen.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfrv2rp7eijgv81b63791lo7ivcib4dva3mcbdpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs)

Back in December, we scrambled overnight to fund and assemble a security detail. It was a no-brainer; keeping Tom safe meant protecting the man who would safeguard our nation's freedom from invasive threats. We didn't even think of the expense, **we just had to do it**.

We called on our network of veterans, and seven brave men volunteered immediately. They dropped everything.

Leading them was a Navy SEAL who quit his job on the spot, said goodbye to his family, and glued himself to Tom's side for a full month.

The team included a former Army Special Forces combat medic, three Army vets, and three Marine Corps vets--**all with serious personal security experience**.

One was a tracker, another a retired law enforcement officer, and one specialized in executive extractions.

These weren't polished Secret Service types; they were big, bearded warriors who cleared paths just by walking through crowds. **Mean as hell, experienced, and laser-focused on the mission**.

They racked up over a dozen trips across the country. An advance team scouted ahead, while others guarded Tom's family back home, coordinating with grateful local law enforcement.

If the government had handled this, it would've cost taxpayers hundreds of thousands monthly. But our volunteers pinched pennies, keeping costs low. Still, expenses added up--travel, gear, basics, and that's where you come in. [**Will you donate to help cover these remaining costs?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvrnd9spae5h5qippha877nkl8rdps6a8turejuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs)

On January 20th, our SEAL handed Tom over safely at President Trump's inauguration to a new government team.

Mission accomplished. But back in February, we asked for help covering remaining reimbursements and thanking those heroes. Many stepped up, but we're not quite there.

Today, [**we face an urgent shortfall of $5,720**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqin7uubgbbqm40d0osk36bd9t0lmffpdqm8ivu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs). One unpaid member of that detail--a dedicated veteran--has been covering these bills out of his own pocket, scraping by to make ends meet. I did the same.

We have just seven days to pay this back and relieve his burden. **[**Can you chip in $50, $100, or whatever you can right now to help these patriots?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg9p5otgi15j2ufdt800pjcgcpf5sha4q775b4k8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs)**

[**Your gift will cover the gap and show gratitude for their sacrifice**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6lgakjbire7nnff08khefklunt7o48ecf5e5u70_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs) and for keeping one of the most important men in the Trump Administration safe and secure.

Since handing off Tom that day, he's been doing incredible work as Border Czar.

Under President Trump, Tom has led a historic crackdown on illegal immigration.

Apprehensions at the border have plunged 70% since he took over, with Title 8 encounters dropping to record lows--just 12,000 last month.

He's overseen massive deportations, eradicating criminal migrants and boosting ICE morale sky-high.

Agents call him "the best person for the job." I knew that as soon as I met Tom. This is his passion. He's protecting lives. Protecting innocent Children and his drive to eradicate the Criminal Cartels is unmatched - and they stand no chance against this man.

Tom's efforts have sparked self-deportations in droves--illegals are fleeing out of fear of real enforcement.

He's partnered with Trump's policies to smash cartel routes, stop human trafficking, and slash drug smuggling. President Trump himself congratulated Tom and the team, calling it "one of the great success stories in the history of borders anywhere in the world."

This is liberty in action: **a small, effective government protecting citizens without overreach**.

But we can't forget the men who kept Tom alive to make this happen.

That $5,720 shortfall is weighing heavy, [**and our veterans need relief now**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1dpn0j20uvean6uopj5ql85b81b4lhq9qfd4nfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs).

**[**Please, donate today --every dollar counts toward closing this chapter honorably**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z13cg8kv0tosl7ckk2dqjl0tceas14l9dhp5t6tg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs)****.**

Tom's positive impact this year has been praised far and wide. From boosting agent morale to driving down visa overstays by 80%, he's proving that real enforcement works without harming innocents or stealing freedoms.

Media outlets note his "ironclad" results, and conservatives hail him as **a hero making America safe again**. But government corruption like Biden's abandonment to Tom reminds us why ALF fights: **to expose and counter it**.

With just seven days left, let's rally. **[**If you can give $25 or more, it would mean the world to these veterans**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z254vu1k31a85ih91i2vhci6mlelc2jkdrdeo55g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs)****.**

Together, we're advancing liberty one step at a time.

With Deep Gratitude,
Shane Cory
President
American Liberty Fund
Veteran, United States Marine Corps

P.S. The threat against Tom was a vetted, organized plot ignored by Biden--infuriating proof of government failure. Thank God for those seven volunteers. They've earned our support, and Tom's successes this year show their sacrifice was worth it. [**Help us pay the final $5,720 in the next week.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7i9b6s1p3dfnueo99ri6kjimafleh4k9onjc640_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0o32cjh2bs)

clean_body: Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to protect Tom Homan? Let me refresh your memory, because it's a tale of real American heroes stepping up when the government failed us all. | Dear Patriot, Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to protect Tom Homan? Let me refresh your memory, because it's a tale of real American heroes stepping up when the government failed us all. On December 23rd, a close friend reached out with a somber request. He had just received a call from Tom Homan himself--President Trump's newly appointed Border Czar. Tom was hitting the ground running to secure our borders and keep dangerous criminal illegals out, but he faced a credible death threat. Shockingly, the outgoing Biden Administration left him and his family with zero protection. Joe Biden knew about the evil plot brewing against Tom, yet he abandoned him to the wolves. That's not just negligence; it's a blatant abuse of power by a corrupt outgoing administration who chose to leave an American in danger due to petty politics. As founder of American Liberty Fund, I couldn't stand by. Our mission is to advance liberty through electoral politics and educate folks on corruption and overreach--like this exact scenario. But we had to work quietly and it wasn't appropriate to reach out to the public for support as that would have made the situation more dire. So we bootstrapped the costs and put the best men in place to ensure Tom and his family were safe through inauguration day. Today, we're left with thousands of dollars in expenses that we simply cannot pay. Flights, hotels, equipment. These bills need to go away and Back in December, we scrambled overnight to fund and assemble a security detail. It was a no-brainer; keeping Tom safe meant protecting the man who would safeguard our nation's freedom from invasive threats. We didn't even think of the expense, we just had to do it. We called on our network of veterans, and seven brave men volunteered immediately. They dropped everything. Leading them was a Navy SEAL who quit his job on the spot, said goodbye to his family, and glued himself to Tom's side for a full month. The team included a former Army Special Forces combat medic, three Army vets, and three Marine Corps vets--all with serious personal security experience. One was a tracker, another a retired law enforcement officer, and one specialized in executive extractions. These weren't polished Secret Service types; they were big, bearded warriors who cleared paths just by walking through crowds. Mean as hell, experienced, and laser-focused on the mission. They racked up over a dozen trips across the country. An advance team scouted ahead, while others guarded Tom's family back home, coordinating with grateful local law enforcement. If the government had handled this, it would've cost taxpayers hundreds of thousands monthly. But our volunteers pinched pennies, keeping costs low. Still, expenses added up--travel, gear, basics, and that's where you come in. On January 20th, our SEAL handed Tom over safely at President Trump's inauguration to a new government team. Mission accomplished. But back in February, we asked for help covering remaining reimbursements and thanking those heroes. Many stepped up, but we're not quite there. Today, . One unpaid member of that detail--a dedicated veteran--has been covering these bills out of his own pocket, scraping by to make ends meet. I did the same. We have just seven days to pay this back and relieve his burden. and for keeping one of the most important men in the Trump Administration safe and secure. Since handing off Tom that day, he's been doing incredible work as Border Czar. Under President Trump, Tom has led a historic crackdown on illegal immigration. Apprehensions at the border have plunged 70% since he took over, with Title 8 encounters dropping to record lows--just 12,000 last month. He's overseen massive deportations, eradicating criminal migrants and boosting ICE morale sky-high. Agents call him "the best person for the job." I knew that as soon as I met Tom. This is his passion. He's protecting lives. Protecting innocent Children and his drive to eradicate the Criminal Cartels is unmatched - and they stand no chance against this man. Tom's efforts have sparked self-deportations in droves--illegals are fleeing out of fear of real enforcement. He's partnered with Trump's policies to smash cartel routes, stop human trafficking, and slash drug smuggling. President Trump himself congratulated Tom and the team, calling it "one of the great success stories in the history of borders anywhere in the world." This is liberty in action: a small, effective government protecting citizens without overreach. But we can't forget the men who kept Tom alive to make this happen. That $5,720 shortfall is weighing heavy, . . Tom's positive impact this year has been praised far and wide. From boosting agent morale to driving down visa overstays by 80%, he's proving that real enforcement works without harming innocents or stealing freedoms. Media outlets note his "ironclad" results, and conservatives hail him as a hero making America safe again. But government corruption like Biden's abandonment to Tom reminds us why ALF fights: to expose and counter it. With just seven days left, let's rally. . name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: 🚨ALERT: Democracy Under Siege –Volunteers Needed!🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Stand up for democracy and make your voice heard—volunteers needed NOW!
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K2YR6A3G6BWW0KKTENNV4TX8_0)
---

---
| | | | Dear Peter, Right now, MAGA Republicans in Texas have gone to shocking lengths—ordering the arrest of Democratic lawmakers simply for standing up against an un-democratic redistricting scheme designed to expand GOP control of Congress. Republicans are openly willing to use threats, coercion and corruption to silence democracy and shove unpopular policies down voters' throats.
Sound familiar? It should.
Here in Tennessee, we witnessed similar extremist tactics in 2021. **Bill Lee and the GOP legislature gerrymandered our congressional districts** , slicing Nashville into three different districts, and our state legislative districts. Recently, **Republicans passed a law to criminalize local officials for votes to protect the residents they represent**. Yes, you read that right—possible jail time for performing their sworn duty.
We can’t let Tennessee continue to be the testing ground for MAGA authoritarianism.
**The time to act is NOW**. The only defense against this corrupt wave of MAGA overreach is you. This movement is by the people and for the people, and your Tennessee House Democratic Caucus urgently needs your support.
We’re calling all the Volunteers from **Nashville, Collierville, Cleveland, Newport, and everywhere in between!** Take a stand today—fight back against corruption and defend democracy. Will you join us?
---
| _**If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.**_
---

| With urgency and solidarity,
The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking, friend: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now – split between my campaign and Michael Bennet's – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113532121/564088669/-487628408?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk888-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGE1YWEwNi0zZDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DkleWtq7xkWMWj_sRgGc7fFlL0SFS8335aP25KEy8Uk=)**
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown

subject: “A cracked-out clown car”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The Democrat Party is falling apart in real time...

Friend,

This is not a drill.

Democrat strategist James Carville just torched his party:
_**[" Constipated. Leaderless. Confused. A cracked-out clown car. Divided... The Democratic Party is in shambles."](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2sissbqj394schmjgkt60nquh6jelv5hl5kqp1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm0p72c5h2bs)**_
He's not wrong. The Democrats are collapsing under the weight of their failed radical policies. And the signs are everywhere:

✅Their top donors are bailing.
✅They're turning on each other.
✅And now, they're even losing one of their late-night Hollywood propaganda machines -- The Late Show With Stephen Colbert

But don't get too comfortable, Friend.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m back, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
#
Peter: when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Katie Porter and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250818_1_ak?refcode=em20250818-40019&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40019_3422442_eW5RgP&akid=40019%2E3422442%2EeW5RgP)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250818_1_ak?refcode=em20250818-40019&refcode2=40019_3422442_eW5RgP&akid=40019%2E3422442%2EeW5RgP)
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of- thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won._
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now – split between my campaign and Katie Porter’s – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250818_1_ak?refcode=em20250818-40019&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40019_3422442_eW5RgP&akid=40019%2E3422442%2EeW5RgP)**
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250818-40019&amounts=&t=1&refcode2=40019_3422442_eW5RgP&akid=40019%2E3422442%2EeW5RgP)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?amount=30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?amount=30]
Derek,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
That’s why, today , I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.
Will you chip in $30 or more now – split between Tim Kaine and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?amount=30]
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price.
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:
Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $30 or $15 now, split between Tim Kaine and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?amount=30]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?express_lane=true&amount=30]
CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?express_lane=true&amount=100]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown?express_lane=true&amount=250]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown]
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-brown]

Alexandria, VA 22313

name: Team Lizzie
subject: We owe Texas House Democrats A HUGE thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
This summer, Texas House Democrats made a choice that few would have the courage to make. They broke quorum and walked out—not for themselves, but for every Texan whose voice would be silenced by an extreme plan to rig our elections.
When President Trump demanded a mid-decade rewrite of Texas’ congressional map—designed to erase the voting power of millions of Black, Hispanic, and Asian American Texans—Governor Greg Abbott and Republican leaders didn’t hesitate. They gave him exactly what he wanted.
But Texas House Democrats refused to be part of a brutal attack on minority voting rights and a corrupt assault on free and fair elections. They left the state to stop the scheme in its tracks, risking their careers, their safety, and their livelihoods.
They endured threats from both Gov. Abbott and Texas AG Ken Paxton to strip them of their seats, arrest warrants, personal fines, harassment of their families, and even intimidation from extremist groups. And yet—they held the line to shine a national spotlight on this attack on our democracy.
Because of their remarkable display of personal commitment and political courage:
* States like California, Illinois, and New York are taking steps to counterbalance Trump’s gerrymander.
* Republicans are so worried about their plan backfiring that they’ve filed a bill in Congress to end mid-decade redistricting for good.
* Even Republican leaders in other states have refused to follow Trump’s lead.
* The Texas map has been exposed as an illegal, racially discriminatory gerrymander in violation of the Voting Rights Act and the Constitution.
Their fortitude under pressure demonstrated that the will of the people is stronger than those who seek to silence it. And in doing so, the Texas House Democrats also exposed a deeper truth—the fundamental weakness of Trump, Abbott, and other Republicans, who will cheat and undermine free and fair elections just to hold on to power.
Team Lizzie stands with Texas House Democrats in this fight—and we’re so grateful you are, too.
Together, we can keep building the movement to protect free and fair elections, here in Texas and across the country.
Thanks,
Team Lizzie

clean_body: ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [] This summer, Texas House Democrats made a choice that few would have the courage to make. They broke quorum and walked out—not for themselves, but for every Texan whose voice would be silenced by an extreme plan to rig our elections. When President Trump demanded a mid-decade rewrite of Texas’ congressional map—designed to erase the voting power of millions of Black, Hispanic, and Asian American Texans—Governor Greg Abbott and Republican leaders didn’t hesitate. They gave him exactly what he wanted. But Texas House Democrats refused to be part of a brutal attack on minority voting rights and a corrupt assault on free and fair elections. They left the state to stop the scheme in its tracks, risking their careers, their safety, and their livelihoods. They endured threats from both Gov. Abbott and Texas AG Ken Paxton to strip them of their seats, arrest warrants, personal fines, harassment of their families, and even intimidation from extremist groups. And yet—they held the line to shine a national spotlight on this attack on our democracy. Because of their remarkable display of personal commitment and political courage: States like California, Illinois, and New York are taking steps to counterbalance Trump’s gerrymander. Republicans are so worried about their plan backfiring that they’ve filed a bill in Congress to end mid-decade redistricting for good. Even Republican leaders in other states have refused to follow Trump’s lead. The Texas map has been exposed as an illegal, racially discriminatory gerrymander in violation of the Voting Rights Act and the Constitution. Their fortitude under pressure demonstrated that the will of the people is stronger than those who seek to silence it. And in doing so, the Texas House Democrats also exposed a deeper truth—the fundamental weakness of Trump, Abbott, and other Republicans, who will cheat and undermine free and fair elections just to hold on to power. Team Lizzie stands with Texas House Democrats in this fight—and we’re so grateful you are, too. Together, we can keep building the movement to protect free and fair elections, here in Texas and across the country. Thanks, Team Lizzie DONATE [] VOLUNTEER [] 3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098 PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: www.lizziefletcher.com []

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Sherrod Brown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Sherrod has spent his whole career fighting for the dignity of work

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2619%2E4032634%2Eqg_CVw)
---
Today is an exciting day for Ohio — and for everyone who’s passionate about building a Democratic Party that fights for working people. **My friend Sherrod Brown just announced that he’s running for Senate in Ohio.[If you already know how significant his win in Ohio would be for working Americans, please split a donation between Sherrod’s campaign and our movement to help kick his campaign off as strongly as possible.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3101?t=8&akid=2619%2E4032634%2Eqg_CVw)**

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3101?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2619%2E4032634%2Eqg_CVw)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3101?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2619%2E4032634%2Eqg_CVw)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3101?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2619%2E4032634%2Eqg_CVw)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3101?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2619%2E4032634%2Eqg_CVw)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3101?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2619%2E4032634%2Eqg_CVw)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3101?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2619%2E4032634%2Eqg_CVw)
---

---
Working people in America need a fighter right now — and that’s exactly what we’ve got in Sherrod Brown. Billionaires and corporations are profiting like never before while everyday people are struggling just to make ends meet. The system is rigged in favor of the wealthiest among us, and Sherrod is running to change that. Sherrod stood up to Wall Street by fighting to save the pensions of tens of thousands of Ohio retirees — and won. He stood up to Big Pharma by fighting to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs — and won. Sherrod has spent his life fighting for the dignity of work — the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you come from, or what kind of work you do. Right now, this principle is under threat like never before. Now, Sherrod is running again in one of the most competitive races of 2026 against a Trump enabler — whose big achievement in the Senate has been to nominate Trump for the Nobel Peace Prize. (Seriously.) For Sherrod to compete against the far-right and corporate special interests who could pour millions into this race, he needs a strong response of grassroots support right now. [**With so much at stake, will you give $28 or anything you can now — split between Sherrod and our campaign — to help flip Ohio’s Senate seat, take back our Senate majority, and pass policies that actually support working people?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3101?amount=28&t=14&akid=2619%2E4032634%2Eqg_CVw) As Sherrod says himself, he never planned to return to public office. But he sees what’s happening in Washington, and he’s called to jump back in the fight. He’s the exact leader we need at this moment. I’m so grateful to have you in this fight — and I know Sherrod is too. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
| | |
---
Derek,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
**[Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between John Fetterman and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51578?refcode=jtk212-bu-fl&t=1&akid=10256%2E434096%2EfxPqEf)**
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Derek, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
**[Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $25 or $5 now, split between John Fetterman and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51578?refcode=jtk212-bu-fl&t=2&akid=10256%2E434096%2EfxPqEf)**
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk212-bu-fl-footer&t=3&refcode2=10256_434096_fxPqEf&akid=10256%2E434096%2EfxPqEf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm back, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up t
#

Team: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.**[**Will you chip in $3 or more now – split between Mark Kelly and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrod.536Arw&refcode=em250818-1-700k&t=1&akid=6155%2E6688874%2EnW8maz)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-sherrod.pCXxzZ&refcode=em250818-1-700k&t=20&akid=6155%2E6688874%2EnW8maz)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-sherrod.MG6zqA&refcode=em250818-1-700k&t=21&akid=6155%2E6688874%2EnW8maz)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-sherrod.gj5zPW&refcode=em250818-1-700k&t=22&akid=6155%2E6688874%2EnW8maz)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-sherrod.r_rbMD&refcode=em250818-1-700k&t=23&akid=6155%2E6688874%2EnW8maz)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-sherrod.lVOa3f&refcode=em250818-1-700k&t=24&akid=6155%2E6688874%2EnW8maz)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-sherrod.SrfeT6&refcode=em250818-1-700k&t=25&akid=6155%2E6688874%2EnW8maz)**
---
****
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
And what if I told you that we’ve got a critical fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight, and it is absolutely essential that we hit our goals?
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
[**I’m personally asking, my friend: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $3 now – split between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrod.536Arw&refcode=em250818-1-700k&t=26&akid=6155%2E6688874%2EnW8maz)
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

clean_body: Our fight for the Dignity of Work continues. | | | = Friend, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s a government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. = I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep up this fight, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. Friend, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: = I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown | *

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.

This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.

When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won_.

Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.

**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**

**[_I’m personally asking, Derek: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now – split between my campaign and Mark Warner’s – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113534454/564096054/1885838768?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SBSplit_250818_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDUyMzAxOC00MTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORH6VzyOuVKtPqWFsRW-zDipApAipDJt3kpE1m8mtUY=)**

Thank you for standing with me.

In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113534455/564096055/1885838768?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SBSplit_250818_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDUyMzAxOC00MTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORH6VzyOuVKtPqWFsRW-zDipApAipDJt3kpE1m8mtUY=)****

name: Navy Seal Adam Schwarze
subject: They think we’re assholes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
This woman may not technically speak for the Democrat Party, but she has captured the essence of what her fellow members of Congress believe. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=31848531c5fd43c5899ba1e0fa8ce0e8&_e=QtAp1QeuhFECqltSv9qbKRSCgqiA-u8NdYtk9H_1YShImum1k08FRRtBf6aARsY_kJeaoZ2DrNjrtgeJAExyeCU7TRhbQk3S5FeyPjH9jeAKWMLpjXkOgqDWYS5TJA5WkdIL-gR4gC2wPLcm2byV4KJrDc-WLMvmAZnsXMyRcyYZoP-LG5xFmxmLdMcFN0eDh4eunv2PIBilmD9uOej9u8P3v2wrGz33UW3pzCGN3ZTg95CpwmT9z-KfMsu76a0T5ct4KiP7iK7DPoXVsHmA7_MbutQSJ_2UjCn4wsV_mLRWianqvJ3TAS7c01uv65z8SN54sCLRchZIaWmjD5ZGnHo0TTLDpHu60xTtMhNXscKSPsmaeHrZGvoJs3jIlPbPuIw7aFJkAYUwKEg_vva4BW2DaTUgX320x6HU2lX__jEkinJplDeic3JFmgNH86ABLQB4whjq_66x4h7AaW_k3xu8oSYAQrgzDIyxEidJ541XBDXsbC3hg5xBMKp-pLLSUjB7n9Y7c0Nb6X1a0UOilosKsbg48g575JtBhvLdsTyT8mmt2yWAblMal1XABGVoVQu0URCExJa2UqivahaW1WavKIXGnF9VucssMtiIfA-_P2UL-INhVfAqC2VaJIX2XZP_qVfmXlENNdFWmSIiXDAYkfazC_SYMzTHXCUs_F5p444LqFFj1Udm2tE5A2G15acRozzyEmWdYZ_5QXPOvo1yTxlC_Php92dI93vPV94Y7EnZuTx610MFjkXm8ZFK)

---
Fellow Conservative,

_**“Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.”**_

Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values.

They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it.

**As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions.** And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day.

That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota — not to yell or mock, but to**fight with discipline, humility, and relentless purpose.**

I didn’t plan on entering politics. But the more I came home from deployment, the more I saw a Minnesota I didn’t recognize. Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor — the person I’m running against — isn’t just radically out of step with our values; she embodies the same hard-left extremism that’s trying to rewrite our entire society.

While Walz called for calm in 2020, she was preparing a lawsuit against the Minneapolis Police. As crime soared and businesses burned, she blamed the people trying to hold the line. These are the people in charge now — and they’re not moderating.

**You can close this email and forget my name. Or you can help send the second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate — someone trained for chaos, unafraid of the fight, and grounded in service, not ego. **

But he sees what's happening in Washington, and he's called to jump back in the fight. He's the exact leader we need at this moment. Sherrod has spent his life fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you come from, or what kind of work you do. Right now, this principle is under threat. Billionaires and corporations are profiting like never before – while workers and everyday people are struggling just to make ends meet. The system is rigged in favor of the wealthiest among us, and Sherrod is running to change that. **If there's one thing I know about Sherrod, it's that he never backs down from a tough fight. But this is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races on the map in 2026, and he needs to build a massive grassroots movement to win.** [**I'm grateful to have you on my team, and now I'm asking you to be on Sherrod's. name: Mikie Sherrill HQ
subject: not the headline we wanted to see
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Peter, did you see this headline?
Peter, did you see this headline?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93720?refcode=em20250818-9273&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9273%2E614464%2EoWr87P)
**One poll after another shows our MAGA opponent catching up to us in this election.**
**[This race is closer than ever, Peter — and if we continue to let Jack Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered, he has a real chance of pulling ahead. Can you split a donation between Mikie’s campaign and Heartland Patriots today to help us fight back?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93720?refcode=em20250818-9273&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9273%2E614464%2EoWr87P)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93720?refcode=em20250818-9273&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9273%2E614464%2EoWr87P)**
Peter, New Jersey is not the safe Democratic state we once thought it was — in fact, it’s far from it. The last governor’s election here? It was decided by 3%. New Jersey’s margin in the 2024 presidential election? 6%. And some of the early polling in this race? **_A statistical tie._**
Right now, my opponent is flooding the zone all over New Jersey with false attacks on my record and our vision for New Jersey. **And the scary reality is that these attacks work if they go unanswered.**
But we also know this: when undecided voters learn who Mikie is, what she stands for, and how her policy priorities differ from her MAGA opponent’s, **_she earns their support._**
**[Peter, can you help us gather the resources we need and split a donation between Mikie’s campaign and Heartland Patriots to fight back against our opponent’s attacks and spread our message to undecided voters? clean_body: Peter, did you see this headline? Peter, did you see this headline? One poll after another shows our MAGA opponent catching up to us in this election. Peter, New Jersey is not the safe Democratic state we once thought it was — in fact, it’s far from it. The last governor’s election here? It was decided by 3%. New Jersey’s margin in the 2024 presidential election? 6%. And some of the early polling in this race? A statistical tie. Right now, my opponent is flooding the zone all over New Jersey with false attacks on my record and our vision for New Jersey. And the scary reality is that these attacks work if they go unanswered. But we also know this: when undecided voters learn who Mikie is, what she stands for, and how her policy priorities differ from her MAGA opponent’s, she earns their support. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Our fight for the Dignity of Work continues.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538322/564108079/-529377601?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.18_Sherrod-Brown-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjlkZWNmZS00NDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lDlw6l0uWPYPEkLB0urBCkyVJFNGB1RP5LHeVzZuGPQ=) I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. **That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.** [**_Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between Kirsten GIllibrand and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538323/564108080/-529377601?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.18_Sherrod-Brown-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjlkZWNmZS00NDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lDlw6l0uWPYPEkLB0urBCkyVJFNGB1RP5LHeVzZuGPQ=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538324/564108081/-529377601?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.18_Sherrod-Brown-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjlkZWNmZS00NDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lDlw6l0uWPYPEkLB0urBCkyVJFNGB1RP5LHeVzZuGPQ=)

I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
[**_Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $10 or $25 now, split between Kirsten Gillibrand and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. clean_body: Our fight for the Dignity of Work continues. = I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown * =

When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538833/564110003/-237810689?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_SherrodSplit_250818_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWQ5NWVmZi00NTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aKjoO2cvFFYHn00ENM7cMvwh7QHGd2G4GDICnv3BCDs=) Team,

When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.

So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.

**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[_Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between the Ohio Dems and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.

This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.

When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won_.

Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.

**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**

**[_I’m personally asking: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $10 now – split between my campaign and the Ohio Dems' – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538841/564110011/-237810689?amount=10&refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_SherrodSplit_250818_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWQ5NWVmZi00NTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aKjoO2cvFFYHn00ENM7cMvwh7QHGd2G4GDICnv3BCDs=)**

Thank you for standing with me.

In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538842/564110012/-237810689?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_SherrodSplit_250818_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWQ5NWVmZi00NTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aKjoO2cvFFYHn00ENM7cMvwh7QHGd2G4GDICnv3BCDs=)**

name: Jerri Green
subject: I'm running for Governor of Tennessee. Day one of the movement starts now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Green For Governor - Hendrell Remus, Treasurer
body:
Together we can build a better Tennessee.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538844/564110016/2087614219?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzYwNDMxZS00NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4mnwM2u4Q-dZvrhTS6JoTU5c8IUy_I9t4XNcOKUhnXM=&emci=b9b71852-417c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a360431e-467c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=52142494)
Hi friend,
By now, you have probably heard the news. And yes, it's true - **I am running for Governor of Tennessee! **
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538845/564110017/1326533249?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzYwNDMxZS00NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4mnwM2u4Q-dZvrhTS6JoTU5c8IUy_I9t4XNcOKUhnXM=&emci=b9b71852-417c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a360431e-467c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=52142494)**
I am running because I believe our state deserves leadership rooted in:
**common sense not chaos,
compassion not cruelty,
and courage not cowardice. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538846/564110018/1843264678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzYwNDMxZS00NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4mnwM2u4Q-dZvrhTS6JoTU5c8IUy_I9t4XNcOKUhnXM=)
**I’m a mom, a public servant, and a lifelong Tennessean.** I was born in Memphis, I studied in Knoxville, and I began my career in Nashville before returning home to start my family and start giving back to the place that made me. I know what Tennesseeans need, I understand our shared values, and I know we’re ready for change.
**I’ve spent my life fighting on the front lines for working families** , so I know what Tennesseans are facing. From being a public defender to being a Councilwoman, I have seen up close how this state is failing those who need our help the most. Whether it’s the rising cost of living, attacks on our freedoms, or urban schools and rural hospitals being left behind, we deserve better.
**Whether you’re a TN voter or watching from outside Tennessee, here’s why this matters:** what happens in Tennessee doesn’t stay here. From ensuring reproductive rights to fighting for common sense gun reforms to protecting our environment, we are on the front lines of national battles—and what we do here can ripple far beyond our borders.
**We’re likely up against one of the most extreme voices in American politics.** The other side is proposing career politicians who put partisanship over people. But with your help, we can beat whoever they throw at us.
If you believe in a Tennessee—and an America—that works for all of us, **I’d be honored to have your support. **[**This campaign isn’t fueled by special interests and political insiders. It’s powered by people—people like you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538847/564110019/1843264678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzYwNDMxZS00NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4mnwM2u4Q-dZvrhTS6JoTU5c8IUy_I9t4XNcOKUhnXM=)
We have _big goals_ and need funds to help us get there. While we ramp up this campaign I hope you will consider making a contribution to help us build the momentum we need. And don't worry, volunteer opportunities are just around the corner - so stay tuned!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538848/564110020/1843264678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzYwNDMxZS00NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4mnwM2u4Q-dZvrhTS6JoTU5c8IUy_I9t4XNcOKUhnXM=)
A final note, **THANK YOU!** I am so grateful for all the kind words of support I have received already. I truly could not take this leap of faith without having so many of you believe with me that **we can build a better Tennessee together.**
Jerri Green

clean_body: Together we can build a better Tennessee. Hi friend, By now, you have probably heard the news. And yes, it's true - I am running for Governor of Tennessee! I am running because I believe our state deserves leadership rooted in: common sense not chaos, compassion not cruelty, and courage not cowardice. = I’m a mom, a public servant, and a lifelong Tennessean. I was born in Memphis, I studied in Knoxville, and I began my career in Nashville before returning home to start my family and start giving back to the place that made me. I know what Tennesseeans need, I understand our shared values, and I know we’re ready for change. I’ve spent my life fighting on the front lines for working families , so I know what Tennesseans are facing. From being a public defender to being a Councilwoman, I have seen up close how this state is failing those who need our help the most. Whether it’s the rising cost of living, attacks on our freedoms, or urban schools and rural hospitals being left behind, we deserve better. Whether you’re a TN voter or watching from outside Tennessee, here’s why this matters: what happens in Tennessee doesn’t stay here. From ensuring reproductive rights to fighting for common sense gun reforms to protecting our environment, we are on the front lines of national battles—and what we do here can ripple far beyond our borders. We’re likely up against one of the most extreme voices in American politics. The other side is proposing career politicians who put partisanship over people. But with your help, we can beat whoever they throw at us. If you believe in a Tennessee—and an America—that works for all of us, I’d be honored to have your support. = We have big goals and need funds to help us get there. While we ramp up this campaign I hope you will consider making a contribution to help us build the momentum we need. And don't worry, volunteer opportunities are just around the corner - so stay tuned! = A final note, THANK YOU! I am so grateful for all the kind words of support I have received already. I truly could not take this leap of faith without having so many of you believe with me that we can build a better Tennessee together. Jerri Green #OneToughMother = | | Paid for by Green For Governor - Hendrell Remus, Treasurer. Green For Governor P.O. Box 40034 Memphis, TN 38174 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
