name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
| | |
---
Peter,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
[**Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Patty Murray and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538994/564110321/1546905256?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk541-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjYwNDMxZS00NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIU7uu719n7H1hVY9oMVQZGGKHxbKUemyjNmAJlLcGI=)
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable.
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
**[Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $25 or $5 now, split between Patty Murray and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113538995/564110322/1546905256?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk541-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjYwNDMxZS00NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIU7uu719n7H1hVY9oMVQZGGKHxbKUemyjNmAJlLcGI=)**
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=A2%2Fzz0hUKzafVMseZ4rpp6mrf9PCczuc1OUipJb483GAEnWttVUSlMx4E0kNJBbyNyW9hfo%2B9GgyMgxgeWxRDkElUdoYmbVyHM08onyQTHy6X5BMBTiEchinMxLsoH%2Ft5UTO0nTJK2%2FzunQJthjXZywzIu9sQvg16Xsrz3VU4M1UJd0Fw24HhfYrcC%2FdUJ8%2FuC9U7WaynMa2MFRlHey4yiYm1xn3Lxr7eWZZyP1eyGmVIl90W8zuO%2BYqFWloCK3S0l0ZKJeA0kgHAFDQjmjHE4fz11kSpo6ZwM0FZwmoT4cuABJMbeEJ0hv1xjjhR1Mvg%2BJN1gtO6XyCHtAuVhbBdBPQRZMfAHMHX%2BPRSXOm1dZv7QWFoatoyvDEdxDqyMxLRqFtbFvfp5R1Y5Pg1Bu4HiufojTA32QkiHozGe%2Bfwv8u56SWlZx3QI7VZqMkFLRM) People for Patty Murray
PO BOX 3662
Seattle, WA 98124
United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m back, Derek
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
---
Derek: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind — while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. **That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.** [**Will you chip in $10 or more now — split between the DNC and me — to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?refcode=em_20250818_4061_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4360_22930333_5F1T1n&akid=4360%2E22930333%2E5F1T1n) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Sherrod Brown and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250818_4061_fr&refcode2=4360_22930333_5F1T1n&akid=4360%2E22930333%2E5F1T1n)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250818_4061_fr&refcode2=4360_22930333_5F1T1n&akid=4360%2E22930333%2E5F1T1n)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20250818_4061_fr&refcode2=4360_22930333_5F1T1n&akid=4360%2E22930333%2E5F1T1n)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250818_4061_fr&refcode2=4360_22930333_5F1T1n&akid=4360%2E22930333%2E5F1T1n)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250818_4061_fr&refcode2=4360_22930333_5F1T1n&akid=4360%2E22930333%2E5F1T1n)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?refcode=em_20250818_4061_fr&refcode2=4360_22930333_5F1T1n&akid=4360%2E22930333%2E5F1T1n)**
---
****
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for — and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life — but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
[**I’m personally asking, Derek: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $10 now — split between my campaign and the DNC — to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-brown-split?refcode=em_20250818_4061_fr&amount=10&refcode2=4360_22930333_5F1T1n&akid=4360%2E22930333%2E5F1T1n)**

Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: MAGA HQ
subject: Wish Karoline a Happy MAGA Birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
From the White House to the front lines — tell her you’re with her.

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc2ulmhnd1icnufi7sui4niqptujvha83qh4mn0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm2pb4clh2bs)
---

Friend,

_The media attacked her. The Left tried to silence her. Yet, Karoline Leavitt stands tall._

Karoline Leavitt has taken every arrow from the radical Left and stood her ground **for you** , for **our movement** , and **for the future of this country.**

**Now, for her birthday, we have the chance to send her something the Left can 't ignore** -- _thousands of patriots standing shoulder to shoulder behind her._

We're collecting thousands of signatures from across the nation to deliver a message she'll never forget - _**[can we count on you to be one of them?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6ecmtqhj9cilq45hdg38m8dceoiuqft4hgbthag_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm2pb4clh2bs "can we count on you to be one of them?")**_
**[Dear Karoline Leavitt,](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk3k15uvagbtnp0d64p8sdi9g82qfuanlgmm0qvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm2pb4clh2bs "Dear Karoline Leavitt,") **

[From](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z50e3p804hd94slkoreehc0gcjfsotl7iv99cgl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm2pb4clh2bs "From") **[making history as the youngest White House Press Secretary](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbssgl660s38sgkh2tagei7em6bvt5ecledem70o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm2pb4clh2bs "making history as the youngest White House Press Secretary")** [to](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl4jkcrav71fohdqdbssr16vgjnnf10vcj9b4nl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm2pb4clh2bs "to") **[going toe-to-toe with the media, Democrats, and the D.C. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250818_1_brown?refcode=em20250818-1914&amount=5&refcode2=1914_582294_MTSxed&akid=1914%2E582294%2EMTSxed)
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
[**Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Chris Pappas and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250818_1_brown?refcode=em20250818-1914&amount=5&refcode2=1914_582294_MTSxed&akid=1914%2E582294%2EMTSxed)
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
[**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $5 now, split between Chris Pappas and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250818_1_brown?refcode=em20250818-1914&amount=5&refcode2=1914_582294_MTSxed&akid=1914%2E582294%2EMTSxed)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250818_1_brown?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-1914&refcode2=1914_582294_MTSxed&akid=1914%2E582294%2EMTSxed)**
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250818-1?t=1&refcode2=1914_582294_MTSxed&akid=1914%2E582294%2EMTSxed)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1914%2E582294%2EMTSxed)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1914%2E582294%2EMTSxed)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1914%2E582294%2EMTSxed)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m personally asking, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
#

Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.**[**Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Ruben Gallego and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.7OMOGL&refcode=em250818-1-160&t=1&akid=3939%2E734936%2E0Wp3nz)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1061?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.LLiI8s&refcode=em250818-1-160&t=20&akid=3939%2E734936%2E0Wp3nz)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.7xqKyD&refcode=em250818-1-160&t=21&akid=3939%2E734936%2E0Wp3nz)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.0tb70D&refcode=em250818-1-160&t=22&akid=3939%2E734936%2E0Wp3nz)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-sherrod._5zBdo&refcode=em250818-1-160&t=23&akid=3939%2E734936%2E0Wp3nz)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.lcGG78&refcode=em250818-1-160&t=24&akid=3939%2E734936%2E0Wp3nz)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.g19Ztd&refcode=em250818-1-160&t=25&akid=3939%2E734936%2E0Wp3nz)**
---
****
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
[**I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now – split between my campaign and Ruben Gallego’s – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sherrod.7OMOGL&refcode=em250818-1-160&t=26&akid=3939%2E734936%2E0Wp3nz)
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Wanted to make sure you saw this from Jimmy Kimmel:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi, it’s Gabby Giffords. I wanted to make sure you saw this message from Jimmy Kimmel.
As I write this, GIFFORDS is organizing across the country to hold Republicans in Congress accountable. If Republicans choose to put Donald Trump and gun lobbyists over public safety, then we will vote them out of office.
[**I hope you’ll read Jimmy’s message below, then rush a donation so GIFFORDS PAC can continue this work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=1&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)

_\---------- Begin forwarded message ---------
From: Jimmy Kimmel
Subject Will you support my friends at GIFFORDS PAC today?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com _
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=2&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)
---
Hi there, Jimmy Kimmel here.
I know you’re used to seeing me on your TV screen, but today I’m reaching out to you about an important topic close to my heart: _ending America’s gun violence crisis._
Gun violence isn’t always in the headlines, and it can be far too easy for us to go about our daily lives and forget that it’s happening each and every day. But for the families who now have empty seats at their dinner table -- like the families who lost a child in Newtown, Parkland, or Uvalde -- they can never, ever forget.
[**GIFFORDS is doing lifesaving work at the forefront of the gun safety movement, and I'm proud to be an ambassador for this incredible organization. Will you join me today in supporting GIFFORDS PAC by making a contribution to support their crucial work?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=3&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=4&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)**
Gun violence is a uniquely American epidemic. The leading cause of death for children in our nation is gun violence.
This is the only developed country in the world where this happens. We have to do something to change this.
Laws such as universal background checks, safe storage laws, and extreme risk protection orders would help ensure that guns can’t fall into the hands of people who shouldn’t have access to them. We call these laws common sense because that’s just what they are -- common sense.
It is long past time for our representatives to do their job and truly represent the American people. The majority of Americans support commonsense gun safety legislation._**But instead, the Trump administration is focused on making guns *even easier* to buy and lining the pockets of his gun lobby allies.**_
[**This is not a moment where we can sit back. We must be loud and use our collective voice to make a change. So please, will you make a commitment to ending our nation’s gun violence crisis by donating $3 to my friends at GIFFORDS PAC today? Your support at this moment is crucial:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=5&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&amount=3&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=24&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-aug25.8KHFUP&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=25&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-aug25.J5-c7V&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=26&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-aug25.DZaPyu&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=27&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-aug25.Yj6wVz&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=28&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=29&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)**
---
****
Thanks for standing with me and the GIFFORDS team today. Your support is crucial to our ongoing fight to end gun violence.
\- Jimmy Kimmel
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250818-1-b&t=30&akid=10794%2E3935704%2EvkAu9p)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Sherrod Brown is running in Ohio

| | My friend Sherrod Brown just announced he's jumping into the race for Senate in Ohio, and I'm thrilled to have him back in the fight. **Sherrod was one of the most effective and relentless champions for working families we've ever had in the Senate.** He's never been afraid to roll up his sleeves and take on the powerful. He's always fought for the Dignity of Work. He's fought to save pensions for millions of workers, taken on Big Pharma to slash the cost of insulin, worked to hold Wall Street accountable, protect reproductive freedom, and defend our democracy. And when corporate lobbyists and right-wing billionaires try to rig the system and gamble with our future, Sherrod is the guy who plants himself in their path. This race is about more than just Ohio — **it's about America's future and this seat is a must-win if we're going to take back the Democratic Senate Majority.** Sherrod never backs down from a tough race, and we know the GOP and their dark-money allies are going to spend whatever it takes to stop him. [**That's why I'm asking you: Will you split a donation between my campaign and Sherrod's today to help Sherrod launch his Senate campaign strong and fight back against the flood of corporate cash coming his way?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113539882/564112789/-1362710102?refcode=2025-08-18-sherrodmerkley&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=46eba532-487c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmViYTUzMi00ODdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DsTy4LZAWkgRJrwStJFz4vgAPUv4G161CvByQCS9G04=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your split contribution to Sherrod Brown and Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250818_1_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-3872&refcode2=3872_400544_jcZeNE&akid=3872%2E400544%2EjcZeNE)
It's Sherrod Brown.
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
**[Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Deb Haaland and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250818_1_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-3872&refcode2=3872_400544_jcZeNE&akid=3872%2E400544%2EjcZeNE)**
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price.
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
[**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $5 now, split between Deb Haaland and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250818_1_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-3872&refcode2=3872_400544_jcZeNE&akid=3872%2E400544%2EjcZeNE)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250818_1_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-3872&refcode2=3872_400544_jcZeNE&akid=3872%2E400544%2EjcZeNE)**
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=1&akid=3872%2E400544%2EjcZeNE)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=2&akid=3872%2E400544%2EjcZeNE)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Tim Walz
subject: Hi there. It’s Coach Walz.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?refcode=&amount=]Hey there – it’s Tim Walz here.
Last year, I was honored to serve as Vice Presidential nominee to California’s own Kamala Harris.
And during that campaign, I spent several months traveling the country, and listening to folks from coast to coast as they discussed the most important issues to them and their communities, and how they wanted their representatives to address those issues.
I can tell you one thing : What they don’t want is a President who deploys the military to patrol their neighborhoods and threatens to jail an elected Governor when he objects. Yet that is exactly what Donald Trump did in California.
He’s afraid of California because he sees the momentum here. He knows that you all flipped three seats from red to blue in 2024. He knows that with the right energy and resources you all could elect a Democratic House that would hold him accountable and stop this madness. He wants to crush your spirit, but I’ve seen your passion and I’m guessing you’re still in this fight. If I’m right, will you rush a donation of $ or more now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?&refcode=&amount=]I recently spoke at the California Democratic Party’s convention because I see the stakes .
On the convention stage, I said, “In 2026, we will take back the House Majority — and it goes right through California . Our fight is now. Everybody is going to need to be on the field.”
I meant every word. And now they echo even truer today with Donald Trump’s relentless attacks on California and your governor.
In response, the California Democratic Party is looking to scale up their organizing program sooner than expected to meet this moment and jumpstart their proven campaign strategy that won so many nail-biter races in 2024.
I am fully supportive of this idea. But it means they’ll need to raise some extra cash that isn’t in the budget right now.
While the GOP has Elon Musk to write big checks (he even sent $1,000,000 to one key California Republican in 2024), the Democrats count on grassroots donors like you.
Will you join me in supporting our mission to retake the U.S. House and finally put some guardrails on Trump by making a contribution towards their organizing efforts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-august25?refcode=&amount=]

And during that campaign, I spent several months traveling the country, and listening to folks from coast to coast as they discussed the most important issues to them and their communities, and how they wanted their representatives to address those issues. I can tell you one thing : What they don’t want is a President who deploys the military to patrol their neighborhoods and threatens to jail an elected Governor when he objects. Yet that is exactly what Donald Trump did in California. He’s afraid of California because he sees the momentum here. He knows that you all flipped three seats from red to blue in 2024. He knows that with the right energy and resources you all could elect a Democratic House that would hold him accountable and stop this madness. He wants to crush your spirit, but I’ve seen your passion and I’m guessing you’re still in this fight. If I’m right, will you rush a donation of $ or more now? [=] CHIP IN $ >> [ recently spoke at the California Democratic Party’s convention because I see the stakes . On the convention stage, I said, “In 2026, we will take back the House Majority — and it goes right through California . Our fight is now. Everybody is going to need to be on the field.” I meant every word. And now they echo even truer today with Donald Trump’s relentless attacks on California and your governor. In response, the California Democratic Party is looking to scale up their organizing program sooner than expected to meet this moment and jumpstart their proven campaign strategy that won so many nail-biter races in 2024. I am fully supportive of this idea. But it means they’ll need to raise some extra cash that isn’t in the budget right now. While the GOP has Elon Musk to write big checks (he even sent $1,000,000 to one key California Republican in 2024), the Democrats count on grassroots donors like you. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Trump said it this morning:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
ABC: Trump says he will lead 'movement' to end mail-in voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081825_1&amount=25]
Our time in the barrel has come, Team .
President Donald Trump said just hours ago that he will lead a "movement" to get rid of mail-in ballots and voting machines , falsely claiming that they lead to voter fraud.
Word for lying word: " I am going to lead a movement to get rid of MAIL-IN BALLOTS, and also, while we're at it, Highly 'Inaccurate,' Very Expensive, and Seriously Controversial VOTING MACHINES, which cost Ten Times more than accurate and sophisticated Watermark Paper, which is faster, and leaves NO DOUBT, at the end of the evening, as to who WON, and who LOST, the Election. "
How is Trump going to do this? He's signing an executive order ahead of next year's critical midterms. Is this just another attempt to distract from a failing economy, rising prices, and his role in the Epstein scandal? Probably, yes. Are we going to fight him tooth and nail? You betcha.
We're going to work in the states to defend our access to cast ballots, as they run elections. We're going to petition members of Congress to stop harmful bills that might attempt to back up this executive order. And we're going to do everything we can to support the efforts to stop this in court.
We'll be blunt: We still need your help to protect our fundamental right to vote. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081825_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=35]
Trump has long lied about mail-in voting. He's claimed mail-in voting contributed to his 2020 election loss, though no widespread fraud has been found. In fact, the one case of mail-in ballot fraud in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election was a man who was prosecuted for returning his dead mother's ballot for Trump .
We all know just how safe and secure mail-in voting is. It's use dates back to the Civil War. The use of mail-in voting has become very common across the country and study after study has shown that fraud in mail-ballot voting is rare. There are also several safeguards in place nationwide to protect against fraud, including signature requirements and barcodes to track envelopes sent by officials. States have spent tens of millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing.
Being blunt: There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access. There is no good-faith reason to end the use of mail-in voting, or do the other things in this forthcoming executive order or his previous one attacking vote-by-mail. Just like the wave of redistricting efforts in Texas, Florida, and beyond -- this is a partisan voter suppression exercise meant to codify MAGA's power in perpetuity and end our democracy.
Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Help us fight back with $25 or whatever you can to protect mail-in voting and stop their suppressive policies >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081825_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081825_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081825_1&amount=20]

I need you in my corner from day one. | Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind — while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. **That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[Will you chip in $10 or more now — split between Roy Cooper and me — to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113540862/564115071/-560866146?amount=10&refcode=ea.1f50608f-4b7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.1f50608f-4b7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjUwNjA4Zi00YjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Svd-n9aqoxlN-pl3PWqtoReIQlt2pYe-pEkmLOnDaqM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Sherrod Brown and Roy Cooper:_ | [SPLIT $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113540863/564115072/-560866146?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.1f50608f-4b7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.1f50608f-4b7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjUwNjA4Zi00YjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Svd-n9aqoxlN-pl3PWqtoReIQlt2pYe-pEkmLOnDaqM=)

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for — and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won._ When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won._
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life — but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $10 now — split between my campaign and Roy Cooper’s — to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113540869/564115078/-560866146?amount=10&refcode=ea.1f50608f-4b7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.1f50608f-4b7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjUwNjA4Zi00YjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Svd-n9aqoxlN-pl3PWqtoReIQlt2pYe-pEkmLOnDaqM=)**
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

clean_body: I need you in my corner from day one. | Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind — while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Sherrod Brown and Roy Cooper: | = = = = = = I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do. This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for — and who you’re willing to stand up to. When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won._ Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life — but I need you in my corner from day one. Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support. = Thank you for standing with me. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.

Derek, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. **That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.** [**Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Chris Deluzio and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113541530/564117701/191012194?refcode=email_081825_Brown-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjZiODQ2NC00YzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2Ybbymd7e0MnWtIst3TIslclIud_QGxhBG6e2sdjJc=) I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._ Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. **Derek, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:** [**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $10 or $5 now, split between Chris Deluzio and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113541532/564117703/191012194?refcode=email_081825_Brown-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjZiODQ2NC00YzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2Ybbymd7e0MnWtIst3TIslclIud_QGxhBG6e2sdjJc=) I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown
---

| Donald Trump and his extremist allies have made it clear that they believe they’re above the law.

I’m not letting that go unchallenged.

Since Trump took office, I’ve introduced bills to:

**📃 **Hold Elon Musk’s DOGE cronies accountable for conflicts of interest and misuse of taxpayer dollars.

**📃 **Install an independent Inspector General in the Executive Office of the President to investigate misconduct and stop abuses of power before they spiral.

**📃 **Protect the Commissioner of Labor Statistics from politically motivated firings so presidents can’t rewrite economic facts to fit their politics.

These are common-sense, pro-democracy reforms that put the people back in charge instead of billionaires, political insiders, and corrupt presidents.

**But here’s the hard truth:**

We can’t pass these bills until we take back the House from the extremists who are blocking accountability at every turn.

That starts right here in West Michigan. It means holding this seat and building the path to a new House majority.

[_**Every grassroots donation helps us fight back, win here, and elect the allies we need to get these reforms across the finish line. I never planned to run for office again. But I see what's happening in Washington, and I can't sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that's a job that I know I can do.

This isn't about left versus right. It's about who you fight for – and who you're willing to stand up to.

When Wall Street gambled away the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up for Ohioans and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won_.

Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.

**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**

**[I'm personally asking: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now – split between my campaign and the DSCC – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21967?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250818-SherrodBrown-BrownLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250818-SherrodBrown-BrownLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21016%2E9716520%2Edew194)**

Thank you for standing with me.

In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21967?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250818-SherrodBrown-BrownLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250818-SherrodBrown-BrownLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21016%2E9716520%2Edew194)

Sherrod Brown is running the Senate to stand up to the chaos and recklessness in Washington and fight for Ohioans.

**[Chip in now to help elect Sherrod to the Senate and fight for every seat>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21967?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250818-SherrodBrown-BrownLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250818-SherrodBrown-BrownLaunchTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=21016%2E9716520%2Edew194)**

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what's happening in Washington, and I can't sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that's a job that I know I can do. This isn't about left versus right. It's about who you fight for - and who you're willing to stand up to. When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won_. Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life - but I need you in my corner from day one. **Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.** [**I 'm personally asking, friend,: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $25 now - split between my campaign and No Dem Left Behind**** - to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsod_HIntMODa7bxSw4HV0u1dNYKADQeIwO4hLWKg-b4DXy_ecZBx0S8O-6qIP3loSdRviHK6z53U6pojskmGy0Lg2pzLLKbLldUu78bACgMtTFSXNTIl-SX5ENvzncQs6-ZOR3MD32JZI7VmNzGMAtPLq2InEkdY8zitz-9OXMiTLwY8nb_LsUfFP1iEzDFdvfmYxgEXjGNQKsDM4hodbqdCNjY9VOW1ccm3zXcIO1ONAaVzkTqTAG2suJAofDNqW_fQFjxyNlY33YRMP5-3r6Wi3t6Xy_Pr1WkzECd4ba5OGynbVxZ5PKIXQY0OpAk13i2tLsG4CDgPHoB5t5qo8b/4j5/59cQWkBPTamngC6E78j0hw/h8/h001.v5zthlfwafXSn_5qYQ537NBkoxsck6N1u3sY1em4wis) Thank you for standing with me. name: Team Maxine
subject: Trump's smoke and mirrors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hey there, Peter,
Donald Trump is back at it with his same old smoke and mirrors. He’s distracting the American people to try to deflect from the Epstein files, the crashing economy, the brutal unemployment numbers, and his theft of our health care.
He pulled this stunt when he sent troops to California—and now he’s doing it all over again by trying to take over D.C.
Sending troops into Democratic states and cities isn’t about law and order. It’s not about keeping us safe...It’s about testing the limits—and seeing how far he can trample on states’ rights and existing law to keep himself and his allies in power.
So what can we do?
Maxine is doing everything she can to stand up to Trump and his allies in Congress. But we have a long fight ahead—and preparing for the 2026 elections starts now.
Will you stand with Maxine today? Your support will fuel this grassroots fight to keep Oregon’s voice strong and take back the House and Senate.
Please chip in whatever you can right now to keep this fight alive. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250818_distractions_act]

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: This is my story.
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8640e8d486f146859574e90a57ead42b&_e=UWivzXKZyoGMRwdTRui4j1sybQiqmOo9x7-O6r74qwbHnXqLhtMcLbjw66b7r3ttbLKbmeq9KMStLVLEHZCrBG5tRLTABybn0hLZsTeyVxbkOH0Ks_R6bahlnKBIhMfzWxB3eMK064MW6HH0K-eOeGrGvWByvcQsFWzUe2X2LWqWzGzaGybOWJsfX9WehLNWhWay4Gt3ZnQkj8V2GAVxBsoEFynOW8YaHzc4fkYNelhqx6QknD0qRBwyO-LDn0pqR1piWc9852k_HQDIbQtJSobb3jE2hMfZ2ieLKpCaOH2AGMMFI5122kdn-8j1lC_m-GqCYvXJ_SCkVuMrtqCsyg7t9PkAYzpzlDdGOyWvNFRNj97qttCCt5LKt2QgJZQ74P6VLPcyn3ak_aGVpv3QOTKg6ZfFxByP6XHJ-ec6pDMP4sF1IRH-WjS2qixwf7QIdFQghQXwoadMWcFygIelzoITv_rvStsU1j0LCjPVLJ74MOdJ-oAB4UkyAotcQdjMwjCDlstAfMhggBQdgBcOA_BSEyvf9mNZuk-O3wWytGdmW5Hu0sceLeql2JqaIXg3l7seP4cE8zejp3eWL2RhwBAfdlqPGJh4ArRNnMss9HJM0jITB9A0MPdXncwUspiS-ww9tXmFgKU8VEmIrg-K5hBSWfxeQxc6FF4BL5pfCwQ%3D)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8640e8d486f146859574e90a57ead42b&_e=UWivzXKZyoGMRwdTRui4j1sybQiqmOo9x7-O6r74qwbHnXqLhtMcLbjw66b7r3ttbLKbmeq9KMStLVLEHZCrBG5tRLTABybn0hLZsTeyVxbkOH0Ks_R6bahlnKBIhMfzWxB3eMK064MW6HH0K-eOeGrGvWByvcQsFWzUe2X2LWqWzGzaGybOWJsfX9WehLNWhWay4Gt3ZnQkj8V2GAVxBsoEFynOW8YaHzc4fkYNelhUa5LNe62_jrCqjkzMt9rP0sor9QLkr6gZ1xlfZshzwRhmZwYU-zEwE6_1OLzliVlAtyCvky8bcTQanP8CoPMEleoUW_yua8Dbmwf58YWS8pQkr9y7nq7ne4Qb_JupeG8fZjbxnD9cevEf9OmnN8sGU7hzq1s8vJN-zxD4MVhB0BHk1RUj9OZDPFGi8_kTvYEQm1eB79NVHFLk566_b1EMzZDJ8deiuPK_eXrpqi3_MhlDlTmgMx7kkDICZ7VjhgbcpEED3Htu8wv41yM6ORyrUF9WeQ6JieR7AHiGZkAk3Kf37BG_YEnU7BuoGp8OaOOJ-tlG3Ufc7uWzrehtGFeg1ucpfds0qSR6Aljs1gsvn2YLc82rqcvcWYYnZcHFemZuXH04J7JLxuBFiThfGpcKb5RkeNhMHtXU8YP2Gemf-K99JjdfK3uX8gd6kE967kI%3D)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8640e8d486f146859574e90a57ead42b&_e=UWivzXKZyoGMRwdTRui4j1sybQiqmOo9x7-O6r74qwbHnXqLhtMcLbjw66b7r3ttbLKbmeq9KMStLVLEHZCrBG5tRLTABybn0hLZsTeyVxbkOH0Ks_R6bahlnKBIhMfzWxB3eMK064MW6HH0K-eOeGrGvWByvcQsFWzUe2X2LWqWzGzaGybOWJsfX9WehLNWhWay4Gt3ZnQkj8V2GAVxBsoEFynOW8YaHzc4fkYNeljydGfpk1IbXqMsgLvJ2bVkGorNudBr5F1SPGnBvRHB-Uim9rKYunkeJS4WAubHefXmwpP37mPD2lKjKMBjSOBuTvXCLjdpc4h6WonRvPRpU8c38sSwTrc_uK2qjaSrF_XDIatestxEKt0cNuBTQ5khrox3zGJow5pDmPSGvtH0OtkoE2CCqhdbn9_0wSQG8T4W6cukeerpJJ8BQYGGkKtLionJxex-kjyCxOLkibOh-JVW3nwgNUFf23yLKipLH8pXhPWQ-CmC86ja5iA_1AiFXTZO2qu4-kVIRF6O_IygJ1ZvvSWJ3V7yo51EWDc7La3TbS_6DTQ0hqEqSFlWcd8lxhzSi38URVVENnPhBM5clcQnub2k-qil8qWyA2wcDfKWbBI2hgvUNCzRPGen2vd_XrN3Ag7-Hzpd3h5cPNrHMlmepcDceyBukTkVIK2EdHc%3D)**

| [**CONTRIBUTE HERE**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8640e8d486f146859574e90a57ead42b&_e=UWivzXKZyoGMRwdTRui4j1sybQiqmOo9x7-O6r74qwbHnXqLhtMcLbjw66b7r3ttbLKbmeq9KMStLVLEHZCrBG5tRLTABybn0hLZsTeyVxbkOH0Ks_R6bahlnKBIhMfzWxB3eMK064MW6HH0K-eOeGrGvWByvcQsFWzUe2X2LWqWzGzaGybOWJsfX9WehLNWhWay4Gt3ZnQkj8V2GAVxBsoEFynOW8YaHzc4fkYNelg44FwssMNRA-QAAtRD9fFxEJ7VeCupBXiaQNgGD6brt_4yPNARgqVjMT4fQRk--Fc_HtU1zN-ngRKZTjBH6aJfV94-0_ej8I8cPCrb1Jggp2eUpLnmOT6cwlGNYLRExl7u3t0gCnVwkxwOGZADzgBUP1RW1-xbzM5vzVn5AduuBzQthxDcUDj2bfCDaabbCviYNDJFjXEPt30FJa1ZG-NBQQDdQL3eWSnsXxBKtNpfOyZy_RGnqxOCMOO4ubIPvkkWq1-UkSiA0LFEvooEsbNX3LDP6fQS1WerQ16DG4LHWbrycJMTR6XcPEYq0LzUmCtyiqKj-zG-t4SKytm3BWZoDmsd4t_WHgiuqjdwrsMeR3Z_Tjs6NykFncMjKNWYVuzMt1UxiXM0HNG37-iofbZZ9uTNfkWjh-d8dXOqpXGlRtf7NgkiUIaKJ-yNYVIGTro%3D)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8640e8d486f146859574e90a57ead42b&_e=UWivzXKZyoGMRwdTRui4j9HxanEkqwftS72tV428UyNvV0aFciCfLESe6g5uild0T-ZYJRitOIAVtagNcZAl5Btev0lGAQH4-KidauJr6EPrFclv_IzCfCtyOn0pcH5eiZLkQ-yrUKt0xeg2tvnRwL58s9X9ln5Q4vjENGddMUunawwQz7PUDLjTkwf0-aFpUdrC7olxVkvJ1no8p8inqEjcZv4w8_jCnBTwqcavAVnMA8pB_fv1vXTI0lGNfq4J2fxGcspI0Ft-aIhhJcznZ0TIZcAS-vTEjbyqIz7T-36iplExeWU8jgsZFRWI8yzcoD8L9HXwBAAZ2dR_3wcABYZcRCeiPg9kr0hv4Xx8C3I%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8640e8d486f146859574e90a57ead42b&_e=UWivzXKZyoGMRwdTRui4j1sybQiqmOo9x7-O6r74qwbHnXqLhtMcLbjw66b7r3ttbLKbmeq9KMStLVLEHZCrBG5tRLTABybn0hLZsTeyVxbkOH0Ks_R6bahlnKBIhMfzWxB3eMK064MW6HH0K-eOeGrGvWByvcQsFWzUe2X2LWqWzGzaGybOWJsfX9WehLNWhWay4Gt3ZnQkj8V2GAVxBsoEFynOW8YaHzc4fkYNelgJ-nb7DbOeOBfYzVwx1mVdfDVgP9yYCqKPBFmZXsW8vaAzPM_L2A7AWDKcZ4Vlvvn5FlocIu9qz4D0DTtMSuMzPznQzco0Nt_toKXqrXaoPiEBUCgU9BKNfdDuYlhRxF9PGsRRyupd7KMCa97d8yPL5XVL-vU0BhPHSPrf8QxvrPxpEADk9F4LpoZSeE7YCM2UvMrs3suaoGfRO-f_NDvmwHS08R9Xb94v5OG2g716ztpO8CsdxXtSZX-jzz8uSEelTOJIrR54zYWiPQNpFIUUp3WbJfce-p5Js17OwvEsq1bp43wWuNgbjR8Ipw55p2PzK42mF8aCQ3gBU-LiYMfncN3PmLm0j8Voi0ypEh3BGqDsg2qU2K1N0SMFmFXWzTSUCbjR5XtDrVJ69UXuIHrnG5b9hYs53YhnJfWy9WrTQYfXu_FFW22OZduYRPZUFkc%3D)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

clean_body: Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

name: Anabel, United We Dream
subject: This DACA anniversary serves as a reminder
body:
Mass delegalization efforts continue to target DACA recipients. We must take immediate action. | | | Peter, three days ago, we recognized an important anniversary: when the first DACA application was accepted into the landmark program. Together, we’ve defended DACA and our rights from anti-immigrant officials. But as ICE escalates its attacks on our communities, DACA recipients are facing aggressive threats, from unlawful detentions to demands to self-deport. **This is a wake-up call:****Congress must take immediate action to pass permanent protections NOW.** [**Scroll down to read Carolina’s email about what we’re up against and United We Dream’s response. Then, please chip in any amount so this vital work can continue.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeHd1VIQvbrJiu_yCLbM7G-x2Hj8NqlRfrkMpGW750OCPxBUlfzdMPqSVr-yDXuKa8GZH_xL6Fnm-DNzaCJGMJTacWjfutoV9b8tlvtPTgEdJrPhUHaodsAdFxQOHd01IhL9EOWqDh4iBEFbY_fjZXzRxqHdU70Nk5boorKF_UqfvI-lznRQ0vwlou4MHhX4rkGVsG8Ee66O83PmfWTdFx-3FVpJBRy9iLuQ1Mm3ADrIGfdbhqVGqjt7_ULB2kVntjikkurh3puX5RTe0WACQ02S_fSjfy6fjy8MbHq3ZoRO1mq_nvEe1yyxXGgm7B-fB3lxEUagD4FXCsr5yKCJRyv1xPVYRVL39e3TUAV-WAm9JoaX61HJvK1gsQ_4BNpPC8mG3kpF04kW7y8psysgffPXaqA8hzvpa7bjuQtr0_AYFPoq_Gou9UDEppoJGp_zEc88VEJ3DkOZQP_W1xnOl0uA/4j5/agAJl3lMRka_YrVOqzfkgA/h0/h001.gBmQBYcthgkUjs1b5q3b0Ch3bUIlKhMux_AupVmf15c) | | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeHd1VIQvbrJiu_yCLbM7G-x2Hj8NqlRfrkMpGW750OCPxBUlfzdMPqSVr-yDXuKa85W2ZOohDy5NfNIUlpdSENubIxDlPyoxGlvgSvSJ4Bqrs8EiEHdALm7149nQ_T0WvCrdPy7xLBAhAOtPKcpuf07upQf7qD7Xu7eTlL2htvVuY_xWyI3UOYB4x_3E15fhrax_AKKVc3XU-WqDnh5rti44N1_C5zNW6gY4QyrU4DlBvXuG5fhfmdam83PswwxZHXNg1f9IN4fyAZloHgsgV2a2hoS1cuh4YBZM5e_dGz4mNHQ3T4EMrr_-ENwrBCZGGDA766t888IHFa3-iEMS7_i6KjlpGbVIQzkXCiZ5osIgrstYPDlh2zSwWW-s-xBxs1QdlqQtewmt8_h2ywVmVRnBt271VW6TfIli0losi6NCpw56izQ5lbF3hQr4sfx-O/4j5/agAJl3lMRka_YrVOqzfkgA/h1/h001.rZl02MIr9pQFkd-E2uFiXJrCCIMB5GgXHyxIZNM5FqI)

It is us, united, who have defended this program, our communities, and our dignity.
As mass delegalization efforts continue to target DACA recipients, it is us who will stand together and demand Congress pass the _American Dream and Promise Act_ now!
Thank you for standing with us.
— Anabel, United We Dream
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Carolina, United We Dream
Date: Thursday, August 14, 2025
Subject: We fought for DACA. We’re still fighting for our home. _
Peter —
On August 15, 2012, the first DACA application was accepted. That milestone was born from years of organizing, hope, and determination by immigrant youth and our allies.
From that moment on, we have faced attack after attack from anti-immigrant politicians determined to rip our communities apart. But every single time, we have stood together, and we’re still here.
For 13 years, courageous immigrant youth, allies, and everyday neighbors have defended our right to live, work, and dream without fear. From the steps of the U.S. Supreme Court in 2020 to the 5th Circuit Court just last year, our resilience has kept DACA alive against all odds.
Now, those same forces are working to dismantle DACA piece by piece. They are cutting off access to education and health care, demanding self-deportation, rolling back tuition protections, and even investigating universities that support immigrant students. Without urgent Congressional action, DACA will be reduced to a shadow of what it once was.
DACA recipients contribute $648 billion to the economy and are vital members of our communities. They are doctors, teachers, neighbors, and parents. Over 250,000 U.S. citizen children have a parent protected by DACA. If DACA ends, countless people will lose their jobs, their families, and their futures.
We have defended our community for 13 years, and we can do it again, but only if we act now. **Congress must pass the American Dream and Promise Act** to provide permanent protections and stop the mass detentions and deportations.
[**Will you donate $10 or whatever you can to help us fight back? Your support powers legal battles, organizing, and the fight for immigrant youth everywhere.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeHd1VIQvbrJiu_yCLbM7G-x2Hj8NqlRfrkMpGW750OCPxBUlfzdMPqSVr-yDXuKa8GZH_xL6Fnm-DNzaCJGMJTaT4Ws16Lfg7IwvnwGAk1odL9tPrF2VL28AIohun4fmZZCg-KTrKrLuoqMoHO8p6lb7SuUkOl9T1bf-yuP8_iNt7FYpxDznXnZzYuqddFjrlG9NrKuBVdAHcS23ZD4Ss0ezW7jhGD15DBuA4AkHbOV9PZ8uX-S3mTYRw5yGgQxGtphwEBN1mS6lFic5LP1Ho_A_MVKg2K-llZYdCcMa35XWJyblIbKODpbIbMZynyE8_X1VkvlUf16ZZfgsqJLsqhAETOxCgniMb6lTM678aYv4kL3CEIyW1OkbW8sNNJIqzdvj92vJ4mBbWRpMxdjoVhmDl3lhMmoAiw7W-48_sN3EMPgBHQczVRFsjCYpVfBy_6KQxqEznVRWaN-cBXD0MDA/4j5/agAJl3lMRka_YrVOqzfkgA/h2/h001.Q9vW14dHlrlIZ5l3ObKL7CBE6wiieBtLTNsiXmepyr8)

clean_body: Mass delegalization efforts continue to target DACA recipients. We must take immediate action. | | | Peter, three days ago, we recognized an important anniversary: when the first DACA application was accepted into the landmark program. Together, we’ve defended DACA and our rights from anti-immigrant officials. But as ICE escalates its attacks on our communities, DACA recipients are facing aggressive threats, from unlawful detentions to demands to self-deport. This is a wake-up call:Congress must take immediate action to pass permanent protections NOW. | | It is us, united, who have defended this program, our communities, and our dignity. As mass delegalization efforts continue to target DACA recipients, it is us who will stand together and demand Congress pass the American Dream and Promise Act now! Thank you for standing with us. — Anabel, United We Dream \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Carolina, United We Dream Date: Thursday, August 14, 2025 Subject: We fought for DACA. We’re still fighting for our home. Peter — On August 15, 2012, the first DACA application was accepted. That milestone was born from years of organizing, hope, and determination by immigrant youth and our allies. From that moment on, we have faced attack after attack from anti-immigrant politicians determined to rip our communities apart. But every single time, we have stood together, and we’re still here. For 13 years, courageous immigrant youth, allies, and everyday neighbors have defended our right to live, work, and dream without fear. From the steps of the U.S. Supreme Court in 2020 to the 5th Circuit Court just last year, our resilience has kept DACA alive against all odds. Now, those same forces are working to dismantle DACA piece by piece. They are cutting off access to education and health care, demanding self-deportation, rolling back tuition protections, and even investigating universities that support immigrant students. Without urgent Congressional action, DACA will be reduced to a shadow of what it once was. DACA recipients contribute $648 billion to the economy and are vital members of our communities. They are doctors, teachers, neighbors, and parents. Over 250,000 U.S. citizen children have a parent protected by DACA. If DACA ends, countless people will lose their jobs, their families, and their futures. We have defended our community for 13 years, and we can do it again, but only if we act now. Congress must pass the American Dream and Promise Act to provide permanent protections and stop the mass detentions and deportations. Let’s prove it again.** With hope and determination, Carolina United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Emily Randall
subject: Hardball
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
The only way for Trump to keep control of Congress is to tilt the playing field in the middle of the game.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113544379/564127155/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.18_Redistrict_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzgyNmQ1MS00ZjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEOw8KydvXEXzJB7wj11u_shmGaclbYt_L9MgK_naXw=&emci=c4da7e56-777b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f3826d51-4f7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) | Peter, In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [_**make a donation of any amount to support our organizing in Washington, our efforts to flip our adopted swing district in Arizona, and our fight against the MAGA agenda in D.C.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113544380/564127156/1134054401?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.18_Redistrict_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzgyNmQ1MS00ZjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEOw8KydvXEXzJB7wj11u_shmGaclbYt_L9MgK_naXw=) But first, I want to talk about redistricting. What started as a Republican power grab in Texas has now spread nationwide. Trump is calling on legislators in every Republican-controlled state to redraw their district maps before the next election. He can’t campaign on his agenda or his disastrous, unpopular Big Bad Bill. The only way for him to keep control of Congress is to tilt the playing field in the middle of the game. **I want you to know: I won’t be silent about this. ** It’s long past time to start playing hardball. (Even my most well-mannered Democratic colleagues are waking up to this new reality!) They can stack the deck against us, but I know this team. We’ve never backed down from a challenge. Together, we won a race against impossible odds in 2018, beat back big money in 2022, and made history in 2024. **Can you chip in $10 now to support our organizing program to flip the House and deliver results for working people in 2026?** [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113544381/564127157/-1668850473?amount=10&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.18_Redistrict_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzgyNmQ1MS00ZjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEOw8KydvXEXzJB7wj11u_shmGaclbYt_L9MgK_naXw=) Thank you for everything you do 💙 – Emily

name: KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION
subject: Tomorrow’s Meeting: Will Johnson County Listen to Taxpayers?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a96020fa1f8f/tomorrows-meeting-will-johnson-county-listen-to-taxpayers?e=7320325a61)
---
[|
---](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=1c1c77dac7&e=7320325a61)
| | | | |
# Johnson County Families Deserve Relief, Not More Burden
---
[|
---](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=82ea84bf2a&e=7320325a61)
|
---
|

Dear Peter,
Tomorrow night, the County will hold its _Revenue Neutral_ hearing, a meeting that should be about protecting taxpayers. Instead, it’s shaping up to be yet another step toward **skyrocketing property taxes** on hardworking Johnson County families.
Let’s be clear: when government talks about exceeding “revenue neutral,” it’s really talking about taking more money out of your pocket. And right now, county leaders are pushing a budget that spends nearly **$1.9 billion** ...the largest in our history.
That is not sustainable. It’s not responsible. And it’s not fair to the families and small businesses already stretched thin by rising costs.
As your candidate for County Commission Chair, I will fight for a different path:

* **Living within our means** \- just like every family and business must do.
* **Cutting waste and bloated bureaucracy** \- so dollars go where they truly matter.
* **Protecting homeowners and businesses** \- from crushing property tax hikes.

I believe government should respect the taxpayers, not treat them like an endless source of revenue.
**But to get there, I need your help.** This campaign is about standing up for common sense, fiscal responsibility, and accountability and your support today will help us send a strong message before tomorrow’s meeting.
👉 [[Donate Today]](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=4ec4e6a471&e=7320325a61)
Thank you for standing with me in this fight. Together, we can put Johnson County back on the right track.
With gratitude,
**Karen Crnkovich**
Candidate for Johnson County Commission Chair

---

With gratitude, Karen Crnkovich** Candidate for Johnson County Commission Chair | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 PAID FOR BY KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION.
