subject: I need you to know something very important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv1tqk28c0l5oknhq02pvud633d2acr4fnu10t40_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm9o34chh2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znkmrgl78v9mmc850g9blhl0u1e2unc07cikqv7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm9o34chh2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmqmefqmf9otp82o4dvi7vsk7mfmde4pvc0jmsa0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm9o34chh2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr639hrf332lq2mea950943h7hfurnukaukvs7t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clgm9o34chh2bs)
---
Dinesh D’Souza

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kijewski for Michigan, 115 W Allegan St, Ste 900, Lansing, MI 48933_
body:
🇺🇸 Kevin Kijewski for Attorney General - August 18 Update 🇺🇸

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinformi/kevin-kijewski-for-attorney-general-august-18-update-hmsv7oeuvb?e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=298215792b&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=2037fe2801&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | |
# August 18th Update from Kevin
---
| Dear Friend and Patriot,
I hope this message finds you well! Our team has been busy this month with some big developments in our shared efforts to reclaim Michigan, as we work toward restoring strong leadership for the role of Attorney General in 2026.
On the media front, [it was great to join The Steve Gruber Show this past Friday](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=af2d48b1db&e=4b10910eed). We discussed combatting Canadian wildfire pollution impacting Michigan, the dangers of ranked choice voting, promoting election integrity by supporting the citizen-only voting ballot initiative, and preventing land purchases in our state by the Chinese Communist Party. As Michigan's next Attorney General, I'm committed to fighting for our state's future and I look forward to joining Steve again soon! [Click on the image below to watch the video.](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=c6f1922def&e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=d2e2b2a8cb&e=4b10910eed)
| I also had an [op-ed published in Michigan News Source](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=dcb488d435&e=4b10910eed) about what can be done about Canadian Wildfire Pollution. Michigan is suffocating from Canadian wildfire smoke - causing unhealthy air, surges in ER visits, premature deaths, and lost tourism revenue because of Canadian forrest mismanagement and negligence. [In my op-ed and as MI’s next AG, I describe how we can hold Canada accountable and compensate victims. Click the link below to read the article.](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=6e36a075eb&e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=d2a81c1dd3&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=954c491419&e=4b10910eed)
| Over the past few weeks, I was happy to visit with several groups and answer questions about how we plan to restore integrity to the Michigan Department of Attorney General. I spoke with many patriots at the 10th Congressional District / Macomb County picnic in St. Clair Shores, Kent County GOP picnic in Grand Rapids, Washtenaw County GOP meeting in Ann Arbor, and Oakland County GOP’s Woodward Dream Cruise Party (with 92.7 FM) to discuss with Republicans about restoring our safety, our constitutional rights, and our faith in government.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=265d9170fe&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=7daea9f7a6&e=4b10910eed)
| [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=b44f19669a&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=72714823d6&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=2bc6157aec&e=4b10910eed)
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=cf3f22f822&e=4b10910eed)
| I’m looking forward to meeting with additional Republican groups later this month from across the state. Later this week, you’ll be receiving an invitation to our exciting reception at the Republican Leadership Conference at Mackinac in September - we hope you can join us!
I’m committed to keeping you informed and welcome your feedback. As Michigan's next Attorney General, I’ll fight to uphold the rule of law, prosecute dangerous criminals, protect our Second Amendment rights, stop political prosecutions, and defend the hardworking people of this state from government overreach. [To win against the radical left's agenda, please contribute today and join the movement to take Michigan back!](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=078281e54d&e=4b10910eed)
Very truly yours,Kevin Kijewski
---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m back.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.

Friend: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind — while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. **That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.** **[Will you chip in $10 or more now — split between Andrea Salinas and me — to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113545252/564130134/890589128?refcode=email_081825_brown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjEwMDFhNy01MzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ke5ZN9tbAcYAilZU1EYoNlNlaVUdJTq8mW-GdtTjjOU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113545253/564130135/890589128?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_081825_brown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjEwMDFhNy01MzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ke5ZN9tbAcYAilZU1EYoNlNlaVUdJTq8mW-GdtTjjOU=)

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for — and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won._
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life — but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $10 now — split between my campaign and Andrea Salinas’ — to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113545259/564130141/890589128?refcode=email_081825_brown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjEwMDFhNy01MzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ke5ZN9tbAcYAilZU1EYoNlNlaVUdJTq8mW-GdtTjjOU=)**
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,

clean_body: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. Friend: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind — while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do. This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for — and who you’re willing to stand up to. When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won. Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life — but I need you in my corner from day one. Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support. = Thank you for standing with me. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: This is a win for China, not PA-07

body:
It’s a gift to foreign competitors and the fossil fuel industry.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113545322/564130359/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTBiYTAxOWQtNTQ3Yy1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0HkT5SuSK1N-2U_FKT5kPcSwly3Mozvj5LYyL7a-BKU=)

| Peter,

Here’s what the news is **NOT** talking about.

Trump and Ryan Mackenzie’s Big Ugly Bill targets solar and wind projects with a new tax. As someone with a Master’s in Energy Systems Engineering, let me break down what this means for families in Pennsylvania’s 7th District.

This isn’t just a kill shot to solar and wind. It’s a direct attack on energy independence and energy security. As a result, we lose jobs, raise utility costs, and hand over control to China to dominate the global market.

_This isn’t the “American jobs” agenda we were promised. It’s a gift to foreign competitors and the fossil fuel industry._

For over 20 years, I’ve worked to lower energy costs and create sustainable, good-paying jobs right here in PA-07. I know firsthand how important it is for working families to not have to choose between paying the bills and putting food on the table. This bill won’t just make that choice harder – it’ll make it impossible.

**I’m not going to sit back while Ryan Mackenzie and his allies destroy our future. I’m fighting for real economic change, a strong energy future, and affordable energy for every Pennsylvanian.

[_I’m ready to keep fighting for real change, but I need your support. Will you help me continue this fight and make sure PA-07 stays on the right track?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113545323/564130360/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-08-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTBiYTAxOWQtNTQ3Yy1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0HkT5SuSK1N-2U_FKT5kPcSwly3Mozvj5LYyL7a-BKU=)**

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for — and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life — but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $10 now — split between my campaign and Fight Like Hell PAC’s — to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113546442/564134668/64766095?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20250818_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmI1NWM5MTctNTU3Yy1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ld7O237EKAjZ3soRjf8MtNbHMp1kBtLrlq-Nvag2cUg=)**
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Hands-on habitat restoration, public outreach, and partnerships
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
I joined some of my Democratic colleagues in a letter to the Department of the Interior Secretary Doug Burgum.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113547144/564137140/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGU5OTIyYS01NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAak1n7Lfha3wSNGW-dKdxl4RwKPkQnROGE1JDk6k0o=&emci=a73225db-2a79-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e4e9922a-567c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **I joined some of my Democratic colleagues in a letter to Department of the Interior Secretary Doug Burgum, urging him to reverse the Trump administration's disastrous decision to eliminate funding for Regional Fisheries Enhancement Groups (RFEGs).** This decision is a blow to widely supported salmon recovery and habitat restoration efforts and undermines longstanding Tribal partnerships built over many years. RFEGs represent a unique model to engage local communities in salmon recovery through hands-on habitat restoration, public outreach, and partnerships with tribal, federal, state, and private entities. Operating as fourteen independent entities across Washington state, these groups sponsor some of the largest, most complex habitat projects focused on specific geographic regions, allowing them to tailor projects to local needs while contributing to a statewide coordinated salmon recovery strategy. From the letter: _"We write to express our deep concern regarding the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service's (FWS) elimination of $1,285,000 of Fiscal Year 2025 funding for Washington state's Regional Fisheries Enhancement Groups (RFEGs). This widely supported program is a critical component of community-driven salmon recovery efforts, creating thousands of jobs and spurring millions of dollars in economic development across all corners of our state. Your decision to cut funding undermines longstanding partnerships and progress that have been built over many years._ _Many RFEGs rely on federal funds as core operational support that enable them to leverage additional resources. Without this foundation, the capacity to plan, coordinate and execute complex restoration projects will be drastically diminished."_ A healthy environment is vital to Washingtonians' way of life and the regional economy. I am committed to standing up for our environment even in the face of the Trump administration's destructive cuts. clean_body: I joined some of my Democratic colleagues in a letter to the Department of the Interior Secretary Doug Burgum. | | | | I joined some of my Democratic colleagues in a letter to Department of the Interior Secretary Doug Burgum, urging him to reverse the Trump administration's disastrous decision to eliminate funding for Regional Fisheries Enhancement Groups (RFEGs). This decision is a blow to widely supported salmon recovery and habitat restoration efforts and undermines longstanding Tribal partnerships built over many years. RFEGs represent a unique model to engage local communities in salmon recovery through hands-on habitat restoration, public outreach, and partnerships with tribal, federal, state, and private entities. Operating as fourteen independent entities across Washington state, these groups sponsor some of the largest, most complex habitat projects focused on specific geographic regions, allowing them to tailor projects to local needs while contributing to a statewide coordinated salmon recovery strategy. From the letter: "We write to express our deep concern regarding the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service's (FWS) elimination of $1,285,000 of Fiscal Year 2025 funding for Washington state's Regional Fisheries Enhancement Groups (RFEGs). This widely supported program is a critical component of community-driven salmon recovery efforts, creating thousands of jobs and spurring millions of dollars in economic development across all corners of our state. Your decision to cut funding undermines longstanding partnerships and progress that have been built over many years. Many RFEGs rely on federal funds as core operational support that enable them to leverage additional resources. Without this foundation, the capacity to plan, coordinate and execute complex restoration projects will be drastically diminished." A healthy environment is vital to Washingtonians' way of life and the regional economy. I am committed to standing up for our environment even in the face of the Trump administration's destructive cuts. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm back, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-brown.E4zM7Z&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q) Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. **That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[Will you chip in $10 or more now - split between Tammy Baldwin and me - to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=stb-em-brown.jsGxFu&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-brown.T99Sxr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3665?c0=stb-em-brown.wVIwA_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3666?c0=stb-em-brown.DIyVU3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=stb-em-brown._NvfHf&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3692?c0=stb-em-brown.cO_Rju&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=stb-em-brown.iEK2_O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q)
---
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won_.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $10 now – split between my campaign and Tammy’s – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=stb-em-brown.jsGxFu&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=12&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q)**
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4929%2E35263%2ElqDO4Q)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Peter!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , **Peter**!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**
---
**Listen Peter, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. __I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU!__ **

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | I wrote this for you specifically , Peter! Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like YOU , Peter! I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we COULD NOT have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth. I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a serious cash advantage. Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a MILLION dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money. Listen Peter, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU! We can't let a far-Left Democrat like Abigail Spanberger turn our country into a socialist dystopia - we must defend everything we've worked so hard to build! I can't tell you how much I appreciate having you on my team. Together, we will defend our home and ensure our country remains a bastion of conservatism and a land of opportunity! Thank you again and may God bless you and your family, Winsome Earle-Sears Lt. Governor of Virginia | | | | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Folks, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. **That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.** [**Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Seth Moulton and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113547347/564137924/-619769051?refcode=2507818_MFC_Sherrod_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Y2MWY2Yy01NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSS_bBIF94Vl0k80shHI2sQt3lQ3A1u2Sv4ZJ6gc6JA=) I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._ Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. **Folks, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:** [**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $5 or $10 now, split between Seth Moulton and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113547349/564137926/-619769051?refcode=2507818_MFC_Sherrod_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Y2MWY2Yy01NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSS_bBIF94Vl0k80shHI2sQt3lQ3A1u2Sv4ZJ6gc6JA=) I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113547352/564137929/-619769051?refcode=2507818_MFC_Sherrod_Launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Y2MWY2Yy01NjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FSS_bBIF94Vl0k80shHI2sQt3lQ3A1u2Sv4ZJ6gc6JA=)

clean_body: | Folks, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. = I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. Folks, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: = I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown = [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won_.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
[_**I’m personally asking: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $10 now – split between my campaign and Martin Heinrich’s – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113547468/564138390/-1442464265?amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWJiMzliYy01NzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_tzKqudC-CrSZ7RTWoj8uHlAHz_4qRcYdwILoVD7yt4=)
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

Friend,
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.

_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

| Peter,
In Spring 2025, Democrats narrowly avoided a catastrophic defeat in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race.
A loss here would've meant an extreme MAGA majority on Wisconsin's Supreme Court that would've taken this key swing state out of the cards for Dems in 2026 and in 2028--where Trump is suggesting he'll seek reelection. We won here because we mobilized the might of the entire Democratic party around this singular race.
In November 2025, Dems in Pennsylvania face a court election with identical stakes but this time we are heading into it woefully unprepared:

| | | | We are on track for a Pearl Harbor moment for Democrats.
The consequence of a Democratic loss in the November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election means the permanent loss of Pennsylvania as a swing state for Democrats bringing us one step closer to permanent MAGA electoral control.
In Wisconsin, we were able to compete with the tens of millions that MAGA pumped into the race because that race was the only show in town \- barely any Democrats had announced their 2026 campaigns meaning Democrats could focus almost solely on Wisconsin.
We do not have this luxury for the Pennsylvania 2025 Supreme Court fight. And although equally important, we are competing with hundreds of Democratic candidates and organizations for critically needed resources.

clean_body: The consequence of a Democratic loss in the November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election means the permanent loss of Pennsylvania as a swing state for Democrats. | | | | | == | Peter, In Spring 2025, Democrats narrowly avoided a catastrophic defeat in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race. A loss here would've meant an extreme MAGA majority on Wisconsin's Supreme Court that would've taken this key swing state out of the cards for Dems in 2026 and in 2028--where Trump is suggesting he'll seek reelection. We won here because we mobilized the might of the entire Democratic party around this singular race. In November 2025, Dems in Pennsylvania face a court election with identical stakes but this time we are heading into it woefully unprepared: | == | | | | We are on track for a Pearl Harbor moment for Democrats. The consequence of a Democratic loss in the November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court election means the permanent loss of Pennsylvania as a swing state for Democrats bringing us one step closer to permanent MAGA electoral control. In Wisconsin, we were able to compete with the tens of millions that MAGA pumped into the race because that race was the only show in town \- barely any Democrats had announced their 2026 campaigns meaning Democrats could focus almost solely on Wisconsin. We do not have this luxury for the Pennsylvania 2025 Supreme Court fight. And although equally important, we are competing with hundreds of Democratic candidates and organizations for critically needed resources. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Half of August. September. October. Two and a half months. That's how long we have to prevent this looming disaster in Pennsylvania. We're going to need all the help we can get. name: Becca Balint
subject: The Land of the Free Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113547945/564140078/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWYzYmQzZS01OTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jQ2_4Zm_42NRTmxdgDSxFXDHRv1W1yYNH6d6HMkztFY=)
---
Everyone, regardless of immigration status, should have their speech protected. But this administration has abused a little-used provision in the Immigration and Nationality Act to target students like Mohsen Mahdawi, Mahmoud Khalil, and Rümeysa Öztürk for exercising their First Amendment rights. We’ve _never_ been a country that criminalizes speech that is critical of the actions of our government. These actions are taking us down a very, very dangerous path. That’s why I’ve introduced the _Land of The Free Act_ , which repeals that obscure provision and protects the free speech rights of _everyone_ in this country, regardless of immigration status. **[Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor today? We need to show Congress that we won’t stand by while they attack immigrants and make a mockery of our Constitution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113547946/564140079/1431135193?contactdata=H1GPKjo9OF4JvWzxUbAlE5B5GvjZs6aM1SqqWbnaNc77SjOGFWS50sf4cl5UvdmEnbERpgXI0f6qJd+25X4cZPYRKBvpMhEBZUWCotoP8KmiBsSwXDonbMBdTNOGZtr7PGg6YD8e1Pjmy7B7+Lk5t74wzJ9zVSCxAq2CjlCLRuQ=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWYzYmQzZS01OTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jQ2_4Zm_42NRTmxdgDSxFXDHRv1W1yYNH6d6HMkztFY=&emci=eedeea86-017a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1af3bd3e-597c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43402272)** | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113547947/564140080/1431135193?contactdata=H1GPKjo9OF4JvWzxUbAlE5B5GvjZs6aM1SqqWbnaNc77SjOGFWS50sf4cl5UvdmEnbERpgXI0f6qJd+25X4cZPYRKBvpMhEBZUWCotoP8KmiBsSwXDonbMBdTNOGZtr7PGg6YD8e1Pjmy7B7+Lk5t74wzJ9zVSCxAq2CjlCLRuQ=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWYzYmQzZS01OTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jQ2_4Zm_42NRTmxdgDSxFXDHRv1W1yYNH6d6HMkztFY=&emci=eedeea86-017a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=1af3bd3e-597c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43402272)

The attacks by this administration on our free speech rights are alarming, Peter. If they’re comfortable coming after one person’s right to free speech, _all of our rights to free speech are in danger_.
That’s why I stepped up to introduce this legislation.
Thanks for reading and showing your support.
Take care,
Becca

Hey there! You’ve probably seen political emails that make you wade through paragraphs before they tell you what they want, so we’re skipping the usual song and dance. **$10.** That's how much we're asking you to donate today. We know it doesn't seem like enough to take on fossil fuel giants spending billions to buy our elections, but when thousands of people like you chip in **$10** at a time, it creates the kind of grassroots momentum that can WIN. **$10** will support leaders who will resist Trump's authoritarian agenda — candidates who refuse to stay silent while he dismantles democracy, attacks climate science, and hands out tax giveaways to corporate polluters. **$10** for communities on the frontlines of climate disaster who need leaders willing to fight for green infrastructure, clean air, and environmental justice. **$10** to prove that our democracy isn't for sale — that ordinary people organizing together can beat the fossil fuel industry trying to destroy our planet just to pad their pockets. Bottom line: **Your $10 supports candidates who wake up every day thinking about how to protect your family, not how to please fossil fuel donors.** **[Every dollar powers the grassroots organizing and candidate support that determines whether we elect leaders who serve people or profit. You’ve probably seen political emails that make you wade through paragraphs before they tell you what they want, so we’re skipping the usual song and dance. $10. That's how much we're asking you to donate today. We know it doesn't seem like enough to take on fossil fuel giants spending billions to buy our elections, but when thousands of people like you chip in $10 at a time, it creates the kind of grassroots momentum that can WIN. $10 will support leaders who will resist Trump's authoritarian agenda — candidates who refuse to stay silent while he dismantles democracy, attacks climate science, and hands out tax giveaways to corporate polluters. $10 for communities on the frontlines of climate disaster who need leaders willing to fight for green infrastructure, clean air, and environmental justice. $10 to prove that our democracy isn't for sale — that ordinary people organizing together can beat the fossil fuel industry trying to destroy our planet just to pad their pockets. Bottom line: Your $10 supports candidates who wake up every day thinking about how to protect your family, not how to please fossil fuel donors. = | = | = ---|--- Let’s do this, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Mike Nellis - Endless Urgency
subject: Trump Blocking Ukraine from NATO Isn’t Strategy—It’s Submission
body:
Trump handed Putin a big win on a silver (or likely, gold) platter.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..eZvFeGNUbLA_TsvYNLa-MwqUXHSJoMggquu2in5lZmg?) for more
---
[](https://substack..q-A3RUZWv5I48PvKm9cLzLBt1TskhBPI8juSWG8LnoQ?)
---
# [Trump Blocking Ukraine from NATO Isn't Strategy--It's Submission](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171295474&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMjk1NDc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU1Mzk0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc1ODEzMTQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.S9oMcF3PxR2TyMsD6Qfig6vve-qg5CZLis4yyosqmgw)
### Trump handed Putin a big win on a silver (or likely, gold) platter.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Aug 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171295474&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMjk1NDc0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NTUzOTQyNSwiZXhwIjoxNzU4MTMxNDI1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ozLdVTPE6L_mgTr0uDa8vKqyaYYp5RmsdVfN9NXGDbQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171295474&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMjk1NDc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU1Mzk0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc1ODEzMTQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.S9oMcF3PxR2TyMsD6Qfig6vve-qg5CZLis4yyosqmgw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=171295474&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcxMjk1NDc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTU1Mzk0MjUsImV4cCI6MTc1ODEzMTQyNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.S9oMcF3PxR2TyMsD6Qfig6vve-qg5CZLis4yyosqmgw)
---
| | [](https://substack..60xIPUkyIbmsiS2QBM3bQMhAEWlAFINzPvweEuQsLEY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/trump-blocking-ukraine-from-nato?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Donald Trump is still reeling from the embarrassment Putin handed him in Alaska--and last night, he handed Russia another massive win. On Truth Social, he declared that under no circumstances would Ukraine be allowed to join NATO--just hours before meeting with President Zelensky and European leaders.
That's not just weak. It's reckless. It tells every authoritarian on Earth that under Donald Trump, the U.S. can be bullied. And it's a strategic faceplant that gives Putin exactly what he's wanted for years: a permanent veto over Ukraine's future.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/67a9cc63-c517-483b-8621-7b8f9d0e746c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/67a9cc63-c517-483b-8621-7b8f9d0e746c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's be clear: peace comes through strength and unity. Russia only escalated when it sensed division and weakness in the West and saw an opportunity. Biden and European leaders called that bluff by rallying behind Ukraine, exposing Russia's military as inept and weak. Trump, for both economic and diplomatic reasons, brought that weakness back--first by getting worked by Putin last week, and now by handing him his biggest ask on a silver (or likely, gold) platter.
Letting Ukraine into NATO wouldn't inflame this war--it would help prevent the next one. It would slam the door on future invasions and send a clear message to every power-hungry war criminal: mess with our allies, and you pay the price. A strong, united front. That's why Putin fears it.
Russia's invasion of Ukraine is not driven by fear of "security" but by fear of what Ukraine symbolizes: a sovereign, thriving democracy choosing its own future on Russia's border. To Putin, Ukraine is not a nation but a threat to his autocracy--a living refutation of his empire's myths. He does not seek compromise; he seeks subjugation--whether by erasing Ukraine in one brutal blow or dismantling it piece by piece. And to feed that ambition, he has condemned more than a million of his own citizens--young men and women--to die, and more to be broken, in a senseless war, their futures sacrificed on the altar of his selfish obsession.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/67a9cc63-c517-483b-8621-7b8f9d0e746c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/67a9cc63-c517-483b-8621-7b8f9d0e746c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Let's not forget who's actually been doing the fighting. Ukrainians are standing toe to toe with what was supposed to be the world's second-largest military. They're already doing what NATO was built for. They've bled for this moment--over 400,000 of them. Ukrainians are literally dying to defend the same freedoms we claim to believe in. If that doesn't qualify a country for NATO, what does? Ukraine is not 'baggage.' They'd make NATO stronger. Battle-hardened military. Unshakable motivation. Strategic geography. They're not a charity case. They're an asset. They've earned their seat at the table.
This war isn't about land or resources. It is about power, control, and--above all--the choices made in its course. How this conflict is navigated, by every party involved, will shape the foundation of the emerging world order.
What do we value as Americans? We stand with our allies. We do not bow to dictators. We lead with our principles. For generations, America upheld these values--until Donald Trump. He is a weak man: shortsighted, easily manipulated, and reckless. That weakness doesn't just endanger Ukraine or Eastern Europe. It threatens the very foundation of Western democracy itself.
And here's the brutal truth: deterrence is cheaper than war. Every dollar and weapon we send now is a fraction of what a wider European conflict would cost if Putin isn't stopped in his tracks. Contain the fire now--or watch it burn down the whole block. That's been Biden's strategy, and it was right then to rally the West behind Ukraine--and it's still right now. That cannot change.
The old Cold War fantasy--that Eastern Europe exists to be Russia's buffer zone--is gone. Buried with the Iron Curtain. Ukraine is not a "gray zone." It is a sovereign nation that has chosen liberty, dignity, and democracy. And it deserves not just to survive, but to thrive as part of the new world we are building together.
And this fight is bigger than Ukraine. NATO's resolve is a message to the world. If we waver--if we hesitate--then the lesson to every dictator is simple: aggression works, invasion pays, democracy can be strangled if your army is big enough. Don't think China isn't taking notes. Meticulously. But if we bring Ukraine in, we flip the script. Aggression isolates you. You lose. You pay.
The promise of freedom did not stop at Berlin. It runs through Kyiv. Ukraine belongs in NATO--not tomorrow, not at some vague future date. Now. Every delay, every equivocation, every failure to stand squarely on the side of freedom only gives Putin exactly what he wants--and puts every nation on democracy's frontier at greater risk. Delay does not buy peace. It buys danger. And with every hesitation, the world becomes less safe.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/67a9cc63-c517-483b-8621-7b8f9d0e746c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113548260/564141174/-1516262953?refcode=email_081825_sherrod-split&amounts=10,20,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDAzOWE4MC01YTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdRZ5VNKEJf7mBUrBE3E2VkdRptgbAVl6IiqHfbh2f8=) I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. **That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.** [_**Will you chip in $20 or more now – split between Sharice Davids and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113548261/564141175/-1516262953?refcode=email_081825_sherrod-split&amounts=10,20,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDAzOWE4MC01YTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdRZ5VNKEJf7mBUrBE3E2VkdRptgbAVl6IiqHfbh2f8=) I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._ Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. **We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:** [_**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $20 or $10 now, split between Sharice Davids and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113548262/564141176/-1516262953?refcode=email_081825_sherrod-split&amounts=10,20,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDAzOWE4MC01YTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdRZ5VNKEJf7mBUrBE3E2VkdRptgbAVl6IiqHfbh2f8=) I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown

---

name: Steve Scalise
subject: I get that you may just want to ignore this message and go on with your day so I’ll get right to it:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough.

I know you're probably sick and tired of seeing my name in your inbox.
I understand you may just want to ignore this message and go on with your day so I'll get right to it:
We're just DAYS AWAY from our biggest fundraising deadline of the entire year and MAGA Republicans are pacing about 14% behind our must-hit goal.
The anti-Trump Media... Young Liberal activists... Democrat Super PACs... An army megadonors... They're all lining up behind House Democrats to obliterate our movement and replace EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.
B[ut wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse:](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi9j6np08nb1sovh78mhmggjfq6r81e4bnvl1rao_rp22sh2s8i6epb5climcpb4c9h2bs)
Problem #1: We have THREE imminent Special Elections and Democrats are favorites to win every single one.
Problem #2: House Democrats have over fifty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like me.
Problem #3: AOC recently reignited calls to impeach President Trump and Liberals nationwide are fueling the fight.
I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough.
Our major deadline is in just days and Radical Democrats just jolted ahead in the fundraising race! If we can't muster a last-minute comeback, we might as well kiss our House Majority goodbye...
So here's my plan:
[Tonight at 11:59 PM, our numbers will go public and be set in stone forever. So before then I'm launching a 50-state grassroots fundraising blitz to catch up before it's too late. If we can rally AT LEAST 10,000 Conservatives to pitch in ten or twenty bucks, we'll catch up in just the nick of time.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgv08d88thf3ip2t587ot1onpnagcmmjs8451l60_rp22sh2s8i6epb5climcpb4c9h2bs)
Will you be one of them?[MAJOR DEADLINE:
PITCH IN NOW
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6eaks38stv9ejp3hsj2e1q7s19kk2slorrv7a28_rp22sh2s8i6epb5climcpb4c9h2bs)I know that's a lot to ask with such a short timeline.
But if we - as Conservatives - all do our part, we can catch up to the Democrats, expand our Pro-Trump House Majority, and put all hopes of impeaching our President to bed!

That's why...
Vice President Vance emailed you.Newt Gingrich emailed you.Kellyanne ConwayElise Stefanik emailed you.Lisa McClain emailed you.Byron Donalds emailed you.13 Freshmen Members of Congress emailed you.
Now I'm following up!
I hate to be a pest but your support is the lifeblood of our movement. Any contribution you make right now will be a SAVING GRACE before our major deadline.
[So I'm PLEADING WITH YOU to pitch in a few bucks right here and right now.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrieul2ocbte4ivfvg3m2836efo99j3mkn566npg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5climcpb4c9h2bs)[MAJOR DEADLINE:
PITCH IN NOW
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z74g29v6vl1r867iq1gv69hfd0is6s3hm8unpm4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5climcpb4c9h2bs)Your support will not be in vain.
Thank you for your support.
- Steve
STEVE SCALISEHouse Majority Leader
* * *
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zml44j707ikr7fer221ukoljhuna1gfrcq63e4mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5climcpb4c9h2bs)
As your Majority Leader - my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. _**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zu2ijdc49ik81fteoknuergbd5op22n02ajugtvg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5climcpb4c9h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link. ")**_

**Your input will help me better understand what we're doing well and where we can improve.**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY ->](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo1fp8qoqudlp0dqj2qa12h1g8ul0o4i3rgqma0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5climcpb4c9h2bs)
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

Friend,

2028 will be here before you know it, and we need to know who YOU support.

That's why we've launched the first-ever 2028 GOP Primary Straw Poll in the ENTIRE COUNTRY. You have been selected to be the VERY FIRST patriot to weigh in.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113548806/564143329/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDJkYmMyYi01ZDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cz9Q7Mj8xmlWaxGPYG5MkqMsaSR5uTrZl_WU2Ent9VY=)

**_Rolling Stone:_ Vulnerable Republicans Are Claiming They Love Medicaid After Voting to Gut It **

_"Three House members [Mariannette Miller-Meeks included] authored a resolution recognizing the health care program's anniversary. They all voted to take it away from thousands of their constituents"_

Yes, you read that right, Peter. Just weeks after gleefully voting to gut Medicaid and kick over 100,000 Iowans off their healthcare, **Mariannette Miller-Meeks introduced a resolution to celebrate the anniversary of Medicaid.**

For someone who claims to _"love"_ Medicaid and promises on her website to _“never quit fighting”_ for Iowans, she sure has a funny way of showing it. Over and over, Miller-Meeks has sold out our district’s interests to please party bosses and corporate backers — and she hasn’t even bothered to hold a single town hall to face the people she represents.

**[Actions speak louder than words, and hers tell us she’s not fit to represent IA-01. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. | | | |
---
Friend,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why,****today****, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
[**Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between the Nevada State Democratic Party and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtEEjhuOfSZtU0xhsJqEpvPxqGpuBXDhGm9EuThebnpUJe_owcrVQUx_iGOTBRH0qVbS5neQSv6t8gE1C9hF53CWR9JITIDxgwVnOA5bipa9dT06RG-94cKTYnJ7bzbsF2hXdxBcj-YotDnDaCTVS362CGFyH0AbfM4t4uJc1SwHP1qmtgWVsVyl7fVqo5kwA_wBjGFkN-WnECBOv8C5E0mwW1wd26ljTLLiFw4O-osAs04qKBYspoCb0XApBDDdgHajlWG9ZabpRDPGBSY5Hsa0wJhpRxxZcIdYFSylRRVTQ1qdBm8gmr79WtmV3ZfOTOR838WDCP27qFV3C5vfVDDPm6oQvgriS3mU8z-RfnE2jN4L-FJz7hDw8Ir4faythw/4j5/_5WN4j6zThefcdmzvhVAwA/h0/h001.bUNRgik0Eug2A9UpiicDWwGMWhabP_Z9JYiHDE3uq1w)
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Friend, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
[**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $20 or $10 now, split between the Nevada State Democratic Party and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtEEjhuOfSZtU0xhsJqEpvPxqGpuBXDhGm9EuThebnpUJe_owcrVQUx_iGOTBRH0qVbS5neQSv6t8gE1C9hF53CWR9JITIDxgwVnOA5bipa9SUV_J-kR9lp8pRdDUHpatsjkZcdyktlm_kLj3yOTH7M0Yj-7iZHrOTIp5GHyN0WinJNkhxYsH7naRxw-bcKfNrK40jrjQuCvynyv-Obwo4zsjbydd5RJqfeG7uTU0xEKZxj3YFHVt7jzqGVP2ThJvPJfqkWaFDB_DKbGIdH9E_TNGiwVWXgAbO9eWm6W9cO7RG8GdPxDtVf5_r6O8c-dsstIKhscZ_iIhsYtWdirgx1nilLae66ZYmgioTLeEwQQc7VkOMgodTdM82er0p6mfo/4j5/_5WN4j6zThefcdmzvhVAwA/h1/h001.5KtH1-VKv_3zZXBr7mISPkvKpoU2fw5PD41PUrhFVP4)
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules.
---

name: Steve Scalise
subject: I get that you may just want to ignore this message and go on with your day so I’ll get right to it:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough.

I know you're probably sick and tired of seeing my name in your inbox.
I understand you may just want to ignore this message and go on with your day so I'll get right to it:
We're just DAYS AWAY from our biggest fundraising deadline of the entire year and MAGA Republicans are pacing about 14% behind our must-hit goal.
The anti-Trump Media... Young Liberal activists... Democrat Super PACs... An army megadonors... They're all lining up behind House Democrats to obliterate our movement and replace EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.
B[ut wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zasha06kiuq0sn60mb01vc6gu6m0bo2f34hep708_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clim2ob2c1h2bs)
Problem #1: We have THREE imminent Special Elections and Democrats are favorites to win every single one.
Problem #2: House Democrats have over fifty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like me.
Problem #3: AOC recently reignited calls to impeach President Trump and Liberals nationwide are fueling the fight.
I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough.
Our major deadline is in just days and Radical Democrats just jolted ahead in the fundraising race! If we can't muster a last-minute comeback, we might as well kiss our House Majority goodbye...
So here's my plan:
[Tonight at 11:59 PM, our numbers will go public and be set in stone forever. So before then I'm launching a 50-state grassroots fundraising blitz to catch up before it's too late. If we can rally AT LEAST 10,000 Conservatives to pitch in ten or twenty bucks, we'll catch up in just the nick of time.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziinb85dr4dj9lh4eiqkpcvp2leta5m4ilj0ue1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clim2ob2c1h2bs)
Will you be one of them?[MAJOR DEADLINE:
PITCH IN NOW
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfh09jiqp4qbs89jfdih5nvu5kc09spvrto316a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clim2ob2c1h2bs)I know that's a lot to ask with such a short timeline.
But if we - as Conservatives - all do our part, we can catch up to the Democrats, expand our Pro-Trump House Majority, and put all hopes of impeaching our President to bed!

That's why...
Vice President Vance emailed you.Newt Gingrich emailed you.Kellyanne ConwayElise Stefanik emailed you.Lisa McClain emailed you.Byron Donalds emailed you.13 Freshmen Members of Congress emailed you.
Now I'm following up!
I hate to be a pest but your support is the lifeblood of our movement. Any contribution you make right now will be a SAVING GRACE before our major deadline.
[So I'm PLEADING WITH YOU to pitch in a few bucks right here and right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztl2fhtsa0c1dgqsthhn9g0e05i2dh5g51ij4qv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clim2ob2c1h2bs)[MAJOR DEADLINE:
PITCH IN NOW
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztsmuiimqc0e5er4n7j88msvqvemb0bkjh1cgo60_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clim2ob2c1h2bs)Your support will not be in vain.
Thank you for your support.
- Steve
STEVE SCALISEHouse Majority Leader
* * *
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0mc5bgqlj96fn5415c2sgog573deq5dt6vut5to_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clim2ob2c1h2bs)
As your Majority Leader - my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. _**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm81ismp3j5d8uujvkv6ktnj8hgu7t3u63ajfklo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clim2ob2c1h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link. ")**_

**Your input will help me better understand what we're doing well and where we can improve.**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY ->](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqpk0h1mkp5m5m7o1b88gr8eqqpsvvfbr8ahn85g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5clim2ob2c1h2bs)
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: Team DLCC
subject: Here’s what Democrats can do with just a one-seat majority:
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
The DLCC is laser-focused on expanding Democratic majorities, breaking up GOP majorities, and gaining ground in chambers with a one-seat margin this November and beyond. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| **States with Democratic majorities pass progressive legislation that supports communities like yours:**

✅ Connecticut Democrats passed new funding for early childhood education to support working families with free preschool programs.
✅ Illinois Democrats passed gun safety legislation to protect our children and prioritize community safety.
✅ Virginia Democrats passed a constitutional amendment to automatically restore the voting rights of formerly incarcerated individuals.

❌ Wisconsin’s Republican Assembly is blocking expanded postpartum Medicaid coverage – making WI one of just two states that won’t provide Medicaid coverage for 12 months after a person gives birth.
❌ Georgia Republicans passed huge tax handouts for wealthy Georgians and corporations while everyday workers struggle to make ends meet.

clean_body: The DLCC is laser-focused on expanding Democratic majorities, breaking up GOP majorities, and gaining ground in chambers with a one-seat margin this November and beyond. | | | | | ---|--- | States with Democratic majorities pass progressive legislation that supports communities like yours: ✅ Connecticut Democrats passed new funding for early childhood education to support working families with free preschool programs. ✅ Illinois Democrats passed gun safety legislation to protect our children and prioritize community safety. ✅ Virginia Democrats passed a constitutional amendment to automatically restore the voting rights of formerly incarcerated individuals. States with Republican majorities become testing grounds for extremism: ❌ Texas Republicans passed legislation that will ban books in schools – giving school boards the final say over available materials and allowing parents to challenge any book. ❌ Wisconsin’s Republican Assembly is blocking expanded postpartum Medicaid coverage – making WI one of just two states that won’t provide Medicaid coverage for 12 months after a person gives birth. ❌ Georgia Republicans passed huge tax handouts for wealthy Georgians and corporations while everyday workers struggle to make ends meet. States with a narrow, one-seat Democratic majority in a single chamber have made all the difference: ✅ Minnesota Senate Democrats introduced a bill to offset the federal Medicaid funding cut in Trump’s disastrous budget bill. ✅ Michigan Senate Democrats introduced a bill to make prescription drugs more affordable. ✅ Pennsylvania House Democrats passed legislation to expand contraceptive access and codify the Affordable Care Act in state law. The proof is in the pudding: Majorities matter – they change the trajectory of lives and communities. The DLCC is laser-focused on expanding Democratic majorities, breaking up GOP majorities, and gaining ground in chambers with a one-seat margin this November and beyond.
