name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250818-1?refcode=em-20250818-1&refcode2=472_1086043_VEXkJA&akid=472%2E1086043%2EVEXkJA)
Peter,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
**[Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between Wes Moore and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250818-1?refcode=em-20250818-1&refcode2=472_1086043_VEXkJA&akid=472%2E1086043%2EVEXkJA)**
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
[**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $20 or $10 now, split between Wes Moore and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250818-1?refcode=em-20250818-1&refcode2=472_1086043_VEXkJA&akid=472%2E1086043%2EVEXkJA)**
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250818-1?amount=10&refcode=em-20250818-1&refcode2=472_1086043_VEXkJA&akid=472%2E1086043%2EVEXkJA)**
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250818-1&t=1&refcode2=472_1086043_VEXkJA&akid=472%2E1086043%2EVEXkJA)**

BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

body:
Ohio’s Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive on the map in 2026, and we need to build a massive grassroots movement to win.

| Peter, I’m reaching out with some incredible news:

**My friend Sherrod Brown just announced that he’s running for Senate again in Ohio! I’m so proud to support him, and I’m counting on you to join me.[_Will you chip in $25 or more now – split between Sherrod and me – to help give his campaign the strongest kickoff possible?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113549869/564147211/-116078408?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-08-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDQwYjc4Ny01ZjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eCqJSIqfznAg0MkHfWPGpVpN_rKWoVrZOeQDTqvVG4c=)**

As Sherrod says himself, he never planned to return to public office. But he sees what’s happening in Washington, and he’s called to jump back in the fight. He’s the exact leader we need at this moment.

Sherrod has spent his life fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you come from, or what kind of work you do. Right now, this principle is under threat.

Billionaires and corporations are profiting like never before – while workers and everyday people are struggling just to make ends meet. _The system is rigged in favor of the wealthiest among us, and Sherrod is running to change that._

If there’s one thing I know about Sherrod, it’s that he never backs down from a tough fight. But this is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races on the map in 2026, and he needs to build a massive grassroots movement to win.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ab6bb5e-940b-46ba-8e48-680ed2cab24a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

It’s not true.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.

_Hey folks, John Hickenlooper here, and I've got big news:**My friend Sherrod Brown just announced he’s running for Senate again in Ohio.**_ _Sherrod Brown is one of the smartest senators from either party that I’ve seen in the Senate. More importantly, he is the single loudest and most successful champion for working people in the first 25 years of this century. I will do literally everything in my power to help him regain this Senate seat, and hopefully, return a majority to the Democrats.** **__**[Please, read his message below, then chip in to support our campaigns and help us take back the Senate majority. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113550022/564147656/-2042518991?refcode=email_081825_brown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzgwNzYzZS02MDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FpVvSAumpu5-NHurobZh25T92Ql0elNd1xzD4a7zqbY=)**_
* * *
Friend, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. **That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.** **[Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between John Hickenlooper and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113550023/564147657/-2042518991?refcode=email_081825_brown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzgwNzYzZS02MDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FpVvSAumpu5-NHurobZh25T92Ql0elNd1xzD4a7zqbY=)** I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._ Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. **We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:** **[Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $10 or $20 now, split between John Hickenlooper and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113550024/564147658/-2042518991?refcode=email_081825_brown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzgwNzYzZS02MDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FpVvSAumpu5-NHurobZh25T92Ql0elNd1xzD4a7zqbY=)** I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown
---
| Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://action.hickenlooper.com/p/cTrdfv93Ski9KUzCx_WudA2?unsubscribedata=jSlTWLZbAbuDyjZQelUz2RO89hFwaO%2B%2B7MTIBRJBmpxvn5tWOmRovNBPwTCGXP8Ios%2F34%2B%2BdszMuP6DJ1O4t4GCb7tTdW9kLKQ%2FNd4c9dvKXzqQqqZ7KbgPEMVAbVgJILm3hSZpN4VtQIUCFO%2FafDzmOhEZztMZIsFaZp9SMgy2HKlCrz0Ag0t6BMl%2B7YiLWozefsPHA88pwHshyGeOn96xxiuWnFcSDhTnRFrFNYM6o833x%2BkY6ZxcmzBa9G80Z1rvzqDIWr46gIEsEJvPJyqEK70H5Kn%2Fxiqoyqi144WsEwCHhJnHK9c8IKi4v93VI3E4hOD6wvfZsPrPMXk8QRJWL2iAYOZdF8Toa%2FFWAlrHjF%2FYg2WqWwJtR5qxTIDojVdMs%2BD30AAvB%2Fmr3QF69uwgSvk4pDs40HTnWkWsGqg0%3D).

I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. = I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. We can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: =** I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 300007 Denver, CO 80203 United States

name: Movement for Freedom
subject: Blocking medical care for Palestinian kids is inhumane
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.movement4freedom.com/home [https://www.movement4freedom.com/home]
Washington D.C. – August 18, 2025 – The Movement for Freedom today reaffirms its unwavering solidarity with HEAL Palestine [https://www.healpalestine.org/] , an organization dedicated to providing essential medical aid and support to the Palestinian people. The Movement expresses deep discontent over the Department of State’s recent decision to target and halt the humanitarian temporary visa program [https://x.com/StateDept/status/1956717342693458359] , a critical lifeline for suffering Palestinian children in urgent need of medical care in the United States.
The Movement for Freedom vehemently condemns the attempts to mischaracterize the vital services rendered by HEAL Palestine as a "resettlement project." [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/08/16/us/politics/gaza-visitor-visas-medical-trump-loomer.html] This characterization is not only grossly inaccurate but also deeply undermines the profound and life-saving work that HEAL Palestine undertakes. The temporary visa program has historically allowed vulnerable children, often suffering from complex medical conditions, to access specialized treatments and surgeries unavailable in their home regions. Halting this program is an act of profound indifference that directly impacts the lives of innocent children and their families merely for being Palestinian.
It is crucial to emphasize that HEAL Palestine’s humanitarian efforts are entirely privately funded by the generous donations of caring people, operating without the support of U.S. tax dollars or federal subsidies. This fact underscores the independent and compassionate nature of their mission, making the Department of State’s intervention even more perplexing and disheartening.
"We urge the Department of State and this administration to immediately reconsider its position," stated Rev. Dr. Stephany Spaulding, leading spokesperson for the Movement for Freedom. "This decision runs contrary to both godly and American values, which inherently advocate for doing no harm and intervening proactively when harm is preventable. Our nation has a long-standing tradition of humanitarianism, and to deny critical medical care to children in need is a severe departure from these principles."
In the face of persistent humanitarian crises and systemic challenges in the region, HEAL Palestine’s unwavering commitment to health and human dignity shines as a beacon of hope. Their work is a powerful testament to the transformative power of compassionate action, bringing vital medical resources, specialized care, and a glimmer of hope to those who have endured immense hardship.
The Movement for Freedom recognizes the profound impact of HEAL Palestine’s work and offers its full and unconditional support for their ongoing efforts to ensure access to healthcare for those most in need. We call upon all compassionate individuals and organizations to join us in advocating for the immediate reinstatement of the humanitarian temporary visa program, which would allow HEAL Palestine to continue its essential, life-saving mission. The well-being of these vulnerable children depends on a swift and compassionate reversal of this inhumane policy.
In solidarity,
Movement for Freedom
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250818_healpalestine_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250818_healpalestine_act] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [https://www.movement4freedom.com] .

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
_Peter, this is Mazie. My friend Sherrod is running for the Senate in Ohio to help us retake the majority. Sherrod is a champion for workers in Ohio and across the country, and his voice is sorely missed in the Senate. Please read his message below, and I hope you'll consider joining me in supporting his campaign._
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113550410/564148883/-1755529737?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmM2OTM1Yy02MTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wd4sDgVR3jmblIbpk40dSaMszqBRKLpjCYo-0JUAwHQ=) Peter, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. **That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.** **[Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between Mazie Hirono and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113550411/564148884/93117285?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmM2OTM1Yy02MTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wd4sDgVR3jmblIbpk40dSaMszqBRKLpjCYo-0JUAwHQ=)** I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._ Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. **Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:** **[Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $20 or $10 now, split between Mazie and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. body:
I’m grateful to have you on my team, friend, and now I’m asking you to be on Sherrod’s.
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113550403/564148820/1911195326?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5584-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmM2OTM1Yy02MTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ofOMCaHkB4loGD_96LG9swvN0j8IxPAmDzlghi0ZTaE=)
Friend, I’m reaching out with some incredible news:
**My friend Sherrod Brown just announced that he’s running for Senate again in Ohio! I’m so proud to support him, and I’m counting on you to join me.[Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Sherrod and me – to help give his campaign the strongest kickoff possible?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113550404/564148821/1911195326?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5584-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmM2OTM1Yy02MTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ofOMCaHkB4loGD_96LG9swvN0j8IxPAmDzlghi0ZTaE=)**
As Sherrod says himself, he never planned to return to public office. But he sees what’s happening in Washington, and he’s called to jump back in the fight. He’s the exact leader we need at this moment.
Sherrod has spent his life fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you come from, or what kind of work you do. Right now, this principle is under threat.
Billionaires and corporations are profiting like never before – while workers and everyday people are struggling just to make ends meet. _The system is rigged in favor of the wealthiest among us, and Sherrod is running to change that._
**If there’s one thing I know about Sherrod, it’s that he never backs down from a tough fight. But this is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races on the map in 2026, and he needs to build a massive grassroots movement to win.**
[**I’m grateful to have you on my team, friend, and now I’m asking you to be on Sherrod’s. With so much at stake, will you give $5 or more now – split between Sherrod and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113550405/564148822/1911195326?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5584-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmM2OTM1Yy02MTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ofOMCaHkB4loGD_96LG9swvN0j8IxPAmDzlghi0ZTaE=)

name: Troy Downing
subject: Defense Sec. Hegseth is SOUNDING THE ALARM |
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
This is a direct national security threat

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwODE4X0lDLUJOLjExMDExN190MTY5MDY5NS0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDgxOF9JQy1CTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTA2OTUtMjg5OSJ9/tF8rvpTYjtZbOS_qL6r7GA)Peter,
Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth just sounded the alarm: **China is setting up shop dangerously close to America’s strategic military bases.**
Foreign entities, companies, and individuals linked to the Chinese Communist Party already own land in 27 states surrounding strategic military U.S. bases. **They’re positioning themselves to threaten our food supply, energy grid, and even our water.**
This is a direct national security threat, and we can’t afford to ignore it.
While the Left is asleep at the wheel, Patriots like you, me, and Sec. Hegseth are building a case for a total ban on foreign ownership of American land.
Foreign adversaries should **NEVER** be allowed to plant a flag in our backyard.
[If you agree with me, Sec. Hegseth, and every American Patriot on our side, please help us by taking action RIGHT NOW:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwODE4X0lDLUJOLjExMDExN190MTY5MDY5NS0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDgxOF9JQy1CTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTA2OTUtMjg5OSJ9/dkeVTF8RUhlUgI6h5UOyzw)[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUwODE4X0lDLUJOLjExMDExN190MTY5MDY5NS0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDgxOF9JQy1CTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2OTA2OTUtMjg5OSJ9/TrgFNYchnO6LT4G8pkBrjg)Don’t be fooled, Peter: The CCP is not just after our farmland. They’re targeting our military bases and precious resources to cripple America and become the next global superpower.
[We must stop them before it’s too late. clean_body: This is a direct national security threat , Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth just sounded the alarm: China is setting up shop dangerously close to America’s strategic military bases. Foreign entities, companies, and individuals linked to the Chinese Communist Party already own land in 27 states surrounding strategic military U.S. bases. They’re positioning themselves to threaten our food supply, energy grid, and even our water. This is a direct national security threat, and we can’t afford to ignore it. While the Left is asleep at the wheel, Patriots like you, me, and Sec. Hegseth are building a case for a total ban on foreign ownership of American land. Foreign adversaries should NEVER be allowed to plant a flag in our backyard. ’t be fooled, Peter: The CCP is not just after our farmland. They’re targeting our military bases and precious resources to cripple America and become the next global superpower. you for your patriotic support, Troy Downing| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. body:

| | Peter, it’s Jonathan Jackson.

This month has shown that our democracy is _on the line._ From Donald Trump’s blatant authoritarian attacks on Washington, D.C, to attempts by MAGA allies to silence voters with partisan redistricting – **the time to take action is now.**

[Can you respond to our quick democracy survey to let us know what you think about the current state of our democracy? ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3__zRdzp7ShxoJNnCnFDdb6dIRuB6LBVppEMPNCUj5p31rltPlI_A8QnVPRUxNZsA17DZUi6PuZKbwJh-ARegIdgAcszW2t8zZBdMgWYCD84CenMBPgrh9TEh1OFNJwnIVpPJ9ZUqRdFO4jcYJv5TFqCDL6q46yPImn3V8jtxkzp1twy3tvAXlLbtrAKXhdbtv3IJItuUIe3FPwr7mc_akUUvT1ROe9op_BFpjszOE6nzpEN74KJhcwr-cX-P_UWmAhHEO9cWZj9Sh_9S_Mx26-s31weGlfjqbNxWdz-iewhS8plbL6M2TKKL43wuVyDpM/4j5/b5ZRySghRAO0CGzUwA5rkg/h1/h001.rgwfUCeXvgNIBvRZuG7mtzOju9R1rXqQQezh5iKTG7w) ** [RESPOND TO THE SURVEY >> ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3__zRdzp7ShxoJNnCnFDdb6dIRuB6LBVppEMPNCUj5p31rltPlI_A8QnVPRUxNZsA17DZUi6PuZKbwJh-ARegIdgAcszW2t8zZBdMgWYCD84FhKi7SYu9MDCgzZu0KGCy4TBks4xokNKs-596gbLhXfH3JIS4MmRgzWzlZN6TIWWmN_WzdJ5PY7cWOmUAk-fZMA_-1EX-WgTnqPDnBkzErZW_ZuPZBxe4L0aJYDj-xnqxDjMombCbN35MnNa0FPq6vNfVCLq3XfAbbkEhtU7t20RaKstSF-FpVjbg_maygCtzdkL6lxg5FId4E-jLnRukI/4j5/b5ZRySghRAO0CGzUwA5rkg/h2/h001.OU96CTfCZ9HddMJWKfsN_obtokM7bcsA9AWr4BoIr-Q) ** Fighting for our democracy means that we demand accountability from our government, protect our freedoms, and hold the line against extremism.

**But right now – this fight is more crucial than ever.**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 8/18/2025
body:
🚨 Cancel Culture Hits Colorado Small Businesses
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**August 18, 2025** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Friends,
This week, I want to share something deeply personal — and deeply troubling.
I was invited to speak at a small grassroots event in Jefferson County called _Now or Never_. The organizers rented a local brewery for a quiet Tuesday night gathering. But once word got out that conservatives would be meeting, **[the online mob descended.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
A Reddit thread titled _“hosting a MAGA party”_ blew up, with calls for boycotts, one-star reviews, and even demands that the brewery be driven out of business.
Here’s the kicker: the same brewery had hosted three Democratic events in the past without a single complaint. Their “crime” was simply treating Republicans the same.
And this wasn’t an isolated incident. From the [Drip Café in Denver,](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) a Christian-owned coffee shop attacked for helping the homeless, to breweries in El Paso County smeared for renting to Moms for Liberty, businesses across Colorado are under fire for daring to open their doors to conservatives.
This is bigger than one event or one venue. **It’s a dangerous pattern of political persecution — where businesses, neighbors, and entire communities are bullied into silence.** Democrats claim to stand for tolerance, but in practice they’re enforcing a new kind of segregation: [conservatives excluded from the public square.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
But here’s the good news: **[the cancel mob is backfiring.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** The Republican base is fired up and the attacks only strengthened our resolve. We’ve shifted the event to a new location and are nicknaming it our **[]()"Uncancelled" Event.**

**👉[[Reserve your spot here]](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and share it with your friends.** Let’s pack the house and show the Left they can’t shut us down. We won’t be silenced. We won’t be shamed. And we won’t be intimidated.
This is Colorado, and we still believe in freedom of thought, freedom of speech, and freedom to gather. But it will only stay that way if we stand together.
_**ICYMI: RMV’s Oil & Gas Exposés**_ _We’ve been digging into one of the biggest anti-industry power plays in Colorado’s history—and what we found is explosive. This investigation has landed in the hands of many key players and lawmakers, both statewide and nationally. We will keep you updated as the story continues to develop._
_📌[The Rule 211 Gamble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) – How two small towns twisted an obscure law to shut down a family-run oil company’s core assets._ _📌[Bled Dry by the State](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) – Inside the war of attrition waged by Colorado regulators to bleed one company into submission._ _📌[The Man Polis Vowed to Destroy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) – Kevin Kauffman’s final fight for truth, legacy, and survival against a state determined to erase him._
Stay strong, stay bold, and stay in the fight.
In liberty and truth,
Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Colorado’s Legal Tyranny, How It Happened and How We Take It Back](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SEAN POND, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Colorado did not fall because of one bad election or one bad governor. It fell because a handful of people figured out how to take over a state legally. They did it quietly, methodically, and permanently. By the time most Coloradans noticed, it was already too late._
**[Six cities sue Colorado over zoning and parking laws as state stays silent](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) That’s how Greenwood Village Mayor George Lantz summed up the status of a lawsuit the six Front Range cities filed in May against the state of Colorado, Gov. Jared Polis, the Department of Local Affairs and its executive director, Maria De Cambra. The case targets two 2024 laws—HB 24-1313 and HB 24-1304—that, according to the cities, trample Colorado’s constitutional guarantee of Home Rule.
**[Colorado isn’t creating jobs—it’s creating unemployment](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'CONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _January 2023 was a changeover month of sorts in the United States because it marked a division between the taxpayer subsidized COVID economy and the less subsidized post-COVID economy._
|
---
**STATE**
**[Big Beautiful Bill Sparks Heated Debate Among Colorado Lawmakers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[KUNC](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) All eight of the state’s U.S. House members shared a stage Tuesday at the Colorado Chamber of Commerce’s congressional luncheon in Denver, where they touted bipartisanship but remained divided over issues like health care and energy.

**[Polis threatens to withhold $280M from cities defying housing laws in new executive order](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER7](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado Gov. Jared Polis is turning up the heat on cities that aren’t following new state housing laws. He issued a new executive order on Wednesday that identifies $280 million in funding that could be withheld from them.
**[Kaiser Permanently Ends Gender Transition Services for Colorado Minors](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Citing pressure from the Trump administration, Kaiser Permanente is the latest health system to acquiesce to demands that it cease providing gender transition services to minors that includes chemical or surgical procedures.

_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Roblox isn’t a game when safety is on the line](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _This week, two very different voices sounded the same alarm about Roblox. YouTuber Schlep says the platform banned him after he worked with law enforcement to help catch child predators._
**[Air Force Academy Ends Race Based Admissions After Legal Settlement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) More than four months after the U.S. Air Force Academy announced it no longer would consider race as a factor in its admissions process, the Justice Department said Tuesday a settlement has been reached between the Colorado Springs academy and a conservative nonprofit whose years long lawsuit challenged the school’s now-abandoned affirmative-action policies.

**[Abbott Blasts Fleeing Democrats as “Un-Texan” Cowards](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Gov. Greg Abbott, R-Tex., accused Democrat state representatives of being cowards for fleeing Texas to break quorum on calling their actions a “most un-Texan thing.”

**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[As businesses flee downtown Denver, Johnston points to falling homicide rate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Mayor Mike Johnston has been pointing to a 44% drop in homicides in the first half of 2025, calling it proof his crime plan is making a difference. The figure is a sharp improvement from last year, but it’s recent and doesn’t show where things stood before the pandemic. In the city’s core, the gains are harder to find.

**[Power House Panel of Western Slope Legislators in Delta](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY SHIRLEY BAUER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _On July 23, five of our state’s most prominent legislators representing the Western Slope met for a legislative update at Daveto’s to a sold-out crowd. The legislative update was sponsored by Delta County GOP, and the MC was Chairwoman Leslie Parker._
**[Denver Is Losing Everything That Gave It Character](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [WESTWORD](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _After almost thirty years, the Hornet has taken off from the corner of First and Broadway. For decades, the Hornet has amused patrons and passersby alike with the messages on the sign outside the restaurant at 76 Broadway. But the sign that went up last week was not so amusing: “Thanks Denver! Come & Say Bye.”_ _
_
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[The Dangerous Hubris of Deputizing Non-Citizens to Police Americans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Since 2016, various jurisdictions in Colorado began allowing non-citizens – specifically lawful permanent residents and in some cases, DACA recipients – to serve as police officers. This is not a progressive step forward, but rather, it is a profound public policy misstep._
**[Colorado’s add-back taxes are a backdoor tax on overtime](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _My state senator (B Pelton) alerted me to something you’ll almost certainly see in the coming state special session: add back taxes. I thought it would be good to give some resources on that so you’ll better understand it and (I hope) be a better advocate on the issue._ __

**[Devotional: From faking it to faithing it—walking by truth, not appearances](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY DRAKE HUNTER,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Let’s talk about protecting faith, not just your personal beliefs, but the kind of enduring, biblical faith that can resist evil and advance good in a world that often muddies the two. This kind of faith doesn’t hide. It stands. It doesn’t just defend; it moves forward in grace and truth._ __
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com)](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**🐶 DID YOU KNOW?** **Dogs use different nostrils for different smells.** Dogs usually start sniffing with their right nostril. If the odor seems threatening, they keep it there. But when it’s something pleasant—like food or a potential mate—they switch to the left nostril. That’s because each side of the brain processes smells differently.
|

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!

This is Colorado, and we still believe in freedom of thought, freedom of speech, and freedom to gather. But it will only stay that way if we stand together. ICYMI: RMV’s Oil & Gas Exposés We’ve been digging into one of the biggest anti-industry power plays in Colorado’s history—and what we found is explosive. This investigation has landed in the hands of many key players and lawmakers, both statewide and nationally. We will keep you updated as the story continues to develop. 📌 – How two small towns twisted an obscure law to shut down a family-run oil company’s core assets. 📌 – Inside the war of attrition waged by Colorado regulators to bleed one company into submission. 📌 – Kevin Kauffman’s final fight for truth, legacy, and survival against a state determined to erase him. Stay strong, stay bold, and stay in the fight. In liberty and truth, Heidi Ganahl | | | TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK BY SEAN POND, Colorado did not fall because of one bad election or one bad governor. It fell because a handful of people figured out how to take over a state legally. They did it quietly, methodically, and permanently. By the time most Coloradans noticed, it was already too late. BY JEN SCHUMANN, That’s how Greenwood Village Mayor George Lantz summed up the status of a lawsuit the six Front Range cities filed in May against the state of Colorado, Gov. Jared Polis, the Department of Local Affairs and its executive director, Maria De Cambra. The case targets two 2024 laws—HB 24-1313 and HB 24-1304—that, according to the cities, trample Colorado’s constitutional guarantee of Home Rule. BY MIKE O'CONNELL, January 2023 was a changeover month of sorts in the United States because it marked a division between the taxpayer subsidized COVID economy and the less subsidized post-COVID economy. | STATE All eight of the state’s U.S. House members shared a stage Tuesday at the Colorado Chamber of Commerce’s congressional luncheon in Denver, where they touted bipartisanship but remained divided over issues like health care and energy. Colorado Gov. Jared Polis is turning up the heat on cities that aren’t following new state housing laws. He issued a new executive order on Wednesday that identifies $280 million in funding that could be withheld from them. Citing pressure from the Trump administration, Kaiser Permanente is the latest health system to acquiesce to demands that it cease providing gender transition services to minors that includes chemical or surgical procedures. | NATIONAL BY HEIDI GANAHL, This week, two very different voices sounded the same alarm about Roblox. YouTuber Schlep says the platform banned him after he worked with law enforcement to help catch child predators. More than four months after the U.S. Air Force Academy announced it no longer would consider race as a factor in its admissions process, the Justice Department said Tuesday a settlement has been reached between the Colorado Springs academy and a conservative nonprofit whose years long lawsuit challenged the school’s now-abandoned affirmative-action policies. Gov. Greg Abbott, R-Tex., accused Democrat state representatives of being cowards for fleeing Texas to break quorum on calling their actions a “most un-Texan thing.” | LOCAL BY SHAINA COLE, Mayor Mike Johnston has been pointing to a 44% drop in homicides in the first half of 2025, calling it proof his crime plan is making a difference. The figure is a sharp improvement from last year, but it’s recent and doesn’t show where things stood before the pandemic. In the city’s core, the gains are harder to find. BY SHIRLEY BAUER, On July 23, five of our state’s most prominent legislators representing the Western Slope met for a legislative update at Daveto’s to a sold-out crowd. The legislative update was sponsored by Delta County GOP, and the MC was Chairwoman Leslie Parker. After almost thirty years, the Hornet has taken off from the corner of First and Broadway. For decades, the Hornet has amused patrons and passersby alike with the messages on the sign outside the restaurant at 76 Broadway. But the sign that went up last week was not so amusing: “Thanks Denver! Come & Say Bye.” | COMMENTARY BY C. J. GARBO, Since 2016, various jurisdictions in Colorado began allowing non-citizens – specifically lawful permanent residents and in some cases, DACA recipients – to serve as police officers. This is not a progressive step forward, but rather, it is a profound public policy misstep. BY CORY GAINES, My state senator (B Pelton) alerted me to something you’ll almost certainly see in the coming state special session: add back taxes. I thought it would be good to give some resources on that so you’ll better understand it and (I hope) be a better advocate on the issue. BY DRAKE HUNTER, Let’s talk about protecting faith, not just your personal beliefs, but the kind of enduring, biblical faith that can resist evil and advance good in a world that often muddies the two. This kind of faith doesn’t hide. It stands. It doesn’t just defend; it moves forward in grace and truth. | Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com or send us a message on social media to chat! | 🐶 DID YOU KNOW? Dogs use different nostrils for different smells. Dogs usually start sniffing with their right nostril. If the odor seems threatening, they keep it there. But when it’s something pleasant—like food or a potential mate—they switch to the left nostril. That’s because each side of the brain processes smells differently. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | QUOTE OF THE DAY "The criterion of truth is that it works even if nobody is prepared to acknowledge it." – Ludwig von Mises | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Anika Page
subject: Limited spots available - act now to secure your spot for lunch with Lord Hannan!
body:

---
| |
---
| Good morning Friend,
Time is running out to secure your spot! Join us for an exclusive opportunity to hear **Lord Daniel Hannan** , renowned conservative thinker and key architect of the Brexit movement, as he presents:

**"The Anglosphere Alternative: How the US Can Lead the World Without Having to Pay for Everything."**
**Event Details:**
* **Date: September 24th, 2025**
* **Time:****11:30 AM**
* **Location:** **River Hills Country Club, Jackson, MS**

* Connect with fellow conservative leaders, professionals, and thinkers in an elegant setting.
* Gain a front-row perspective and hear ideas that could shape your understanding of America’s role in the world.

Whether you’re securing a full table for colleagues and friends or grabbing one of the remaining individual tickets, this is your moment to be part of a truly memorable experience.

| |

Warmest wishes,

Anika Page
Director of Operations

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_brown2025.ia1R96&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)
Derek,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.
**[Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between Adam Schiff and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=abs_em_brown2025.kQqSrI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)**
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price.
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Derek, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
**[Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $10 now, split between Adam Schiff and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=abs_em_brown2025.kQqSrI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Sherrod Brown will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=abs_em_brown2025.kzvC8F&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=abs_em_brown2025.IuNm4F&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=abs_em_brown2025.efvnrZ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=abs_em_brown2025.BDBaoS&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=abs_em_brown2025.bYLe8_&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs_em_brown2025.ia1R96&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)
---
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=abs_em_brown2025.UM6tvZ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=12&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)
---
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=2&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)**

Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=8916%2E5257348%2EGVAF15)

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Keep Bernie's fight going for years to come
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Trump isn't just dismantling our democracy piece by piece – he's replacing
it with a cruel and power hungry oligarchy: a government run by
billionaires, for billionaires, at the expense of everyone else.

Bernie founded Our Revolution nearly a decade ago to build progressive
power from the bottom up and take on corporate greed everywhere it hides.
Since then, our grassroots army has helped elect over 1,000 progressives
at every level of government. And right now, as Trump doubles down, our
work is more important than ever.

Our Revolution is rapidly scaling up to meet this moment, growing our
Citizen Action Team, organizing to win crucial elections, and building a
united front to break up corporate power and fight for working families —
work that will continue long after Trump.

This August — Make-a-Will Month — is the perfect time to protect your
loved ones and fuel the fight for justice for decades to come. With our
partner FreeWill, you can write your will in just 20 minutes, for free,
and include a gift to Our Revolution to keep Bernie's vision alive long
after we're gone.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33623?utm_campaign=202508_ourrev_mawm_pd%3Fsource%3Demail-20230818&t=1011&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]CREATE MY FREE WILL

This month is Make-a-Will month — a push to encourage the 1⁄3 of Americans
who don't have an up-to-date will to take action. FreeWill makes it simple
and easy to create one, while also making it easy to ensure Our Revolution
is able to carry on Bernie's work long into the future.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33623?utm_campaign=202508_ourrev_mawm_pd%3Fsource%3Demail-20230818&t=1012&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]We're sharing FreeWill with you today because it's an essential step
for protecting your loved ones, planning for your assets, and building
generational wealth for the communities and causes you care about. And by
incorporating a gift to Our Revolution, you will help build a legacy that
propels enduring progressive power in the years to come.

Bernie has been clear from the beginning that transformative change will
require both an inside and outside strategy that takes on corporate power
everywhere — including within the Democratic Party. As he fights
tirelessly to do that in Congress, Our Revolution works on the outside,
taking our voices to the streets, the phones, the ballot box, and directly
into political offices.

Together, we are methodically building the progressive power we need to
transform our country. By engaging in local races that too often get
ignored, we are creating the infrastructure of power at the level of
government closest to people's lives. By mobilizing the grassroots to
demand better of our elected officials, we are winning fights and showing
the strength of our movement.

But the fact is that all these fights take resources, and you can help
ensure our work will continue long into the future by including a gift to
Our Revolution in your will. If you have any questions, do not hesitate to
reach out to [ mailto:paco@ourrevolution.com ]freewill@ourrevolution.com.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution Board Chair

P.S. Have you already included Our Revolution in your will? If so,
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22382?t=1013&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]please fill out this brief form so we can thank you and ensure our
records are up-to-date.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20230818.oit4nN&t=1007&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20230818.nO7KkB&t=1008&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20230818.DRS1-4&t=1009&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20230818.kNxXIp&t=1010&akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9196%2E5885482%2ESbG_Z0

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Today, I’m getting back in the fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
| | |
---
Derek,
I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.
D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.
**That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**
[**Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Chrissy Houlahan and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113552349/564154916/-1734736229?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1167-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGZkZjNhMS02NzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zOfORoiiRCkezXmxryM6tQ1rDtYneJtMubNIvTF5apI=)
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.
I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._
Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.
**Derek, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**
[**Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $10 or $5 now, split between Chrissy Houlahan and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113552350/564154918/-1734736229?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1167-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGZkZjNhMS02NzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zOfORoiiRCkezXmxryM6tQ1rDtYneJtMubNIvTF5apI=)
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113552351/564154920/-1734736229?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1167-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGZkZjNhMS02NzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zOfORoiiRCkezXmxryM6tQ1rDtYneJtMubNIvTF5apI=)
---
I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113552352/564154921/-1734736229?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1167-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGZkZjNhMS02NzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zOfORoiiRCkezXmxryM6tQ1rDtYneJtMubNIvTF5apI=)
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress

Devon, PA 19333

| Join us Tonight, August 18th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u0Syw_kx-cupiUoDBXFH8I1DFqXFTeuCiy-qttFB29F_V21YBQTeL-EZmazMea671g&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_august_call_reminder&n=2) This call will focus mainly on the 2025 candidates we announced this month. This will be a great chance to hear why we're choosing to support them. We have more endorsements in the pipeline and there's still time for more to be considered. Reach out to learn more.
#### This month we announced our first PA Forward Party endorsements of 2025.

clean_body: Candidates to support! | | | Join us Tonight, August 18th at 8pm for our Monthly Statewide call. This call will focus mainly on the 2025 candidates we announced this month. This will be a great chance to hear why we're choosing to support them. We have more endorsements in the pipeline and there's still time for more to be considered. Reach out to learn more. This month we announced our first PA Forward Party endorsements of 2025. \- Independent candidate for Derry Township School Board Director \- Democratic candidate for Bucks County Sheriff \- Republican candidate for Delaware County Controller \- Republican candidate for Lower Macungie Township Commissioner You can check out the pledge they signed . * And Join in a conversation with other PA Forward Supporters on Slack! Pennsylvania Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

clean_body: | | | Peter, An early draft of the Republican Intel memo came across our desk – We compared it to what’s out there now... and guess what? Not ours. The operation? . The plan? The warning? This version of the memo But we think you deserve to know what’s coming. And this copy may be taken offline at any moment. We don’t know how long we have. But we know this: – Team Rogers Authorized by Mike Rogers for Senate | | | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate. |

name: JB Pritzker
subject: This isn't a safe blue seat, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is step one in taking back the Senate from the Republicans.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93708?refcode=em20250818-9272&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9272%2E614464%2EwCW04W)
Peter, it’s Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker.
I’m writing to you today because **[I hope you’ll split a donation between my friend Chris Pappas’s campaign for Senate and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93708?refcode=em20250818-9272&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9272%2E614464%2EwCW04W)**
Look... **It’s been months of Trump 2.0,** and we’ve seen more than enough to call this a failure.
Our small businesses don’t deserve to be bankrupted by unsustainable tariffs. Our citizens don’t deserve to lose health care because Republicans want to hand tax cuts to billionaires.
National Republicans see New Hampshire as their best opportunity to expand their Senate majority. After all, the Granite State just elected a Republican governor — so it’s clear: _this isn't a safe blue seat, folks._

name: Tucker Carlson ALERT [via Conservative HQ]
subject: Do you stand with Tucker Carlson, or have you abandoned him?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206w965k1oyckr19f7ffj8zdpimd2u4xaqyecxzgy7jb2szjta8wpdwuibvjcx3ux2u78f4p4ubvmb5rz12&__stmp=t17gbb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t17gbb&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1h3n2yhnmly98wqa180lw29nk44k4ek8x1ue4p8kdm8x4zjdqbhk6q7ll2sx38eg4b6kkyxpckz3th1mjvpmpcrjzqdhernzgvk9l2pa582ru7h9ihqpgt0hn007sp61k6r37c8m5m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t17gbb&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t17gbb&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t17gbb&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t17gbb&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1h3n2yhnmly98wqa180lw29nk44k4ek8x1ue4p8kdm8x4zjdqbhk6q7ll2sx38eg4b6kkyxpckz3th1mjvpmpcrjzqdhernzgvk9l2pa582ru7h9ihqpgt0hn007sp61k6r37c8m5m&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t17gbb&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t17gbb&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: Is Trump allowed to reshape our entire economy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Trump’s tariffs could be headed to the Supreme Court soon. | |
---
Peter, By now, it’s clear that Trump’s tariffs mean higher prices for you. The companies importing the product are the ones facing higher costs, and in turn they raise the price of the goods for consumers. **Basically, corporations and their millionaire CEOs get to continue making huge profits while it becomes harder and harder for you to afford groceries, a car, home energy, baby products, and other everyday essentials.** That’s exactly the kind of economy right-wing extremists want to cement. Trump’s tariffs stand to completely reshape the way our economy works—**and he has done it unilaterally.** The legality of Trump’s tariff actions have been in question since the beginning. He claims he can levy broad tariffs under the _International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA)_ —but two courts have already ruled that he’s exceeded the power the act provides him. The federal government has appealed those rulings—and they’re likely headed all the way to the Supreme Court. **Trump is depending on the MAGA justices he’s installed on the Supreme Court to defend his tariff agenda.** The MAGA justices have already given him kingly powers and allowed him to act illegally in the face of legal challenges. If they approve his ability to levy broad tariffs on a whim, he’ll have even more authoritarian power over our economy—and each of our wallets. **This is why right-wing actors have spent billions of dollars and decades of work to install loyalists on the Supreme Court. They want to build themselves the power over our economy with no oversight.** Working people are the backbone of our economy. And We the People are the ones who make up our democracy. We can’t allow the Supreme Court to give right-wing oligarchs a pass to take over the American economy for their own benefit. **[We’re making sure everyone knows about the Supreme Court corruption behind our higher costs. And we’re mobilizing to hold the MAGA justices accountable for every ruling they make against the American people. Chip in today to power our efforts >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqugIkOmgK3gUWtwY2TLMjsjvpQMKpQFZK3Nel0nwt03WCCDF-V67aF3Uo16H-4RVPqujgCDg84Kc564AOvaSC9efFTS2s0c8msBaYFjnvy-Geakqs6P1BeAXmk48VOeCUqSG_BLjurz8QgRVr_h19EhxIgz0pLOAMRQBQMaqa797t9NYE3dpr_cJvIa9lFNbW83s2YUPOwPmUg5uvvNwItqxcYhuzL1LTm5dNRw6zaH5dFOjbSoGC7orCwLEy42PVWwUPkrBA3WISH5d3jnPdWH8a62ggNrLwTu1zcRheSN0BY8WyELth0bj-l6gE9p3_jE_rB5d0H86pcAAfr1O5DDiMbxdENUQE1_Hupyx78WJA/4j5/pox7QVK3SkKU8mJCYNXRGg/h0/h001.eulE4Ak5ANmjARJF6iAPYiWfjaAGDI5ota0GgnH9bB8)** Thank you for fighting to stop Trump’s authoritarian takeover of our economy, Stasha Rhodes

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
I need your support from day one to win.

|
---
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113553792/564159994/-748791457?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250818_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwMWZhNmVlLTZkN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OPAHwWUejka9DRN6f3-eigucMWEvkV8rrKn8D8Zh-r8=)** Peter,

I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines.

D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers.

**That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.**

**[Will you chip in $7 or more now – split between Democracy On The Line and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113553793/564159995/-748791457?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250818_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwMWZhNmVlLTZkN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OPAHwWUejka9DRN6f3-eigucMWEvkV8rrKn8D8Zh-r8=)** | **[SPLIT $7 BETWEEN SHERROD BROWN AND DEMOCRACY ON THE LINE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113553794/564159996/-748791457?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250818_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwMWZhNmVlLTZkN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OPAHwWUejka9DRN6f3-eigucMWEvkV8rrKn8D8Zh-r8=)**
---
I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent.

I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._

Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising.

**Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:**

**[Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $7 now, split between Democracy On The Line and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113553795/564160000/-748791457?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250818_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwMWZhNmVlLTZkN2MtZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OPAHwWUejka9DRN6f3-eigucMWEvkV8rrKn8D8Zh-r8=)**

clean_body: I need your support from day one to win. | = Peter, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. = | = I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward – from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued – but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: **= = = = I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =.
