name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Protecting reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=623%2E181023%2EJx_ZP1)
Team — When Donald Trump and anti-abortion extremists proudly claimed victory after overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , Michiganders stood up and re-elected a trio of pro-choice women at the state level to protect and uphold reproductive freedom across the state.
In my role as the Secretary of State, I’ve never been afraid of a fight.
I’m proud to be a champion for reproductive healthcare and have worked to protect the reproductive freedoms of Michiganders. As Governor, I’ll continue standing up to any threats to our right to choose when and how to grow our families.
I’ve never wavered on this issue, and I never will. Michiganders can trust me to not only protect the right for women to make healthcare decisions about our own bodies, expand access to healthcare so those rights aren’t just on paper, they’re a reality.
**[**If you’re a part of Michigan’s pro-choice majority and you’re with me in this fight, can I personally count on you to make a grassroots contribution to my campaign for Governor today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250818_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=623%2E181023%2EJx_ZP1)**

name: Navy Seal Adam Schwarze
subject: I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84d9908418074fc6a11c3eef0925779a&_e=B3jKPBZdEN_VkE31Ok0NE96kbu0cEdKf0wvEINlNFqrw2VSTPppxK7RLkGaERQGF8oGvvNNSPJmvvgdr91QkwUQ94JMpA_O4nauCWOjAjg5ZhpOCjhECdsCLEQwuIJZDbIRsyhUIVlTY3hYZ9v3n0s-vqBYQrCqI4eK-W0rtLxUdT-eJArx4kAT0CGaZDkeL0M-AQqwTCpSi3xRBUslh8qBp9a4Ql-898gtd72N6DBoEYLEsDZti3UGnrjMJlTMAx-0Rtyax3gBC3txovgct5aHMdu6_z0V7T-RspGA0aSwl8mfcZIW43k9azmr6M95RL6a8rLfW3mM1z9sQhgMK1Zk61XhUFF0zP4Gx5QWPHYv5Qqm1oLfD8BW51e_xZBRsphOcbNUVeWN-dKztYf-Fd1tis-klXovA0wk5vIve8NgPJC9nhtAGIVHHlbflLgyaCc6Bz7cT3kSoMH5Kzf85zGV-tkw6AWVBWzT-UywEOS5wQPBztG5oHonPzaU9SsWvmG8HBU6K9BiPthCie5IcXGBrk_RSsD5x-Of841sCrsFr_9Apc3tMoIdRN9DNHeeq_KeNwrUuwMZjOx79CzbGpp7ezO8rlr5WLp0VGXBKS0RLS_geri6JNc_WJX2Ki-tHLzScUjTnVsl9no1r2ygVjpcjYrqqXy7wx5lWuiKWosm4Rl78sDwfPoiLJwIvxI4G-rm0L9Dj-dKV2ticlGvndQHNoCpxtmPLC1859ljurIg%3D)

---
Peter,

**Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away?**

I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this _**critical email**_ right now.

I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, **I decided: I would fight for my country.**

_[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84d9908418074fc6a11c3eef0925779a&_e=B3jKPBZdEN_VkE31Ok0NE96kbu0cEdKf0wvEINlNFqrw2VSTPppxK7RLkGaERQGFpuftNUE88qYBPSIppQTGZN3rx81uwOe-3JXeUB6BP4DaVrO6nZmERbSfA5-Bk3fV36TeWltRBR08UYMQjhJrMICj8m7sYnDjAmOshMkyhgjiUwP2GejbjumASgk5_p-__av4RSlyrAqPcN4XpsHqWKO2LAW4_9QwDTwN0U_VEXGcIRlXKwOMadgKTJ_ibH0t5ki1I7vFp-KNlZuj55tWboUJEZTefNwwJx5BQtTDTK2ZSGLhfGl7jsM8e3WEwYiWjHTnL-Mw3a9zN1jutsAuy-atbGE_kAvGU1sX333piud9DmWuEdBuydxb2EarfONGDTUcTmfiRhRmSOPYEg4HQzKF2_GE7_Pi9kgivEmOH3znAlJt7fD8N5_ruC6GXIG5Dmzyg1KOHi2hqKWsdkFoHI89p5bmHWl0Mlugbk-4BOev_BZffQVZjhJOfgFpmDwhTo-6F2tcDPKgjblDWOehQS32QGnBgczy2MByyldmHDP7PCcwmPsVZWDuz6_e76DSJLEqH5L_fSi_GGup8xJvre5rMrUa3dnPTb0Vc_VwqWE7OWoQols7BggUGjZbEfOGstuZsaBogmVKFX833lYCnjC5vNvJqjOrGgTNaq38rfaUXZPxZX3yDjNzOuSPbFLxRVmBB18xZAXTx3v_TT7AjxtPpeFUL_xq6nWKERaQjw4%3D)_
My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs.

Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived.

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84d9908418074fc6a11c3eef0925779a&_e=B3jKPBZdEN_VkE31Ok0NE96kbu0cEdKf0wvEINlNFqrw2VSTPppxK7RLkGaERQGF8oGvvNNSPJmvvgdr91QkwUQ94JMpA_O4nauCWOjAjg5ZhpOCjhECdsCLEQwuIJZDbIRsyhUIVlTY3hYZ9v3n0s-vqBYQrCqI4eK-W0rtLxUdT-eJArx4kAT0CGaZDkeL0M-AQqwTCpSi3xRBUslh8qBp9a4Ql-898gtd72N6DBoEYLEsDZti3UGnrjMJlTMAq0nleuHtu1gSLRHcXcq4qelwmFsoC4bsDuHkpkARogDIM9SGW9aomuYa9v9B8WlGOSpPUh6Mgy-tssWfdFeEs-Aiu2jPmeVzA1qO4g1gRf-bZvi0ArgU73wXj0-jxLpyDQn3GOFMrhLjVh37YW1jEti1c4_HOCHJSxN0HL4aOxJoTy_4AH1yRbg-xGe-ShaLBVR5bo9z6I5BOr1fNVKCF7rUjo7JCFuAGvl8-Nz9GrDJUWwvsXUdDEdVx6sdm71LydSSO5W0Q3Jvpt9syq3edw7y1NndlCJlg_MY-_EWb0VOGhcO6xiLWuh5FUrPYVTaXadNye5tJAOhl9e6AJuLC3Vd0K-yg00Q49wpOksPD1rbD27ArWlvNW1rurAmgcZEHdPY_lFtg33OUOrNl06jz5vfqAVw_Jh2nGPstmuj7DQgqLSYre11vMp8PamO_Mf7AdTMkaTiks5schElTSvWiaE3WaOxewtap8Cn-foMaPQ%3D)
For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight.

But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield.

While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs.

While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with.

This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away.

**[Do you have $1 you can spare today to help me and my team get this U.S. Senate campaign off the ground? We could really use the help.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84d9908418074fc6a11c3eef0925779a&_e=B3jKPBZdEN_VkE31Ok0NE96kbu0cEdKf0wvEINlNFqrw2VSTPppxK7RLkGaERQGF8oGvvNNSPJmvvgdr91QkwUQ94JMpA_O4nauCWOjAjg5ZhpOCjhECdsCLEQwuIJZDbIRsyhUIVlTY3hYZ9v3n0s-vqBYQrCqI4eK-W0rtLxUdT-eJArx4kAT0CGaZDkeL0M-AQqwTCpSi3xRBUslh8qBp9a4Ql-898gtd72N6DBoEYLEsDZti3UGnrjMJlTMASKd_FCy_hL8R0THi6JrL3WjHdmrPvm5MvEpmtadpBRWagacZEtuoeXB2H8w4QWeWd_J9_2fmUn53AwfM8m_0Qj5NeeEJJZOYPpdgSbc2d84kbeFKKRT7cO1G8aS9rjPLNmXkm1_vPHSp1VwKPxGr9wbbo18WYOa2k_GEcZbh2yaMaTuOJtlfBR_0vJC8KNl-A1jfzaNzjnriOzNJskwQPdVQqmv38CBjApVQRutx0LJ_pbjWDuidc8L3R0nWi5I7OoMhru8AeOvpC4t__i_6zrxBCuhQtyiP1CZmcqxQbzF1KSA57wK0LUymSkoqzaMmuylAk63KI2HFVvWk8hNLhiHhI6H8ap14AShfgzLs-iDCUXl1_joXJpbr_Z_abkuPQuGC6imQM_3uPeIRuGmuKA5all6BcXwcujjaYJtPuwsfpL_PnbHZSGVu7LGerxpnuZGeSHXvEW5AI_WUawtyPIUfQZ2l0geafvwOItx-NyI%3D)**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84d9908418074fc6a11c3eef0925779a&_e=B3jKPBZdEN_VkE31Ok0NE96kbu0cEdKf0wvEINlNFqrw2VSTPppxK7RLkGaERQGF8oGvvNNSPJmvvgdr91QkwUQ94JMpA_O4nauCWOjAjg5ZhpOCjhECdsCLEQwuIJZDbIRsyhUIVlTY3hYZ9v3n0s-vqBYQrCqI4eK-W0rtLxUdT-eJArx4kAT0CGaZDkeL0M-AQqwTCpSi3xRBUslh8qBp9a4Ql-898gtd72N6DBoEYLEsDZti3UGnrjMJlTMAKI7v7HXCTOFM9Q8rfXMOAgnHBULxPoHKm8MEbizRE4pvtgYqwP3t-ilXgANxLlT9nK9oTnS5C2BhuRYJnSOYYd8oo94dkQhX3kg9Cbd0YJagc_JKPEtUWl509BoYoAOopiQ6UghkYWx7rNiczm2hkmfm0VSlD2MsgIeAzSACF9n7O9-S_QReArdJY95fZnck0RQCjkFg6AzOxeqbs8FmrAahdQN1BdGPsLSM-1F5VplC1LMBXdp6NCyInQVxhtohGCtC8bhY2EcJ-Z6DF93e_FOTE63uVBSixQn5QI0_tU0io6SFrdsPZGIQuMdBHyQ79P5ZdggEH433zyilvjFKVcmmxQPGsxb9FgB8aJ90BUCaiMM5cmGCNMY3bENta_ziWmmzvxG7hOGZbfXRjoV39KxJz-0rWpyaNkieOZTd-F_KisfiEN6N9xURH1ZP_0y3wOk9-QuCs0JeoddEn2VSc7_mpsL2hyIhYBaHMXCgUHs%3D)

**I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform.**

I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies.

We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever.

The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. _**My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund.**_
**
[I’m not asking for much, but even $1 will do the trick now.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84d9908418074fc6a11c3eef0925779a&_e=B3jKPBZdEN_VkE31Ok0NE96kbu0cEdKf0wvEINlNFqrw2VSTPppxK7RLkGaERQGF8oGvvNNSPJmvvgdr91QkwUQ94JMpA_O4nauCWOjAjg5ZhpOCjhECdsCLEQwuIJZDbIRsyhUIVlTY3hYZ9v3n0s-vqBYQrCqI4eK-W0rtLxUdT-eJArx4kAT0CGaZDkeL0M-AQqwTCpSi3xRBUslh8qBp9a4Ql-898gtd72N6DBoEYLEsDZti3UGnrjMJlTMATEw3Zujqg2mlv-bJB87wLnIgNuJNFUVxALidE1q2M_8W9WKteHhGy50sYJBuBL4Ko-kKFbBiz1fA2bj9gZL-12GjO4u3tkI2kkLDZwl1QomxombEqeLna94FmY3DOurvymhy2LC54O_TnGILr8LUKMhf7h4o6Eflb58M8Jnb7psjbVJlo9aeiNVJaplt3FPgTEjTp40kPIIcY_0ZNcC1sd39TKaA-SjAbL8gTIoFfp8mQysBOetFpo_i68D4zJoI3Xhj2LViT8SAidXvtvJ3R_taRAI2pJZPuf5F3AK4T0HdJxuroIv2b2HST94Ml3cIjTq3NlpmNg9Vc6OZM6ZfDHR2_o4DeuIj9AsYlhY-E_vJk9m6ykVV1cWQc_A0R8pKF-PVTUcO2I_5VTA3-P2LioVPl34z6pY_sXE7XLLpd7Kd4lDTKvVlzAVzSVsr9TC1h6azU7iO8fBDLkZDBky6_NTQEZmOVDbpEgLObT7WX5Q%3D) **

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=84d9908418074fc6a11c3eef0925779a&_e=B3jKPBZdEN_VkE31Ok0NE96kbu0cEdKf0wvEINlNFqrw2VSTPppxK7RLkGaERQGF8oGvvNNSPJmvvgdr91QkwUQ94JMpA_O4nauCWOjAjg5ZhpOCjhECdsCLEQwuIJZDbIRsyhUIVlTY3hYZ9v3n0s-vqBYQrCqI4eK-W0rtLxUdT-eJArx4kAT0CGaZDkeL0M-AQqwTCpSi3xRBUslh8qBp9a4Ql-898gtd72N6DBoEYLEsDZti3UGnrjMJlTMA34BWClrZ1q9y5X_3qO0qahu8EAexo001e8ROmcRpM1oFaA6FE9_3INZ7uL3pypWM39D-0WJ9HCjTvM87fxtNdIxSIg7BEr1D-TKBrY_KjihjwDxnTcRXCO5uOmC1k3LfO9vCZcRJAfOAQRUOUD2-9pHld1e-Uy7B6K2sme6bwuA2_ZijI8BWnF-y-M8gLoXCqRAnReIsGD670lA_EjHMJBMUQfLbj68794RHXmd-nxv6GP8Pi_UQlU8mmuBvMHCOT7NTqKcOJdRT2VAEwvfrle8S3-ozzWXJV0X5h5G2bnR8xLdrOXFcFrYxy9EB4IIeyC-PK0UiVTFe0XDD2IMteYppqL-Dk3CjdlgJTJFnpUplddHDa0_mUZ4rbvGrqYzvT8fznVwEFH0mqrkJOa4dC8hw25Ui3H6XjY8Po05Pkq6tyYIRBTxRWeDzC3o6LKchB0_eR2KwBAdRsnrczV8KJgl7JYWBAg2TZGui6Hj3mgY%3D)
I don’t know where I was on November 3rd, 2008, but when I write out that date, the last full day we had a Republican representing Minnesota in the U.S. Senate before an election, it feels like a lifetime ago.
**

clean_body: I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything. | Peter, Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away? I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this critical email right now. I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, I decided: I would fight for my country. My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs. Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived. For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight. But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield. While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs. While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with. This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away. I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform. I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies. We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever. The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund. I don’t know where I was on November 3rd, 2008, but when I write out that date, the last full day we had a Republican representing Minnesota in the U.S. Senate before an election, it feels like a lifetime ago. We will secure our border so we can welcome those who love America — and send criminals packing. We will rebuild our economy so working people can live with dignity and opportunity. We will put parents back in charge of their children’s education. We will defend the Constitution — every single word of it. But I can’t do it alone. I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything. I know what our flag stands for. And I will never stop fighting for it. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: The Democrat machine will pour tens of millions into Minnesota to try to crush this campaign before most voters even hear my name. They want a senator who will rubber-stamp their agenda. I’m not that man — and that’s why they’ll do whatever it takes to stop me. As a fellow American who loves this country, , will fuel this fight and send a message that America is worth defending. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
We’re working to elect strong Democratic leaders who will boldly stand up to the GOP’s extremism in all 50 states — and we need your help to do it.
#
Let’s be real, Peter: **We need Democrats now more than ever.**
As the GOP uses their power to make themselves + their billionaire donors richer, we need Democratic leaders standing up for everyday Americans.
As the GOP spreads dangerous lies about our elections, we need Democratic leaders telling the truth + protecting the foundation of our democracy.
As the GOP pushes extreme abortion bans across the country, we need Democratic leaders defending our freedom + protecting reproductive rights.
And while the GOP threatens Social Security + Medicare, we need Democratic leaders committed to saving the benefits Americans like you have earned.
**We’re working to elect strong Democratic leaders who will boldly stand up to the GOP’s extremism in all 50 states** — and we need your help to do it.

subject: Blair’s off to first grade!
body:

---
| | Hi Peter,
---
| | As summer days give way to the freshness of a new school year, I find myself reflecting on the excitement and promise that back to school season brings. Our children, including my daughter, Blair, are stepping into halls of learning, ready to take on new challenges and grow. This time of year reminds me why investing in education is one of my top priorities. Every child deserves access to a high-quality education that opens doors to higher learning, well-paying jobs, and lifelong opportunities. As we gear up for the school year, I'm committed to ensuring our public schools receive the funding, resources, and support they need to help every child succeed.
---
|
---
**Blair this morning, ready for first grade!**
---
| | Here at home, Blair is enthusiastic about her books and new learning opportunities. This is the same passion I carry into my campaign—fighting for well-funded schools, competitive teacher salaries, and the educational resources our kids need to thrive, no matter where they live. To make this vision a reality, I need your support. [**A small contribution today will help us reach more families, advocate for better educational opportunities, and ensure every Virginia student gets the education they deserve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113555206/564165094/-42534385?refcode2=txt1&refcode=20250818bts_b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGQ0MjQ0NTEtNzM3Yy1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dm8kEeyyFUBI2bDLV3mxOdM8Kbe1U-yigYW674ErOtA=)

The longer we wait, the more we risk falling behind

|

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113555241/564165214/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EarlyInvestment_250818_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzViN2E1ZC03MzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEDmwlUbPJ5jeVyNn6_ing_sQSHLoaQ7GXylwulnNn0=) Derek,

In a moment, we’re going to ask you to [_**chip in to Mark Warner’s reelection campaign,**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113555242/564165215/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EarlyInvestment_250818_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzViN2E1ZC03MzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEDmwlUbPJ5jeVyNn6_ing_sQSHLoaQ7GXylwulnNn0=) but first, we want to tell you why your donation _today_ is so important.

Right now, we’re making major decisions about the size and scale of this campaign – including how many staff and organizers we can hire, when we can go on air with our ads, and other critical investments to reach voters across the Commonwealth.

But all of that depends on how much we raise in these early months.

Think about it: Trump’s allies could drop a $50 or $100 million super PAC against us at any moment, because Republicans know that if they defeat Senator Warner, Democrats will never win back a U.S. Senate majority.

_If we’re going to be ready to compete, we can’t wait until next year to start building our campaign. The longer we wait, the more we risk falling behind._

[_**So we’re asking: will you make an early investment in this campaign today by donating $5, $10, or anything you can give? It’s one of the most impactful things you can do to help reelect Mark Warner and flip the Senate Peter — As threats against federal judges and their families skyrocket, the rule of law is more tenuous than ever. **Approximately one-third of federal judges have received threats against them or their families since Donald Trump took office.** If judges fear for their lives or the safety of their families just for doing their jobs, then we are no longer living in a democracy governed by the rule of law. And our own president is exacerbating the issue. Donald Trump has targeted federal judges by name, attacked their integrity, and incited threats against them. He’s directly naming them and publicly mocking them from the most powerful office in the country — all because they are doing their jobs to provide checks on his authoritarian administration. And he knows exactly how his threats and attacks will be received by his followers — January 6 taught us that. By inciting these lawless attacks, Donald Trump is blatantly using the presidency to attack the rule of law and evade accountability. He is encouraging politically motivated attacks to intimidate the judiciary and silence anyone who stands in his way. **This isn’t just about Trump trying to escape justice. It’s about whether the rule of law still means anything in the United States.** That’s why I’m leading the bipartisan push to fully fund the _Daniel Anderl Judicial Security and Privacy Act_ , which would remove judges’ personal information from the internet and give them the tools to protect themselves and their families from doxxing and political violence. **No president is above the law, and no judges should fear for their safety just because they’re doing their jobs. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250818_2_brown?refcode=em20250818-1919&amount=5&refcode2=1919_582294_f99yJD&akid=1919%2E582294%2Ef99yJD)
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between Chris Pappas and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250818_2_brown?refcode=em20250818-1919&amount=5&refcode2=1919_582294_f99yJD&akid=1919%2E582294%2Ef99yJD)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250818_2_brown?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-1919&refcode2=1919_582294_f99yJD&akid=1919%2E582294%2Ef99yJD)**
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won._ When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won._
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
[**I’m personally asking: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now – split between my campaign and Chris Pappas’s – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250818_2_brown?refcode=em20250818-1919&amount=5&refcode2=1919_582294_f99yJD&akid=1919%2E582294%2Ef99yJD)
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250818-2?t=1&refcode2=1919_582294_f99yJD&akid=1919%2E582294%2Ef99yJD)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1919%2E582294%2Ef99yJD)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1919%2E582294%2Ef99yJD)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1919%2E582294%2Ef99yJD)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Delia Ramirez (via Working Families Party)
subject: Add your name: Block the bombs. End the atrocities in Gaza
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Tell Congress: Block the bombs. End the atrocities in Gaza | | | Peter, Last month, I was proud to introduce H.R. 3565 — **the Block the Bombs Act** — a bold step to end the U.S. government’s complicity in the ongoing atrocities in Gaza. This legislation would block the Trump administration from sending the most lethal offensive bombs and weaponry to the Israeli government while it continues to violate U.S. and international law and devastate Palestinian communities. As the Israeli government has continued to block lifesaving aid from reaching starving families in Gaza over the last few months, there has been a major shift in sentiment here in the U.S.:
* Polls show support for the Israeli military’s actions **collapsing** , especially among Democratic voters,1
* More than **half** of Senate Democrats just voted to block U.S. weapons sales to Israel, the first time that has ever happened,2
* And more than **31 members** of Congress have signed on as co-sponsors to the Block the Bombs Act in the House.3

All of this happening because of the pressure that everyday people are keeping on their elected representatives. [**Can you add your name today to urge your representative to support the Block the Bombs Act, and keep up the pressure to put an end to the mass starvation and ceaseless bombing in Gaza?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN94y0OBS97NGfj_kLHaARL_xPLX2CjkH67L5pPxrR8y0hPb-6t_qO-or-k1TdswnabroFfRR3b-5tAQGz5bg3EjwPGlHnxciy-3ddooWXf65XrkCIfakqwL8IPETUfMbrsk9GXBJMw4wHfkkrR9nPP4iOdyGpn9uBlgv9uGKnDmeCLf0M16R-nWDZYpWtGNtyggzNOLy1l2iuBz8HAiaunZvdi6h5kjUYFx55rpaW9sPNED8AlFBx12zl0DxHiDX4HhI5gcI6NhC47QeM9GqSMhjDwmQfsoY0cYbvonSO7jLNvj1PAxGTBFa0DGpoKWNfm/4j5/YJ-Mg7xTS9WxcMnXlIYtfA/h0/h001.OD6JizB0Cg0ypGbiA5vjNYpRMN9OPS9wr8rMfpJWy5Q) **[Add your name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN94y0OBS97NGfj_kLHaARL_xPLX2CjkH67L5pPxrR8y0hPb-6t_qO-or-k1TdswnabroFfRR3b-5tAQGz5bg3EjwPGlHnxciy-3ddooWXf65UUck_yKjhKD9BTdAm75aU0oN6r4kOZ9N95ffK6DlHo076C6KZru-Bn9d8EC9zQor9j4BOAzeaoVhLUM8uRCwKDg5v2yOqYiYCmBYCGWjET283J7z7Zj5llUmV3n_nM1NqkehU_JXwLa-2EWxAQxCA8t--RDmRcUiwhTsRIpdGQOd3jMNDIfd29W8WG7x-_-jora6SXjFAS238tobgKyGbS/4j5/YJ-Mg7xTS9WxcMnXlIYtfA/h1/h001.APDl3TENgd7mc54n4darJCzpCCajtzArg-BH5rYx6vQ)** Since October 2023, the U.S. has sent $20 billion in military aid to support Israel, including over 2,000 bombs — the same bombs used to level entire neighborhoods and kill thousands of innocent civilians. Tens of thousands of children are at risk of death due to Israel’s blockade.4 Hundreds of people seeking food and aid have been shot dead by IDF troops.5 **This moment demands courage.** Congress has the power and responsibility to act. And the international community cannot, and must not, turn a blind eye to genocide. The Block the Bombs Act is about more than just stopping American weapons from being used in Gaza — it’s about our values. It’s about whether we will continue funding human rights violations, or finally draw a line and say: we refuse to be complicit in war crimes. Please look up if your member of Congress is a co-sponsor of my bill [here](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYfbIlJMx_YFyWr8zCejJDBS2MVYF2gm172FT5qckIqCsYAjA3oUKD2Vp7qDekN9ztz1PCgwf6XPTJzUGcHwwrQfyKkSLN5qz-_oDJPZBjBEefNwoBOo81vVqTt4W_PgOgNmJrX46ch5ds83EGZDeGsOmIEfjiMgW6FJgcR9tfd2wfRKmiplfBxMVZPCdwHW28CQh7lNkrno4KkXDO390bUt5I2b7v_M26WUowYT_LK9BgJ264HaJ6Ls5lTgGVbU8icHZNaSAjI2xLkk1RJho87gW8AYmeOfSqIxwLek-yhpWj-yhskzlgvxKYJHFpgWJ2RpjeEXARj1GIPMB35zGXo/4j5/YJ-Mg7xTS9WxcMnXlIYtfA/h2/h001.EPftYbm9jazDUz1W_cVx-483ToxZJkHHmoOU82BA78E). [**Then sign my petition, and urge your representatives to support H.R. 3565, and help bring about an end to the mass slaughter in Gaza.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN94y0OBS97NGfj_kLHaARL_xPLX2CjkH67L5pPxrR8y0hPb-6t_qO-or-k1TdswnabroFfRR3b-5tAQGz5bg3EjwPGlHnxciy-3ddooWXf65WnbRZYzEFjc-ieYbENwzIBMvD5tOEemrIspbT-N1g3IkYd_ss8AZofR9wpfzOlhaK0Q86QmAeQhS3VM5ttqCGY7PHZTccTz8199VEawj9SZ7mHNltZwcEJH5U-pgFC3NOzvBIZQTY2SpD7wl5VT5gL_6jGVoaJ4_Cfm_iRtW1cGECrVG9fA7p7JvhGK88WPZr7CHTJN2FmMoX72YEq0FeU/4j5/YJ-Mg7xTS9WxcMnXlIYtfA/h3/h001.MwytUWFbF-lP5aqHGHIJxK9bAoHCAYMgbNJMLYn0P6k) In solidarity, Rep. Delia Ramirez

clean_body: Tell Congress: Block the bombs. End the atrocities in Gaza | | | Peter, Last month, I was proud to introduce H.R. 3565 — the Block the Bombs Act — a bold step to end the U.S. government’s complicity in the ongoing atrocities in Gaza. This legislation would block the Trump administration from sending the most lethal offensive bombs and weaponry to the Israeli government while it continues to violate U.S. and international law and devastate Palestinian communities. As the Israeli government has continued to block lifesaving aid from reaching starving families in Gaza over the last few months, there has been a major shift in sentiment here in the U.S.: Polls show support for the Israeli military’s actions collapsing , especially among Democratic voters,1 More than half of Senate Democrats just voted to block U.S. weapons sales to Israel, the first time that has ever happened,2 And more than 31 members of Congress have signed on as co-sponsors to the Block the Bombs Act in the House.3 All of this happening because of the pressure that everyday people are keeping on their elected representatives. Since October 2023, the U.S. has sent $20 billion in military aid to support Israel, including over 2,000 bombs — the same bombs used to level entire neighborhoods and kill thousands of innocent civilians. Tens of thousands of children are at risk of death due to Israel’s blockade.4 Hundreds of people seeking food and aid have been shot dead by IDF troops.5 This moment demands courage. Congress has the power and responsibility to act. And the international community cannot, and must not, turn a blind eye to genocide. The Block the Bombs Act is about more than just stopping American weapons from being used in Gaza — it’s about our values. It’s about whether we will continue funding human rights violations, or finally draw a line and say: we refuse to be complicit in war crimes. Please look up if your member of Congress is a co-sponsor of my bill . In solidarity, Rep. Delia Ramirez Illinois’ 3rd Congressional District Source: 1\. , GALLUP, July 29, 2025 2\. , The Hill, July 30, 2025 3\. , The Library of Congress 4\. , UNICEF USA, July 29, 2025 5\. , NPR, July 20, 2025 Thoughts? name: Team Pramila
subject: Trump is killing the IRS Direct File program. Guess who profits?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Trump administration recently announced plans to kill the IRS Direct File program.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250818-5351-footer&t=1&akid=5351%2E420207%2E2IUyrA)
Peter, everything Donald Trump does is a scam — and now he’s coming for your taxes, too.
The Trump administration recently announced plans to **kill the IRS Direct File program** , a free, simple way for millions of Americans to file their taxes online without paying a dime in fees to big tax prep corporations.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250818-1?refcode=em20250818-5351&amount=3&refcode2=5351_420207_2IUyrA&akid=5351%2E420207%2E2IUyrA)
The move comes after multi-billion corporations like Intuit and H&R Block spent millions lobbying to kill the program. Because if a free, public option exists, fewer people will use their services, and their profits will take the hit.
**Ending the IRS Direct File program doesn’t do anything to help working families — it _only_ helps corporate lobbyists and Trump’s billionaire friends.**
Pramila is fighting back against Trump’s scams in DC, but she can’t do it without your support. She doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, and she doesn’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs.
That means we’re up against Trump, MAGA Republicans, and corporate lobbyists with nothing but people power on our side.
[**So Peter, if you want to support the work Pramila is doing both inside and outside of Congress, will you pitch in $3 to support our campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250818-1?refcode=em20250818-5351&amount=3&refcode2=5351_420207_2IUyrA&akid=5351%2E420207%2E2IUyrA)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250818-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250818-5351&refcode2=5351_420207_2IUyrA&akid=5351%2E420207%2E2IUyrA)**
Together, we can build a government that puts working people before corporate profits.
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250818-5351-footer&t=2&refcode2=5351_420207_2IUyrA&akid=5351%2E420207%2E2IUyrA)**

body:
One man dead. Children at risk. Big Tech must be stopped. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/kuscJfq0J5AJRevzqazncui1MnmgZT36xsr_B2lTLe3uSmhDqeme_xQkcCRlfHx0SaCKihOCotbiDPJFRq-RfG4aeVTx3at355DCm-LtrG4-49aE3h0kA3guYrvWj24L8GLXSGzbSISGopDQ1aE2YJio3rXsEgUc3rQtHhyJYBbzHcyTHc-0FbQDJmhL3iPoejHvhwklKVWHzhmUtznxYIEGO_Xy1idS-BmDdLkhmWzBWXf7zi9u6wPGyGLGfE8o--CjUXdsUbBH7DbDvlB001ynIgwHWr82iQDsZq-H33lnQW0r9V9od6wz_LFocJhzdQfJEFu73jNmb9w_cIboOM_h2BjjQeDIS774il1fq0w0hQP279IQ72Lz1vUu1CoWW9_4jsU92vN-9YGAWPD3_THcmFBI7f11J9HhlwLt-QVuhv30BxBMoOC5raEgI11yLnD0tSTa7UhOFwe7gor4x9w15VkfuoXTFMyz_7hc7g/klUxJhVjJepS-xn4XskUZpfIdpjEXIed/12)

| | Peter, if you discovered an adult was having inappropriate, sensual conversations with your child, you’d call the police immediately. But what do you do when it’s a **chatbot** having that same conversation? Silicon Valley has unleashed AI chatbots across the internet—without safeguards, without accountability, and without regard for the human cost. For years, whistleblowers have warned that these digital oligarchs know exactly how dangerous their products are. But they push them anyway. Why? Because profit matters more than people. The result? Tragedy. A New Jersey man followed instructions from his “chatbot girlfriend.” On the way to meet her, he fell, hit his head, and later died. Children are being targeted in suggestive conversations by machines that never sleep and never stop. Big Tech is getting richer. Americans are getting hurt. Families are being put at risk. **Enough is enough.** These AI chatbots are out of control—and unless we fight back, it’s only going to get worse. _**[Silicon Valley is full of billionaires, millionaires and the army of lobbyists they employ. We need YOU. Every $10, $25, or $50 gift is fuel for this movement.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/ZAOsl13h8bphXURdWtuANqBRNVmlWa2B-PxPZsj8rP5xyQWpzdqdLRRffZmLrAFs6WLLqSuAnpedgZdbwK_iA0AWcMHppJGHStF3rEMVLFAaeQw3jItPW2t-hnvSI7DOYDqbZtOKTpokJmSy61JjskM5g8yQEMds8M_2ilIzbZ-9LjKGHZsSqIDkGGgMF42jXV93IBy-CdwL0YxS8aLj8hzPqhFqAL-uPnWZ4Rz293oCJs2RD3UibHo0yyTFAj4xmnDN8rysdAPHENAndI9mIfrlqmIzoeMuo5lU_mcWxLf3KFN3v2g2woPiUW4Fp-q2NIaKU2U8ZNBiabamxMi5PbgtBM2aRGPpi0rnnk7BxOwXbSJjGz63IodcX3fHnPLgMK1hkAd_gxAC0GtrZI0A4tjRCHMPqdsON4zz19yezeUHkEAYcsODkmQ8aUPQWbbG8CvzXGdpWiqwcE8mPLL4jKvCdS4Qejd4reWNzDgRNQ/Tm5hpQAzu3b4OdBdNru0Au_28r8VkyMs/12) **_ Will you stand with me against Silicon Valley’s greed before more lives are destroyed? When thousands of hardworking, God-fearing patriots step up together, no amount of Big Tech money can stop us.

clean_body: One man dead. Children at risk. Big Tech must be stopped. | | | | | | | Peter, if you discovered an adult was having inappropriate, sensual conversations with your child, you’d call the police immediately. But what do you do when it’s a chatbot having that same conversation? Silicon Valley has unleashed AI chatbots across the internet—without safeguards, without accountability, and without regard for the human cost. For years, whistleblowers have warned that these digital oligarchs know exactly how dangerous their products are. But they push them anyway. Why? Because profit matters more than people. The result? Tragedy. A New Jersey man followed instructions from his “chatbot girlfriend.” On the way to meet her, he fell, hit his head, and later died. Children are being targeted in suggestive conversations by machines that never sleep and never stop. Big Tech is getting richer. Americans are getting hurt. Families are being put at risk. Enough is enough. These AI chatbots are out of control—and unless we fight back, it’s only going to get worse. Will you stand with me against Silicon Valley’s greed before more lives are destroyed? When thousands of hardworking, God-fearing patriots step up together, no amount of Big Tech money can stop us. | | In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | | | | | | | |

With these cuts now the law, millions will lose food assistance, and countless kids will suffer. I have heard moving stories from our neighbors: a single parent who works overtime but still counts on SNAP to cover her kids’ school lunches, a retired veteran who relies on modest support to supplement his fixed income, and so many more. These are the real faces of SNAP, and they deserve better than partisan games. name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: People over politics
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Team,

Time and again, Trump and his allies have shown they're more interested in scoring political points than delivering for our communities. They’ll bring up just about any issue they can to rile up their base, just so they can turn around and give handouts to billionaires.

Our priorities could not be more different, friend.

I've fought for working people in Northern Ohio for decades. I've worked to renew and rebuild our aging infrastructure and bring down costs for life-saving prescription drugs. I've led the charge to invest in good-paying jobs to build an economy that actually works for workers.

Because this is my home too, and I'll never stop putting people over politics. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?=250818_mk_people_l1]

Chip in → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur25_em?refcode=250818_mk_people_b1]With you,

— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

GOP Rep. Laurel Lee **[slammed Democrat Rep. Jerry Nadler](https://substack.com/redirect/e0175072-d726-4da0-8a7c-f113a2e155e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for trashing Trump's attempt to reduce violent crime in Washington D.C.
"Let's start with reality!" Lee told Nadler. "We owe a responsibility to the citizens of Washington D.C. and the visitors from around the world to keep them safe! All too often they are being shot in the street!"
**[Watch the congress clash here:](https://substack.com/redirect/e0175072-d726-4da0-8a7c-f113a2e155e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **[Deep State](https://substack.com/redirect/cd78d9b0-a967-42cd-b666-c51b4f303bdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**[Fires A Warning Shot](https://substack.com/redirect/cd78d9b0-a967-42cd-b666-c51b4f303bdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[At Your Vote](https://substack.com/redirect/cd78d9b0-a967-42cd-b666-c51b4f303bdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**[And](https://substack.com/redirect/cd78d9b0-a967-42cd-b666-c51b4f303bdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[Your Future](https://substack.com/redirect/cd78d9b0-a967-42cd-b666-c51b4f303bdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd78d9b0-a967-42cd-b666-c51b4f303bdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It wasn't long ago there was an attempt to _**put Trump behind bars**_.
To _**bankrupt him**_ through legal fees.
And to _**even assassinate him**_ ... twice!
But President Trump has prevailed each and every time.
President Trump has repeatedly stated he wants to _**"demolish the deep state, "**_ and claims this to be his _**" final battle"**_**** against these shadowy figures.
But the truth is... the battle may have only just begun.
Rogue Judges across the country have tried to stop his actions at every turn. Congress hasn't been much help in passing his legislation, and the media is at his throat like always.
So, _**how will Trump bring prosperity to the American People**_ while the Deep State runs rampant, putting up roadblocks for everything he does for America? _**Will he be able to succeed in Making America Great Again?**_
Only time will tell, but thousands of American Patriots are preparing themselves for a worse case scenario. They _ARE NOT_ leaving things up to chance. They are helping to _**protect themselves**_ in case the Deep State has one more potential _ace up their sleeve._

* * *
# Marco Rubio's State Dept. revokes 6,000 student visa for anti-Israel protests and criminal activity
The State Department has **[revoked over 6,000 student visas](https://substack.com/redirect/ab786e1c-0b89-45d4-b3c2-51cbd9278991?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in 2025 for violations including visa overstays, criminal activity (assault, DUIs, burglary), and support for terrorism, with Secretary of State Marco Rubio targeting students who participated in pro-Palestinian protests.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e895d080-d7bb-4e78-a93e-814c07dd02f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Approximately 4,000 visa revocations were for criminal violations** , including roughly 800 students charged with assault, while 200-300 had visas pulled for terrorism support such as fundraising for Hamas, a designated terrorist organization.
* **The Trump administration has dramatically increased visa revocations** , pulling approximately 40,000 total visas in 2025 compared to just 16,000 during the same period under the Biden administration, representing a 150% increase.
* **Democrats have criticized the crackdown as violating due process** , with Sen. Jeff Merkley (D-Ore.) calling it a "fundamental attack on freedom," while the administration justifies the actions under executive orders aimed at protecting national security and combating antisemitism.

* * *

There is one thing that keeps a violent predator from recidivating and it is called PRISON!!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "People are being shot in the street! There is one thing that keeps a violent predator from recidivating and it is called PRISON!!" | | | Aug 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | GOP Rep. Laurel Lee for trashing Trump's attempt to reduce violent crime in Washington D.C. "Let's start with reality!" Lee told Nadler. "We owe a responsibility to the citizens of Washington D.C. and the visitors from around the world to keep them safe! All too often they are being shot in the street!" BONUS VIDEO: GOP brawler SCHOOLS Kaitlan Collins on how Trump's spending bill is actually helping real Americans GOP Rep. Mike Flood on Trump's spending bill, telling Kaitlan Collins directly that the Democrats' complaints are bogus and empty. "The working class' heart and soul is with the Republican Party!" Flood fired back at Collins. "We've been beaten by other countries for too long!" | | ---|---|--- It wasn't long ago there was an attempt to put Trump behind bars. To bankrupt him through legal fees. And to even assassinate him ... twice! But President Trump has prevailed each and every time. President Trump has repeatedly stated he wants to "demolish the deep state, " and claims this to be his " final battle"** against these shadowy figures. But the truth is... the battle may have only just begun. Rogue Judges across the country have tried to stop his actions at every turn. Congress hasn't been much help in passing his legislation, and the media is at his throat like always. So, how will Trump bring prosperity to the American People while the Deep State runs rampant, putting up roadblocks for everything he does for America? Will he be able to succeed in Making America Great Again? Only time will tell, but thousands of American Patriots are preparing themselves for a worse case scenario. They ARE NOT leaving things up to chance. They are helping to protect themselves in case the Deep State has one more potential ace up their sleeve. Marco Rubio's State Dept. revokes 6,000 student visa for anti-Israel protests and criminal activity The State Department has in 2025 for violations including visa overstays, criminal activity (assault, DUIs, burglary), and support for terrorism, with Secretary of State Marco Rubio targeting students who participated in pro-Palestinian protests. | | ---|---|--- Approximately 4,000 visa revocations were for criminal violations , including roughly 800 students charged with assault, while 200-300 had visas pulled for terrorism support such as fundraising for Hamas, a designated terrorist organization. The Trump administration has dramatically increased visa revocations , pulling approximately 40,000 total visas in 2025 compared to just 16,000 during the same period under the Biden administration, representing a 150% increase. Democrats have criticized the crackdown as violating due process , with Sen. Jeff Merkley (D-Ore.) calling it a "fundamental attack on freedom," while the administration justifies the actions under executive orders aimed at protecting national security and combating antisemitism. | | | | ---|---|--- | 7:23 PM | | | | | ---|---|--- | 8:43 PM | You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm back, Peter.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081825_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081825_1]
Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today , I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio. Will you chip in $25 or more now – split between The Real Texas PAC and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081825_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?express_lane=true&refcode=081825_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081825_1&amount=25]
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won . When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won .
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.
I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $25 now – split between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=081825_1]
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown

But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. **That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead.** [Will you chip in $10 or more now — split between the Democratic Party of Georgia and me — to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in Ohio, and build a fairer future for us all? I need your support from day one to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113557845/564173881/1891044181?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081825_BROWNSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTVmMmVjMi03YzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J3bjUf5VF54vEyaroIrIIaOn5_Mf6RErEGULAylaQv4=) I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work — the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward — from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. _But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price._ Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. **Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued — but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask:** [Will you be one of the first donors to my 2026 campaign by giving $25 or $10 now, split between the Democratic Party of Georgia and me? This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and corporate special interests will spend millions to defeat me. Your early support is critical to making sure I can fight back and win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113557846/564173882/1891044181?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081825_BROWNSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTVmMmVjMi03YzdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J3bjUf5VF54vEyaroIrIIaOn5_Mf6RErEGULAylaQv4=) I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown

clean_body: When I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = = Peter, I never planned to run for office again. But when I see what’s happening in Washington, I know I can’t stand on the sidelines. D.C. politicians are raising prices, gutting health care, and rigging the system to benefit their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. It’s government for the rich and powerful, always at the expense of workers. That’s why, today, I’m getting back in the fight: I’m announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate. I’m running to be a voice for Ohio families and to take on the billionaires and corporations that make it impossible for everyday folks to get ahead. = I’ve fought my entire life for the Dignity of Work — the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Whether you earn a salary or work for tips, are farming crops or raising kids, are going to school or caring for an aging parent. I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together in pushing this mission forward — from protecting pensions to lowering drug prices to holding Wall Street accountable. But right now, there is no one in Washington willing to keep this fight up, and hardworking families are paying the price. Corporate profits are going up. Executive salaries are up. Even workers’ own productivity is up. Yet wages are flat, and the cost of living is rising. Peter, we can build a future where workers share in the wealth they create and where hard work is truly valued — but it’s going to take a massive grassroots movement full of dedicated folks like you. That’s why I’m running for Senate again, and why I need to ask: = I love Ohio, and I love this country. And when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Fellow American!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , **Fellow American**!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**
---
**Listen Fellow American, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. __I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU!__ **
---

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The military takeover of our nation’s capital
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Donald Trump and his far-right administration have deployed the National
Guard and taken control over Washington, DC’s metropolitan police, all in
the name of cracking down on violent crime, which is at a 30-year low for
the district.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250818?refcode=em20250818-36938&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36938_1203867_9eBDoE&akid=36938%2E1203867%2E9eBDoE ]A post on X from Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib: Trump sending in the U.S.
military to take over our nation's capital is a test run to target other
major cities. This is the work of an authoritarian, deploying the National
Guard to silence dissent in D.C. and militarize Black neighborhoods. We
cannot normalize this.

With the heightened military presence, community members are being
subjected to random traffic stops, with multiple videos taken of masked,
armed ICE agents terrorizing neighborhoods and violently disappearing
people like food delivery workers just trying to do their jobs.

As part of this crackdown, Trump cruelly plans to round up unhoused people
across the district and put them in jail if they have nowhere else to go.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250818?refcode=em20250818-36938&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36938_1203867_9eBDoE&akid=36938%2E1203867%2E9eBDoE ]A post on X from Rep. Ilhan Omar: Trump’s plan to round up unhoused
people and jail them for being poor is beyond cruel. The answer to
homelessness is more affordable housing and community resources, not
military crackdowns.

This is what fascism looks like,
Peter. Trump’s military takeover of DC is an
authoritarian show of force, and he’s already suggested doing it to other
major U.S. cities.

Everyday people in DC are being attacked and snatched up by gangs of
alleged officers with no uniforms, explanation, justification, or due
process. This is lawlessness.

This is a naked power grab to make Americans afraid of their own
government & distract from the real crimes happening in DC — Republicans
in Congress trying to cover up everything from the Epstein files to their
own legislation which would kick nearly 20 million people off their health
insurance to pay for billionaires’ trillion dollar tax cut.

We cannot and will not let this wannabe dictator use fear-mongering around
crime and immigrants to take over our cities. Justice Democrats like
Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar are loudly speaking out and fighting back,
but the Democratic establishment — including DC’s own mayor — is not doing
enough to stop this.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250818?refcode=em20250818-36938&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36938_1203867_9eBDoE&akid=36938%2E1203867%2E9eBDoE ]Help us re-elect our bold, progressive incumbents and send more Justice
Democrats to Congress in 2026 to fight this fascism with the urgency and
strength it deserves: pitch in $5 or more to fuel our work.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250818?refcode=em20250818-36938&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36938_1203867_9eBDoE&akid=36938%2E1203867%2E9eBDoE ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250818-36938-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36938_1203867_9eBDoE&akid=36938%2E1203867%2E9eBDoE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36938%2E1203867%2E9eBDoE

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

The Alaska Summit has concluded and President Trump stated emphatically that he is seeking a complete end to the war in Russia-Ukraine. The meeting didn't seem to have any immediate results but like Ronald Reagan's Reykjavik Summit the results came in the days and weeks after which ultimately ended the cold war. After all, it was President Biden's comment about a 'minor incursion' that emboldened Putin on the invasion of Ukraine. President Trump is here cleaning up a mess he didn't create even as Putin says he wouldn't of invaded if Trump was our president. Retired Department of Defense Intel Operative Tony Shaffer is here to unpack everything happening with Russia and how this all might pay out.

subject: Hey you! (yes, YOU, Peter).

body:
Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? If you do, I’m BEGGING YOU to read this email...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._WE1oILEVDPOtQ)Hey you!
Yes, you, Peter.
No, not your laptop. The person looking at it!
I was really hoping to reach you today.
This is Congressman Troy Downing, and I want to thank you for opening my message. Can I borrow just one more minute of your time?
**President Donald J. Trump and House Republicans have accomplished a historic eight-month run unlike anything in modern American history.**
_🇺🇸 We secured the border 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We brought back American jobs 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We cut taxes for working Americans 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We reduced government waste 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We eliminated the woke agenda 🇺🇸_ The tide has turned in our favor.
**_BUT!!! BUT!!! BUT!!!_**
**WE CAN’T REST ON OUR LAURELS NOW!!!**
The Democrats are more desperate than ever.
They’ve doubled down on extremism with their unhinged socialist economic policies, woke DEI agenda, and aggressive climate change plan.
They’ve become a dangerous cabal that **CANNOT BE TRUSTED** with America’s future.
If the pro-Trump GOP can hold the majority through 2028 and solidify America’s Golden Age.
But we need the funds to make it happen NOW!
The further we fall behind the Democrats in fundraising, the closer we get to losing our chance.
**_Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? It’s time to prove it._**
I’m not asking you to risk life and limb for your country (though I think you would). I’m just requesting $17 to lock in a Republican House Majority for two more years. [Is it worth it to you?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-AJ907IQJRxfuei7g)[CHIP IN $17 RIGHT NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)–Troy| |

clean_body: Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? If you do, I’m BEGGING YOU to read this email... you! Yes, you, Peter. No, not your laptop. The person looking at it! I was really hoping to reach you today. This is Congressman Troy Downing, and I want to thank you for opening my message. Can I borrow just one more minute of your time? President Donald J. Trump and House Republicans have accomplished a historic eight-month run unlike anything in modern American history. 🇺🇸 We secured the border 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 We brought back American jobs 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 We cut taxes for working Americans 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 We reduced government waste 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 We eliminated the woke agenda 🇺🇸 The tide has turned in our favor. BUT!!! BUT!!! BUT!!! WE CAN’T REST ON OUR LAURELS NOW!!! The Democrats are more desperate than ever. They’ve doubled down on extremism with their unhinged socialist economic policies, woke DEI agenda, and aggressive climate change plan. They’ve become a dangerous cabal that CANNOT BE TRUSTED with America’s future. If the pro-Trump GOP can hold the majority through 2028 and solidify America’s Golden Age. But we need the funds to make it happen NOW! The further we fall behind the Democrats in fundraising, the closer we get to losing our chance. Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? It’s time to prove it. I’m not asking you to risk life and limb for your country (though I think you would). I’m just requesting $17 to lock in a Republican House Majority for two more years. –Troy| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Friend, Donald Trump still can’t process that he lost the 2020 election. It’s why he refused to concede. It’s why he sent a mob to the Capitol. And now, it’s why he’s now calling to **eliminate** mail-in voting altogether – one of the most safe and secure ways Americans cast their ballots. **Let’s be clear: There was no major fraud. No stolen election. No massive conspiracy.** But that hasn’t stopped Trump from doubling down on lies, and now he’s vowing to lead a national movement to ban vote-by-mail entirely. States – not Trump and his unhinged Truth Social posts – control elections. And we intend to keep it that way. [**But doing that without federal help takes serious resources. name: AbdulForSenate.com
subject: No matter what our opponents say on the campaign trail, these are the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250818-760&t=1001&akid=760%2E251025%2EBgaH76 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250818-760&t=1002&akid=760%2E251025%2EBgaH76 ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

Take a look at this chart from The Detroit News, which details how much
money Michigan Senate candidates have taken from corporate PACs:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250818-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250818-760&refcode2=760_251025_BgaH76&akid=760%2E251025%2EBgaH76 ]A chart displaying the top corporate PAC donors to Michigan Senate
candidates. Abdul is not one of the candidates listed.

Did you notice how Abdul is not included in their list of candidates?
That’s because he’s never accepted corporate PAC donations. Not now, not
ever.

The other candidates in this race can’t say the same.

No matter what our opponents say on the campaign trail, these are the
facts: They’ve cashed checks from big tech firms, healthcare insurers,
defense contractors, and Michigan's two largest utility monopolies.

We believe that when you take corporate PAC money, you work for them.

Our campaign is fully funded by people, so we answer only to the people —
including you,
Peter.

But that also means the only way we can compete and win is if grassroots
supporters like you step up today. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250818-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250818-760&refcode2=760_251025_BgaH76&akid=760%2E251025%2EBgaH76 ]Can you pitch in any amount to fuel
our campaign?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250818-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250818-760&refcode2=760_251025_BgaH76&akid=760%2E251025%2EBgaH76 ]Donate $10 ››

Let’s prove that in Michigan, the people still decide who represents us —
not corporate PACs.

Thank you,

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1007&akid=760%2E251025%2EBgaH76
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1008&akid=760%2E251025%2EBgaH76

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

body:
The date is set for this crucial Special Election |
---

| | | The freedom to vote is on the ballot in 2025 and beyond, and **Fair Fight is teaming up with the Georgia Senate Dems** to help flip this seat from red to blue. Winning races like this one is vital to stopping Georgia lawmakers from passing new voter suppression laws. Keep reading to learn more — Election Day is coming up fast!
---
Big news, friend: **The date of the Special Election in GA Senate District-21 has been set for August 26th!** In less than two weeks, Democrat Debra Shigley has an opportunity to flip this critical seat blue in the Georgia State Senate.
This seat is being vacated by a far-right Trump appointee. Debra Shigley is running as a common-sense Democrat — she’ll bring pragmatic leadership focused on lowering costs for families, investing in our public schools, and expanding access to healthcare.
[**Georgia Senate Dems are going all out to help elect Debra Shigley and other Democrat challengers in key districts across our state. Seats like this one could swing the State Senate blue and we only have a couple weeks to fundraise our way to victory. Can you chip in a split donation with Fair Fight today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113559020/564177739/1468145729?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250818_T1_GADemsSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGE5MTUzMy04MTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjzbW9pskmxRYeSgwcRZ1WB5fgJjXyi1G6A43GtB3F4=)
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113559021/564177740/1468145729?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250818_T1_GADemsSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGE5MTUzMy04MTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjzbW9pskmxRYeSgwcRZ1WB5fgJjXyi1G6A43GtB3F4=)

August 26th is just around the corner. The nature of the Special Election means that every dollar raised must go out the door immediately to amplify Debra’s message to every voter in the district. _And while these races often get less attention than they deserve, the consequences are enormous._
**We can’t afford to wait. It’s time to replace the far-right Republican with a candidate who has Georgians’ best interests at heart.**
[**We’re putting all our effort behind electing Debra Shigley so we can continue building Democratic political power in Georgia. name: VoteVets.org
subject: Join us: Take the National Guard off the street
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
National Guardsmen aren’t full time soldiers. They have jobs back home. They sign up to serve their communities and help their neighbors.
#
Peter, National Guardsmen aren’t full time soldiers. They have jobs back home.
They sign up to serve their communities and help their neighbors. They respond to hurricanes, floods, earthquakes — and, if need be, foreign threats on American soil.
They are not, and have never been, meant to stand against peaceful American citizens.
But as we speak, the DC National Guard is patrolling the streets of our nation’s capital. The governors of South Carolina and West Virginia have sent their National Guard to the capital. And it’s been confirmed that these Troops are going to start carrying weapons in short order.
It’s a political stunt, it’s a dictator move — and you can bet that Trump is salivating at the thought of escalation. He wants any excuse to go even further than he already has.
This is still our country, but that’s only going to continue to be true if we join our voices and unite.
**[We’re asking you to join VoteVets and help us send these Guard Troops home. Sign on and demand Trump end this NOW.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250818_vv_national_guard/?source=em250818-1-30&akid=34539%2E3013755%2EuuxI-R)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250818_vv_national_guard/?source=em250818-1-30&akid=34539%2E3013755%2EuuxI-R)
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My oath:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e29731182/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvU2NTUEpnR2hxQw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTg/LbmNsTjdvSVhiYQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM5UkRTS0E2RkJqelhscw/gaKOnoA/san95ecc790)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
**_“So help me God.”_**
---
On May 20, 1981, I raised my right hand and took an oath to defend the Constitution against all enemies, _foreign and domestic._
---
**So when President Trump asked me to serve as his lawyer and fight for his freedom and justice,_I did not hesitate even for a second!_ **
---
I took an oath: Justice _had_ to be done – _no matter the price_.
---
_And now, I’ve learned the price._
---
**I’m staring down a 20-year prison sentence in a case where the President _legally_ cannot issue a pardon to save me.**
---
**And after 52 YEARS of faithfully serving the law,_ALL_ of my law licenses have been taken away from me as a way to stop me from defending myself in court.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, _my ONLY chance was to hire a top-notch defense team_.**
---
_But through legal warfare, the Left pushed me to the brink of**BANKRUPTCY** – at one point, my Social Security and bank accounts were even FROZEN._
---
_President Trump once said that I had “guts” for defending him against the vengeful and bloodthirsty Deep State._
---
Truth be told, that wasn’t about courage – that was me simply honoring my oath.
---
**_But what I’m about to do right now will truly take guts..._**
---
_God knows I hate this, but I’m about to ask for your help._
---
Patriot, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea – _a Hail Mary_ – to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
**_No matter what happens, I’m holding on to the final words of my oath: “ _So help me God_ ”._**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my own freedom and justice**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

name: Senator Jon Husted
subject: I've heard the whispers about Chuck Schumer’s handpicked candidate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Husted for Senate
body:
With your support, I know we can defend the values that make Ohio special and firmly tell Chuck to stay away!
** LAST CHANCE: TELL CHUCK SCHUMER TO STAY OUT OF OHIO **Hi, Fellow American - This is Jon Husted.
After spending the last seven months fighting in D.C., I've realized that the values of Washington and Ohio are worlds apart.
I've heard the whispers about Chuck Schumer's handpicked candidate. Now is our opportunity to show Chuck that we don't want him or his allies representing Ohio, and we refuse to go backwards.
1974 was a pivotal year in politics.
I barely remember it as a six-year-old, but it marked significant changes: Joe Biden became the youngest member elected to the Senate, Sherrod Brown, a recent Yale graduate, was elected in Ohio, and Chuck Schumer, who graduated from Harvard the same year as Brown, was elected in New York.
Do they really want to return to those "good old days"? Ohio knows better. We will not be subjected to the radical policies of California and New York anymore.
We refuse to go back to:
* Open borders
* Criminals roaming our cities without law enforcement to intervene
* $8 for a dozen eggs
* A Senator who votes with Bernie Sanders and Chuck Schumer 99% of the time

Brown claims to be for Ohio, but the truth is, he's never left D.C. He is out of touch with the values that make our country great: faith, hard work, and the courage to fight for what's right.
[With your support, I know we can defend the values that make Ohio special and firmly tell Chuck to stay away!](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fd0cba733f4743cbb978c2f49c652203&_e=jjczW6QjYBja4k2IfKRzFphxNdkBhgqNEPghyczyHK8v4mpVSbGX9A66bF9DsVTrwdKQm7zQLV6GCiFbNNFC8PsY3gwUphrTL46T2dqksdSEHYOEnz5isdWJfisxm9magMPLUzGUdP-yuUhughwYSxO_zpH1tbYYoPSmPhJ3vePhX-BX76J9dHU4y-CYMm1ZuQq6u8xSWFZA_SbcBZjLBjW1ZrjVCWcwB8_3SZ2aUrFdHt280QhuRQU7dNCfL7NF5_KbN58-i9nF5DkzcTmnI5Y6jOuEe1kItgZq8x6AP1rZoBGu8wfgGOtgmhXkf7YRdG493eKiu_buUGabMNqicSSOYasnd1JYqgUl5BlspqyqPtOeGkNF7QkqHo1dA_54TZkMAQgPjwL9rzcnYuIcnffFM5600RfUSex-se6m8SVtGihDYHn2y5uGXqY0EWz2cnJX676p5LGglAun67wrEvZ8pS5g5p_q2XTLu4v6Sp9T28TQcd1MmToMiU_RzlQBWtQ4PAu2z3gnvw7ui2yaDuZfJv1Qa611C8pv7G4Mezs2GM2dhoy2-PTlelJmWDawX4O1JEs_m4uggf0zKNEZZYl9ZoOOvQbYdRUWgdXNmptFMLxhM7aIhgQ9H_mEkwg-dKJJdA--4PTAzYSLxTcIXPUbCSQkrtzxGQaSaT4vRQNmPGqPiaogHIkjV1qh4SzhmYq8Zl85B6mva3UZIk4W_yc7FY2p5m2P1jT1dou-eDGbSdF3WeIBoWd9hUFFNCNK)[Tell Chuck Schumer to Stay OUT of Ohio >>

We refuse to go back to: Open borders Criminals roaming our cities without law enforcement to intervene $8 for a dozen eggs A Senator who votes with Bernie Sanders and Chuck Schumer 99% of the time Brown claims to be for Ohio, but the truth is, he's never left D.C. He is out of touch with the values that make our country great: faith, hard work, and the courage to fight for what's right. counting on your endorsement to help keep Ohio RED. For Faith, Freedom, and Ohio, Jon Husted| | | | | Paid for by Husted for Senate P.O. Box 6290 Columbus, OH 43206
