name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Special news to share …
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4803?t=2&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L)
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4804?t=3&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L)
null: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[Will you chip in $5 or more now – split between my campaign and Haley Stevens' – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4804?t=4&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation between Haley Stevens and Sherrod Brown will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4805?t=5&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4806?t=6&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4807?t=7&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4804?t=8&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L)
---
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won_.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking, null: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now – split between my campaign and Haley Stevens’ – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4808?t=9&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L)**
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4809?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4803?t=11&akid=629%2E49239%2E_-tJ9L)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

TRUMP Alert: Donald Trump has said he will issue an executive order targeting mail ballots ahead of the midterms.
Chip in now to help elect an attorney general who will fight back! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250818-email]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250818-email]
Team — Trump has taken the next step in undermining our democracy. Today, he announced that he would issue an executive order banning mail ballots and targeting voting equipment across the country. Jena has stopped Trump before, and she’ll do it again.
This is an attack on our democracy and an attempt to disenfranchise millions. Trump is afraid that if eligible Americans vote, his MAGA movement is toast.
We’ve seen Trump try this authoritarian playbook since 2020. As Secretary of State, Jena has repeatedly fought back against Trump’s attacks and won. As Attorney General, she will keep up that fight to protect the will of the people and our elections.
But she can’t do it without your support. Chip in any amount you can right now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250818-email]
Thanks for standing with us.

---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** August 18th, 2025Contact: nathan@nathanmagsig.com
---
| | | | | **Magsig Announces Key Tulare County Endorsements**
**(Clovis, CA)** \- Today, Nathan Magsig announced that he received the endorsements of Tulare Supervisor Pete Vander Poel III and Tulare Supervisor Dennis Townsend for his State Senate campaign.
Magsig released the following statement: _“It is an honor to have the support of my colleagues Supervisor Townsend and Vander Poel. Tulare and Fresno County have been partners for decades in securing additional water for our farmers, strengthening our local economy, and keeping our communities safe.”_ Magsig continued,_“Our counties also partner on critical services like the San Joaquin Valley Insurance Authority, where we provide high quality health insurance at affordable prices to our hard working county employees and families. I look forward to continuing our partnership in the State Senate.”_
This announcement comes right after Magsig previously reported an impressive fundraising haul of over $500,000. Supervisor Townsend and Vander Poel join an extensive list of endorsers for Magsig’s State Senate campaign, including:
Assemblyman David Tangipa, Fresno County Supervisor Buddy Mendes, Fresno County Supervisor Brian Pacheco, Fresno County Supervisor Luis Chavez, Fresno County Supervisor Garry Bredefeld, Fresno County DA Lisa Smittcamp, Fresno County Sheriff John Zanoni, Fresno Mayor Jerry Dyer, Fmr. Fresno Sheriff Margaret Mims, Fresno City Councilman Nick Richardson, Fresno City Councilman Mike Karbassi, Clovis Mayor Pro-Tem Diane Pierce, Clovis Mayor Vong Mouanoutoua, Clovis City Councilman Matt Basgall, Clovis City Councilman Drew Bessinger, Fmr. Sec of State Bill Jones, Kingsburg Mayor Brandon Purcell, Kingsburg Mayor Pro Tem Vince Palomar, Fmr. Kingsburg Mayor Michelle Roman, Mike DerManouel Jr. & Sr., and Richard and Karen Spencer.

---
| ###
Nathan Magsig is a current Fresno County Supervisor, former Mayor of Clovis, and is running for the 12th Senate District. His family, wife Julie and their three children, reside in Clovis, CA.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Together, we’ve built something powerful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
With the final stops of our Lift Up New Mexico Tour this week, I’ve now visited all 33 counties in our beautiful state.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3884%2E400544%2EDmAD0o)
We did it!
**With the final stops of our Lift Up New Mexico Tour last week, I’ve now visited all 33 counties in our beautiful state.**
From the mesas of McKinley County to the chile fields of Doña Ana, I’ve met New Mexicans who inspire me at every single stop. And our last swing was a reminder of just how much promise lives in our rural communities.
In **Moriarty** , I met with farmers and small business owners whose entrepreneurial spirit keeps their town thriving. They reminded me why I’m running for governor — so every rural community has access to prosperity.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250818_2_liftupnm?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-3884&refcode2=3884_400544_DmAD0o&akid=3884%2E400544%2EDmAD0o)
In **Fort Sumner** , I met people who live fiercely every day! With a robust tourism industry rooted in unique history, folks there shared smart ideas for strengthening and expanding industries that keep their local economy strong.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250818_2_liftupnm?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-3884&refcode2=3884_400544_DmAD0o&akid=3884%2E400544%2EDmAD0o)
And in **Tucumcari** , we talked transportation and renewable energy. I left inspired by their vision for a clean energy economy that lowers utility bills and builds reliable jobs in rural New Mexico.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250818_2_liftupnm?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-3884&refcode2=3884_400544_DmAD0o&akid=3884%2E400544%2EDmAD0o)
Everywhere I went, I heard the same thing: people want a governor who will listen, understand their struggles, and fight like hell to make things better for everyday people.
That’s what this tour was all about. But with Trump in the White House and his allies working to roll back the progress we’ve made, **our conversations can’t end here.**
We still have a long way to go in this race, and I need your help to continue meeting voters where they are and making sure their voices are heard.
[**If you can, will you pitch in $5 today to help power the next phase of our grassroots campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250818_2_liftupnm?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-3884&refcode2=3884_400544_DmAD0o&akid=3884%2E400544%2EDmAD0o)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250818_2_liftupnm?amount=5&refcode=em20250818-3884&refcode2=3884_400544_DmAD0o&akid=3884%2E400544%2EDmAD0o)**
Together, we’ve already built something powerful: a campaign that’s reached people in every corner of New Mexico. Now I’m counting on your help to keep that momentum going all the way to the governor’s office.
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250818-2&t=2&refcode2=3884_400544_DmAD0o&akid=3884%2E400544%2EDmAD0o)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3884%2E400544%2EDmAD0o)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3884%2E400544%2EDmAD0o)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5591%2E196590%2E5_fiZD). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4394?t=2&akid=5591%2E196590%2E5_fiZD)
---
| Team: when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.

So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.

**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[_Will you chip in $25 or more now – split between The Long Run and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4395?t=3&akid=5591%2E196590%2E5_fiZD)**
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4396?t=4&akid=5591%2E196590%2E5_fiZD)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4397?t=6&akid=5591%2E196590%2E5_fiZD)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4398?t=8&akid=5591%2E196590%2E5_fiZD)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4399?t=10&akid=5591%2E196590%2E5_fiZD)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4400?t=12&akid=5591%2E196590%2E5_fiZD)
---
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.

This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.

When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won.

Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.

**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**

[_**I’m personally asking: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $25 now – split between my campaign and The Long Run – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4395?t=14&akid=5591%2E196590%2E5_fiZD)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4395?t=15&akid=5591%2E196590%2E5_fiZD)
---
Thank you for standing with me.

In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.

This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.

When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won_.

Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.

**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**

[**_I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $25 now – split between my campaign and Laura Gillen’s – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113559515/564179567/-1142980496?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-08-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTM5ZDYyMy04NTdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3-qGWH_uenygGBexJuzOW09GZGjTYAedVXVUZinzEQ=)

In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown

clean_body: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. | Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service. So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends. That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. Today, I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.= | | | = | = | = | = | = I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do. This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to. When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won. Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one. Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support. = Thank you for standing with me. In solidarity, Sherrod Brown * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Supreme Court Sets October 8 Argument for Challenge to Illinois’ 14-Day Post–Election Ballot Counting
body:
Judicial Watch announced that the Supreme Court of the United States has scheduled oral argument for October 8, 2025, in its lawsuit filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 18, 2025

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that the Supreme Court of the United States has scheduled oral argument for October 8, 2025, in its lawsuit filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 18, 2025 ---|---|--- | | | | RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" \- Sean Hannity Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that the Supreme Court of the United States has scheduled oral argument for October 8, 2025, in its lawsuit filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law. ---|--- | | | | | “Counting ballots received after Election Day is a flagrant violation of federal law and encourages fraud and voter distrust,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Let us hope that the Supreme Court will decline to hear Mississippi’s senseless attempt to overturn a historic decision that sensibly concluded that counting ballots received after Election Day is unlawful.” ---|--- | | | | | In yet another important immigration story ignored by the mainstream media, federal authorities in Texas arrested more than 350 gang members with a distressing 1,700 criminal convictions who entered the United States illegally over 1,400 times. ---|--- | | | | | Over a decade after the U.S. government offered a $5 million reward for information on the whereabouts of an Al Qaeda operative it released from the military prison at Guantanamo Bay an intelligence report reveals that like him dozens of detainees freed from the compound have rejoined terrorist missions. They are part of the hundreds of Gitmo terrorists discharged over the years under a controversial program that started with President George W. Bush and continued full throttle under the Obama administration. Numerous military and intelligence reports have for years documented that many of the captives return to terrorism after leaving the top security prison at the Naval station in southeast Cuba. ---|--- | | | The Hill Once again, newly released documents and damning evidence conclusively substantiate what many Americans have long suspected. Russiagate was a conspiracy — hatched, implemented and relentlessly promoted by top officials in the CIA, FBI and across the Obama-Biden-Clinton political machine to rig a presidential election and undermine a duly elected president. It also corrupted the very institutions essential to protecting American liberty. New York Post “Damning evidence” now shows “conclusively” that “Russiagate was a conspiracy — hatched, implemented and relentlessly promoted by top officials in the CIA, FBI and across the Obama-Biden-Clinton political machine to rig a presidential election and undermine a duly elected president,” fumes Tom Fitton at The Hill. Just the News Newly released internal memos confirm the Department of Homeland Security and FBI had longstanding concerns about Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz and his connections to the Chinese Communist Party, especially after he was selected by Vice President Kamala Harris as her presidential running mate last year. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2025, All Rights Reserved |

name: Team AOC
subject: Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Donate any amount and we’ll mail you our Tax the Rich sticker!
#
This kind of wealth is simply not good for society.
When we say “tax the rich,” we mean:
* Nesting-doll yacht rich.
* For-profit prison rich.
* Student-loan-shark rich.
* Trick-the-country-into-war rich.
* Subsidizing-workforce-w-food-stamps rich.
* Trillionaires-paying-less-taxes-than-working-people rich.

Alexandria is determined to fight for economic justice for all of us — and against tax breaks for billionaires like Elon Musk or people with yachts and private jets.
[So today, contribute any amount and we’ll mail you our union-made Tax the Rich sticker as a thank you for supporting our movement for economic justice.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202508-sticker._MVdVl&refcode=em20250818-9569-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9569%2E2526796%2EM0iT-W)

**[Get Your Sticker](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-202508-sticker._MVdVl&refcode=em20250818-9569-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9569%2E2526796%2EM0iT-W)**
We’re so grateful for all your support. Thank you for being with us.
More soon,
Team AOC

name: Tobias Read
subject: Do you support voting from home?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250818em-ob1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250818em-ob1]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I believe voting from home gives every Oregonian a fair and secure chance to hold politicians accountable—and it saves money and time, too.
But some Republicans want to block voting from home by imposing unnecessary barriers.
There’s only one explanation for this: Opponents to voting at home want to make it harder for regular people to participate in our democracy.
So I’m standing up to them and I’m fighting to protect the right to vote from home for all Oregon voters.
But I need to know you're with me: If you support my efforts to expand vote-by-mail access, please consider donating to help me continue fighting today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250818em-ob1]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250818em-ob1]
Thank you for using your voice – speaking out is the most powerful way to make an impact, and I’m grateful to have your support.
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250818em-ob1]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Jon Ossoff Campaign Team
subject: We are asking you to reflect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

👋 Jon Ossoff’s campaign team is asking all Democrats to read this short 1-minute message before you click away. 🇺🇸
**It's Monday, August 18, and we are humbly asking you to make a contribution to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign _today._**

We're asking you to reflect on the work Jon Ossoff does in the Senate to fight back against Trump and MAGA, and the importance of holding this seat if Democrats are going to have any chance at a majority.
It wasn't long ago Democrats had control of the Senate, and it was Georgia voters who elected Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock to lock the majority in. **We can flip the Senate blue once again and stop MAGA, but Jon can't do it alone.**

If everyone reading this email donated just $10 to Jon Ossoff for Senate, we'd reach our fundraising goals right away and have the resources we need to build a strong foundation for Jon’s campaign.

Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the fact that this seat is Republicans’ TOP target is not going to make things easier. So Jon is counting on people who understand how important these early donations are to chip in to his campaign today.

**[If you feel like reelecting Jon Ossoff and re-taking control of the Senate is worth $10 to you, then we're asking you to chip in to Jon’s reelection campaign today. There’s no contribution too small. Every donation counts. Thank you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250818-1-full-a&t=1&akid=647%2E5691347%2E3AjsVr)

## _**IT ALL STARTED HERE**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e4150153-2cc1-4e74-8dfd-2fa3b32466c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### _**Please Consider A[ Paid Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/dab102f4-a84b-4358-8e00-7e96ef34df29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Each One Helps Us Back Another Independent Creator With A Soundcheck Fund Award, Protecting Our Democracy. We Need You.**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.YqndO3K0giwQceJ7dPK3ZofkhtEVPkcKS0yNwoKdILk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171304582)
* * *
It's not time to make a change
Just relax, take it easy
You're still young, that's your fault
There's so much you have to know
Find a girl, settle down
If you want you can marry
Look at me, I am old, but I'm happy
It was a long day, one of many long days. And I couldn't wait to see the most adorable kid alive.
I was driving back from to my home in exurbs (quick aside: _never again_. Every Cro-Mag and pre-MAGA you can avoid is worth giving up 500 sq ft) from my job as Comms Director for the State Treasurer in Ohio.
I was tired. Hated the job. I thought the Treasurer--one of five elected statewide positions in Ohio--was going nowhere. He was a lazy campaigner, a nasty person and had been _appointed_ to the job for all the wrong reasons--the opposite of battle tested.
Not even bingo tested.
But none of this went through my head as I drove home that day, or any other, the first half of 2009.
Our family had stopped off in Columbus, OH, on the way to settling in my wife's hometown of Cincinnati after a decade in DC. I'd run a group that with a guerrilla-war, paid-and-earned-media campaign, won back the state house for Dems in 2008.
I was ready to go, but was asked to take a job to politically prepare a man who could never be politically prepared. It was a favor, and it was whole climb the ladder thing, so I said yes. As long as it was short term--there it lived up to it's promise and then some, roughly 20 Scaramuccis I believe.
But on this day, like every other one, driving home from that job, **all I could think about as I got closer to home was a daily ritual**. I'd pull into the garage, and a blur of kinetic energy with the a smile that actively melted suns would bounce towards my car and release, with a pulmonary eruption, "dadddddddy!!!"
**It was my best moment of the day. Every single day.**
l think of this as I prepare to move that onetime little boy--with the glow of an anglerfish; now a brilliant, confident, charismatic young man who uses those garage lungs to belt out ballads as a rock band lead singer--into college later this week.
This is gonna be a hard one folks.
And how does the orange goon factor into all this? We'll get there.
So I remember it all. Every plastic light saber duel where he mauled me with an assault worthy of...Darth Maul. The moment he got more excited for a friend on his middle school soccer team who scored a goal than he ever did for himself.
The first time I saw him play the drums in a school recital in 3rd grade. The first time he moved up to the front as lead singer of a rock band about 5 years ago.
When he slipped off a wall in the snow and fell five feet in The-Matrix-slow motion and I thought my world could end. Skiing. Karate. Swimming. Traveling. Always lighting up a room when he walks in it, with a wit to match the radiometry.
When he decided at a Vegas show just pre-COVID that Aerosmith would forever be his favorite band (they still are). Now I watch as he prepares go off, and I don't wanna miss a thing.
I can tell he's excited, full of wonder, but I can also feel the apprehension in my boy, because his life is changing so much--and he knows, as do I, it will never be the same.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.YqndO3K0giwQceJ7dPK3ZofkhtEVPkcKS0yNwoKdILk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=171304582)
I was once like you are now, and I know that it's not easy
To be calm when you've found something going on
But take your time, think a lot
Why, think of everything you've got
For you will still be here tomorrow, but your dreams may not
That doesn't mean there won't be many amazing moments ahead.
But that time when he relied fully on me and his mom as his protectors, and I felt like a super-human knowing I'd kill or die to fulfill this role (so, more Christopher Reeves [than Dean Cain](https://substack.com/redirect/502032a2-cbeb-40bc-9f01-72df2ae51c1f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), is done. As is our family unit, including his younger brother, living together.
I can tell he and I are trying to come to terms with it, as excited as we both are for his future...One of my best friends will no longer be here every day to watch a movie or listen to music or go for a walk. And just thinking about it makes plunge pools of my eyes.
Now there's a way and I know that I have to go away
I know I have to go
Admittedly, this is all that much harder because of the feeling I--we--failed him this past decade. We put a cruel, [cockamamie, candy-ass in the White House](https://substack.com/redirect/a31adc4b-5d7a-4270-8eb8-4581daed555d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Twice.
Someone who showed that maybe there is [no such thing as justice](https://substack.com/redirect/c079e66e-80aa-492c-b478-c666b7ab71c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). No winning in this life [by caring about others](https://substack.com/redirect/79aa0daa-d7d7-4912-bfae-904a7228143e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). No price to pay for myriad crimes.
This same jingoistic jack-a-lantern [has taken our society to the edge](https://substack.com/redirect/21ada2b7-4f2c-47a4-931a-764f83c170f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), put us all on edge, dangled us off the edge. Heightened our worst traits. What Trump has done--as I talked about [in my piece on the difference between life in Italy and here in the U.S.](https://substack.com/redirect/52980f63-0c0c-4bb7-87cf-c761e760a34c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--is he's taken us far further down the road to perdition.
A road that began with Reaganomics, Iraq and a McConnellized judiciary that made legalized bribery the real Leaders of the House and Senate. Now, threats float in the air like drones waiting for an order to attack.
[Unidentified ICE terrorists](https://substack.com/redirect/6396ac76-b220-45b5-8a18-d2bd05ebe48e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and active shooters are out there. On top of the physical and psychological loss of COVID.
I know my son Dougie will pull through, he has already shown a knack for mastering this world. And I am confident we'll always be close.
We'll have fun adult-ing, as I love having a drink with him in a way I used to love watching him fly over a snowbank on a sled. That we'll develop a new rhythm to our new lives, but as we've always done, we'lI figure out the the perfect beat.
So, as much as it feels like someone depressurized my chest cavity, I know this is how life goes--we fly forward in the blink of an eye. I can't wait to see all he sees and does.
That real fatherhood is not about trapping your children, but preparing them to be fully-formed responsible humans without you. [Setting aside insecurities](https://substack.com/redirect/1308af40-f50b-4764-8936-ef35758174b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to embrace selflessness. Seeing them not as assets on a balance sheet, but independent beings to thrive.
This is what the cul-de-sac clementine could never learn or teach--and why the entire Trump klan...uh, clan, is a mess.
In the meantime, maybe _I can do more_ to remove this particular problem plaguing his generation and our entire planet. The living answer to the question: What would a colostomy bag say if it could talk?
Yes, it's time we legally, politically and in every other sense [ended the reign of the mango mook](https://substack.com/redirect/ea9e9b14-8796-4049-b626-6c1bf802642e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). We have enough to deal with in this life without...**that** **thing**.
* * *

_**THIS WEEK ON AMPED UP!**_
_**Quite a show this week! David Shuster**_ _**co-hosted as usual, and used a word that rhymes w bro-knob to explain Trump 's Putin meeting. And we were off to the races! Malcolm Nance was our**_****_**guest, and he 's a Navy guy, so salty talk comes easy. And I grew up in late 70s/80s New York City. The NY of Warriors and Death Wish...so let's say this show took a hysterical turn **_🤣
_**We also handled serious issues; the war in Ukraine, Epstein, etc. A Must Watch, my friends!!**_

It's not time to make a change Just relax, take it easy You're still young, that's your fault There's so much you have to know Find a girl, settle down If you want you can marry Look at me, I am old, but I'm happy It was a long day, one of many long days. And I couldn't wait to see the most adorable kid alive. I was driving back from to my home in exurbs (quick aside: never again. Every Cro-Mag and pre-MAGA you can avoid is worth giving up 500 sq ft) from my job as Comms Director for the State Treasurer in Ohio. I was tired. Hated the job. I thought the Treasurer--one of five elected statewide positions in Ohio--was going nowhere. He was a lazy campaigner, a nasty person and had been appointed to the job for all the wrong reasons--the opposite of battle tested. Not even bingo tested. But none of this went through my head as I drove home that day, or any other, the first half of 2009. Our family had stopped off in Columbus, OH, on the way to settling in my wife's hometown of Cincinnati after a decade in DC. I'd run a group that with a guerrilla-war, paid-and-earned-media campaign, won back the state house for Dems in 2008. I was ready to go, but was asked to take a job to politically prepare a man who could never be politically prepared. It was a favor, and it was whole climb the ladder thing, so I said yes. As long as it was short term--there it lived up to it's promise and then some, roughly 20 Scaramuccis I believe. But on this day, like every other one, driving home from that job, all I could think about as I got closer to home was a daily ritual. I'd pull into the garage, and a blur of kinetic energy with the a smile that actively melted suns would bounce towards my car and release, with a pulmonary eruption, "dadddddddy!!!" It was my best moment of the day. Every single day. l think of this as I prepare to move that onetime little boy--with the glow of an anglerfish; now a brilliant, confident, charismatic young man who uses those garage lungs to belt out ballads as a rock band lead singer--into college later this week. This is gonna be a hard one folks. And how does the orange goon factor into all this? We'll get there. So I remember it all. Every plastic light saber duel where he mauled me with an assault worthy of...Darth Maul. The moment he got more excited for a friend on his middle school soccer team who scored a goal than he ever did for himself. The first time I saw him play the drums in a school recital in 3rd grade. The first time he moved up to the front as lead singer of a rock band about 5 years ago. When he slipped off a wall in the snow and fell five feet in The-Matrix-slow motion and I thought my world could end. Skiing. Karate. Swimming. Traveling. Always lighting up a room when he walks in it, with a wit to match the radiometry. When he decided at a Vegas show just pre-COVID that Aerosmith would forever be his favorite band (they still are). Now I watch as he prepares go off, and I don't wanna miss a thing. I can tell he's excited, full of wonder, but I can also feel the apprehension in my boy, because his life is changing so much--and he knows, as do I, it will never be the same. I was once like you are now, and I know that it's not easy To be calm when you've found something going on But take your time, think a lot Why, think of everything you've got For you will still be here tomorrow, but your dreams may not That doesn't mean there won't be many amazing moments ahead. ICE denied entry to two Arizona congresspeople. The conditions we discovered during one successful visit were appalling. Now we’re planning regular inspections to ensure accountability. |

Friend, **Right now, ICE is illegally blocking Arizona Democrats from conducting oversight of detention centers in our state.** They're denying access to Rep. Yassamin Ansari and Rep. Greg Stanton — preventing them from inspecting conditions and meeting with detainees. This isn't just obstruction. It's a cover-up. When Rep. Ansari finally gained access to Eloy Detention Center earlier this year, she uncovered horror stories: overcrowding, cruel conditions, and medical neglect. That's exactly why ICE doesn't want anyone looking. Trump's "One Big, Beautiful Bill" just boosted ICE's budget by $75 billion. They're dramatically increasing deportation operations while trying to hide their methods from congressional oversight.
We're not going to let them operate in the shadows.
Rep. Ansari put it perfectly: "It's absurd. Members of Congress are being outright denied." A dozen House members are already suing the Trump administration over this unlawful obstruction.
**This is about more than access to one facility. It's about whether Congress can do its constitutional job of oversight. It's about transparency, accountability, and basic human dignity.**

clean_body: ICE denied entry to two Arizona congresspeople. The conditions we discovered during one successful visit were appalling. Now we’re planning regular inspections to ensure accountability. | = Friend, Right now, ICE is illegally blocking Arizona Democrats from conducting oversight of detention centers in our state. They're denying access to Rep. Yassamin Ansari and Rep. Greg Stanton — preventing them from inspecting conditions and meeting with detainees. This isn't just obstruction. It's a cover-up. When Rep. Ansari finally gained access to Eloy Detention Center earlier this year, she uncovered horror stories: overcrowding, cruel conditions, and medical neglect. That's exactly why ICE doesn't want anyone looking. When they try to hide what's happening behind closed doors, that's when we need to shine the brightest light. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Trump's "One Big, Beautiful Bill" just boosted ICE's budget by $75 billion. They're dramatically increasing deportation operations while trying to hide their methods from congressional oversight. We're not going to let them operate in the shadows. Rep. Ansari put it perfectly: "It's absurd. Members of Congress are being outright denied." A dozen House members are already suing the Trump administration over this unlawful obstruction. This is about more than access to one facility. It's about whether Congress can do its constitutional job of oversight. It's about transparency, accountability, and basic human dignity. = = They're counting on us to give up, to stop asking questions, to look the other way. We're not backing down. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113560724/564184167/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjI3Yzg2NC04YjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yGnxOA_kJmU6sqZ9SweK438nb3CyoK5nF5qkTuWHq1I=&emci=42d8be5e-8b7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9227c864-8b7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5944223)
[**I need to be direct, Peter: Will you chip in $3 toward our grassroots campaign to flip WI-03 blue? Our August deadline is rapidly approaching, and we need to ensure our people-first campaign is set up to beat Derrick Van Orden.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113560725/564184168/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjI3Yzg2NC04YjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yGnxOA_kJmU6sqZ9SweK438nb3CyoK5nF5qkTuWHq1I=) | | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113560726/564184169/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjI3Yzg2NC04YjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yGnxOA_kJmU6sqZ9SweK438nb3CyoK5nF5qkTuWHq1I=)**
---
Many forget this, but Democrats held WI-03 for 26 years (!!!) before Derrick Van Orden gained a foothold here. Now, our effort to flip it back could be the difference between a Republican Congress rigged for the ultra-rich -- or a Democratic majority fighting for working families.
I grew up in a working-class family where my mom worked multiple jobs off our farm to make ends meet. That’s still the reality for too many folks in western Wisconsin, and it’s why I’m running.
Washington already has enough voices for billionaires. What we need are more people who understand what it means to juggle two jobs and still come up short at the end of the month. What we need is less extremism and more locally-grown solutions to move our community forward.
This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters -- not corporate PACs. Every single dollar helps us reach more voters with a message they can believe in: that someone like them is ready to fight for them.
[**We’re facing a critical deadline, and this race will come down to a razor-thin margin. If you’re with me, chip in $3 today. Let’s take back WI-03.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113560727/564184170/-2083379535?refcode=em-8.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjI3Yzg2NC04YjdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yGnxOA_kJmU6sqZ9SweK438nb3CyoK5nF5qkTuWHq1I=)

subject: When billionaires spend big

body:
Our campaign runs on grassroots support.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40032%2E3422442%2EptkosW)
Peter,
**Stephen Cloobeck—a billionaire and one of our opponents—launched a massive media blitz online.** Take a look: ⬇️
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250818_2_ak?refcode=em20250818-40032&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40032_3422442_ptkosW&akid=40032%2E3422442%2EptkosW)

**[Help us raise the resources we need to get Katie Porter’s message out by donating today>>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250818_2_ak?refcode=em20250818-40032&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40032_3422442_ptkosW&akid=40032%2E3422442%2EptkosW)**
Earlier this month, **Cloobeck was the 4th highest spender on Google and YouTube ads.** He’s spending more than candidates with competitive elections in less than 80 days—even though ours isn’t until next year!
Unlike Cloobeck, Katie Porter doesn’t have a personal fortune to throw around to try to buy this race. _Our campaign runs on grassroots support—small donations that will help us win._
**[When billionaires spend big and early, we need the resources to stay ahead in this competitive race. Can you chip in $5 today to help us win?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250818_2_ak?refcode=em20250818-40032&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40032_3422442_ptkosW&akid=40032%2E3422442%2EptkosW)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250818-40032&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40032_3422442_ptkosW&akid=40032%2E3422442%2EptkosW)**

body:
As you read this, Democrats in Texas have returned to the state and Republicans are getting ready to ram through the redistricting bill Donald Trump demanded they pass in order to find him five House seats.

🌤️🌤️ To all Gavin Newsom supporters, 🇺🇸 🇺🇸

Please don't click away. We're emailing about the effort to pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California and we'll great straight to the point: we're asking you to help us make sure Donald Trump is unable to rig the next election to hold the House.

As you read this, Democrats in Texas have returned to the state, and Republicans are getting ready to ram through the redistricting bill Donald Trump demanded they pass in order to find him five House seats.
---

We won't let them get away with it. If Texas redraws the maps, then California will act to nullify their efforts.

And God help us, if we're not successful, we may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
---

If everyone reading this donated even $3 to pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California, we'd raise what we need to win and never have to ask again.

But the truth is, most people will click away from this message — even though this election is quite literally about control of the House of Representatives and putting a check on Trump's power for his last two years in office. That's why we're relying on people who truly understand the threat and the stakes to chip in today.
---

body:

---|---
Dear Peter,

**Medication abortion is under coordinated attack.** Texas lawmakers are considering an extreme bill called SB 7 that would allow private citizens to file civil lawsuits against doctors, pharmacies, and manufacturers that are prescribing, mailing, or making abortion pills.

[**This is just the latest in a broader strategy to shut down access to medication abortion. We need your help to fight back.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113560903/564184923/1824768205?sourceid=1150855&utm_campaign=26emama-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGVlYjc1OS04ZDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdLFhXMK6DWKO5JCwZMNasR2b2AYWjEegxgB3fleDaw=&emci=bbeeb759-8d7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c4eeb759-8d7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) | [**Peter: RUSH YOUR GIFT NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113560904/564184924/1824768205?sourceid=1150855&utm_campaign=26emama-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGVlYjc1OS04ZDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdLFhXMK6DWKO5JCwZMNasR2b2AYWjEegxgB3fleDaw=&emci=bbeeb759-8d7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c4eeb759-8d7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "RUSH YOUR GIFT NOW")
---
Texas has already banned abortion in nearly every instance. **[Now, lawmakers are trying to strip away what little access remains—denying people the ability to make their own decisions about their bodies and health.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113560905/564184926/1824768205?sourceid=1150855&utm_campaign=26emama-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGVlYjc1OS04ZDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdLFhXMK6DWKO5JCwZMNasR2b2AYWjEegxgB3fleDaw=&emci=bbeeb759-8d7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c4eeb759-8d7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)**

SB 7 puts doctors squarely in the crosshairs. If it passes, the general public can sue doctors who prescribe abortion pills for at least $100,000, **_without any connection to the pregnant person or doctor!_** This reckless bill puts health care at risk by potentially halting access to safe, effective medication.

[**Peter, the Center for Reproductive Rights is fighting back against this coordinated attack on your health care, but we can't do it without your help. Will you make a gift of $50 or more today and help our team of attorneys fight these extreme anti-abortion policies?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113560907/564184927/1824768205?sourceid=1150855&utm_campaign=26emama-0801aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medication&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGVlYjc1OS04ZDdjLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PdLFhXMK6DWKO5JCwZMNasR2b2AYWjEegxgB3fleDaw=&emci=bbeeb759-8d7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c4eeb759-8d7c-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

### [Want more raw, unfiltered conversations with voices like Frederic Poag? Hey folks,
I went live with my new friend Frederic Poag, and we got deep into the Gavin Newsom social media strategy, the soul of the Democratic Party, and what it really takes to win in 2028.
* 04:01 - The origin story: how I accidentally became president of the College Democrats and why it shaped my political DNA.
* 10:58 - We break down Gavin Newsom's social strategy and why it works _for him_ -- but why it could be poison for anyone else.
* 14:28 - A billion views in a week? Here's what that actually means for Newsom, and why I'm not convinced he should be the nominee.
* 21:02 - Wrestling, the Savannah Bananas, and the WWE-ification of our politics: how entertainment culture is warping campaigns.
* 30:22 - What I'm _really_ looking for in a 2028 candidate--and the one emotional test every contender has to pass.

This conversation is a must-watch if you care about where our country is headed, who's leading us, and what kind of fight we're willing to have to win. If you want more of these unfiltered, essential convos, become a paid subscriber today. That support makes all of this possible.
**[If these convos get you fired up, become a paid subscriber to](https://substack.com/redirect/3f0f796f-fcf0-48eb-bd32-760f50d06f11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**[Endless Urgency](https://substack.com/redirect/3f0f796f-fcf0-48eb-bd32-760f50d06f11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**[. It's just $8/month and it helps us take this fight to every corner of the country.](https://substack.com/redirect/3f0f796f-fcf0-48eb-bd32-760f50d06f11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Kerry McQuisten (Newsletter)
subject: A book, a D.C. trip - and events!
body:
| | | | |
# Events, meetings, and more events!
---
---
_L-R: Bob Spicher, me, Solomon, Russ Walker, Dick Courter, Gabriela Roman, Maxine Walker and Greg Tenney pose for a quick photo at the Oregon Conservative Caucus of Multnomah County barbecue last weekend._
---
| | **Writing a book and gearing up for D.C.**
Solomon and I have been busy writing his upcoming book. As I type this newsletter, we're at 90 pages complete with the entire book loosely outlined, so we're cruising through it; it's just highly time-consuming! The ISBN and Library of Congress Control Number are locked in, but I'm not revealing the title just yet! Solomon is very much a "never look in the rearview mirror" kind of guy, but his is a story that needs told. It's emotional. It's a stark reminder of why we fight against the far left. We now have the horrors he and his family went through during Mao's Cultural Revolution documented and are headed into his great escape to America. If you want a new appreciation of your freedoms in this country, this book will do it.
Right now, you've probably heard that RNC Chair Michael Whatley is headed into a senate race in NC and has finished scheduling fundraisers for state parties in which he has close relationships. One of our good friends will be nominating the presumptive incoming chair this week, and with that starts a new cycle that repeats every time. There has been a huge turnover in RNC members since last year, and I'm watching the newbies I know across the U.S. try to find their footing. They're excited when they receive that initial courtesy seating at whichever table and have their names announced at the meeting. They're happy when they realize RNC has complimentary resources available for any state party. This is the start of what we call the "food and flowers" phase of participation where most members attend receptions and get the photo ops for bragging rights. Most members come and go quickly without accessing the levels that exist beyond that, though. Many don't shape the national party, become major fundraisers, participate in campaign strategy, or write presidential policy. BUT some do. I know some really smart, decent, talented, _conservative _RNC members. And that's where things get interesting!
There's no reason for Solomon and me to go to this meeting as we're on to other projects with the people we'd get together with at the RNC anyway! We'd actually forgotten it was even happening until someone called this week. We've spoken here and there over the months with senior-level White House staff about various Oregon topics including what we're doing with the Oregon Conservative Caucus (OCC) and what it will take to flip Oregon red. We've had a standing in-person invitation for a while now, but since we're scheduling D.C. meetings for Republicans Overseas (RO) to continue with the quest to end double taxation of overseas Americans, we thought we'd take them up on it!
At present, we have _22_ meetings scheduled, and they will involve the White House, Congress, friends in various agencies, RO colleagues and more. I feel strangely relaxed yet excited about this trip, even though some of our schedule is going to be like the political version of speed dating! Policy work uses brain cells for both research and strategizing, and finding solutions to issues is very satisfying, particularly when it has the potential to help a LOT of Oregonians - and Americans in general.

**Announcing a new scholarship**
The OCC Board of Directors – me, Solomon Yue, Jean Sampson, Russ Walker and Randy Pullen – announced the creation of the Joel Pawloski Memorial Scholarship a few days ago. We voted unanimously to create this scholarship to honor the memory of the organization’s late president of the Oregon Conservative Caucus of Marion County, Joel Pawloski, who recently succumbed to lung cancer.
The $1,000 scholarship, to be awarded annually, will be open to pre-registered and registered Republicans in Oregon who are entering a college, university, or trade school for the first time. Immediate family members of the OCC Advisory Board or Board of Directors are ineligible for consideration. Applications will open by the summer of 2026 with the scholarship to be dispersed in time for the fall 2026 school year. More details about the application process will be released at a later date, and will be consistent with the organization’s mission including registering new voters and promoting conservative values in Oregon.

**Events!**
Last week, the Oregon Conservative Caucus of Multnomah County held its first event, a free community barbecue right in the bluest of Oregon's blue counties. President Trump's last Sr. Campaign Advisor in Oregon, Russ Walker, was the speaker. (Russ is also an OCC Board member.) The group registered one new Republican and signed up five new OCC members in the end, so I think the event was a success. OCC is an all-volunteer, boots-on-the-ground group of real people out there working to flip Oregon red. We register voters, educate members and GOTV. Simple but effective. We have another great OCC fundraiser event coming up October 4th that you might be interested in. [Click here ](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/NuNVo3KiSMr-QwiCgkBD2g~~/AAAHURA~/uA-D0MQWDMrjXMvsurqfkn_CZI0vFRyei95WdcEmGI9K1ebsvKeRajdfbMgfb_64XvWM8_otea8Gu1TPCxLWxWWYLwlSCVI9Bpbe1zO839-6D81PS4rAGbLQR1vrw2L2DWu9yXAfrkqiErZdoAeT3vhaXW9kAnRI95LogQV5O_8o3g60X8PPKxrJKCTibThI)or on the piano recital flyer below for more info! We're bringing to you a concert pianist, Daniel Yue, accompanied by Solomon on the violin, and closing the evening with an opera singer out of South Africa named Reinette who will perform "Time to Say Goodbye."
On September 4th, I'll be speaking in Seaside to the North Coast Republican Women. I haven't been there in a couple years, so I'm looking forward to seeing those ladies!
Finally, September 20th in Baker City, the Baker County Republican Women have our second annual banquet featuring keynote speaker Blaine Holt from Newsmax, radio personality Nate Shelman from Boise, Rep. Mark Owens and Julio Monteiro who will speak on President Trump's impact on politics in Brazil. All that and sirloin steak for only $50 a ticket! [Click here.](https://sptr.eocampaign1.com/f/a/dKRh65oigub-RfADa8BK5w~~/AAAHURA~/AC8YNcITJNhbQhV7fIgfTFGScdVvYynKjr5hzDX6RFdSw7C48BDe0LCgEVy7IJsGUauyl51h1wtuONL9EkiTwP3VYy9ygiodrRKwZWLJLFAvmwWd7zOXWbgMD9G4kg3NXFn_XpeCZyihSWSgKTXaLA~~)

clean_body: | | | | | Events, meetings, and more events! L-R: Bob Spicher, me, Solomon, Russ Walker, Dick Courter, Gabriela Roman, Maxine Walker and Greg Tenney pose for a quick photo at the Oregon Conservative Caucus of Multnomah County barbecue last weekend. | | Writing a book and gearing up for D.C. Solomon and I have been busy writing his upcoming book. As I type this newsletter, we're at 90 pages complete with the entire book loosely outlined, so we're cruising through it; it's just highly time-consuming! The ISBN and Library of Congress Control Number are locked in, but I'm not revealing the title just yet! Solomon is very much a "never look in the rearview mirror" kind of guy, but his is a story that needs told. It's emotional. It's a stark reminder of why we fight against the far left. We now have the horrors he and his family went through during Mao's Cultural Revolution documented and are headed into his great escape to America. If you want a new appreciation of your freedoms in this country, this book will do it. Right now, you've probably heard that RNC Chair Michael Whatley is headed into a senate race in NC and has finished scheduling fundraisers for state parties in which he has close relationships. One of our good friends will be nominating the presumptive incoming chair this week, and with that starts a new cycle that repeats every time. There has been a huge turnover in RNC members since last year, and I'm watching the newbies I know across the U.S. try to find their footing. They're excited when they receive that initial courtesy seating at whichever table and have their names announced at the meeting. They're happy when they realize RNC has complimentary resources available for any state party. This is the start of what we call the "food and flowers" phase of participation where most members attend receptions and get the photo ops for bragging rights. Most members come and go quickly without accessing the levels that exist beyond that, though. Many don't shape the national party, become major fundraisers, participate in campaign strategy, or write presidential policy. BUT some do. I know some really smart, decent, talented, conservative RNC members. And that's where things get interesting! There's no reason for Solomon and me to go to this meeting as we're on to other projects with the people we'd get together with at the RNC anyway! We'd actually forgotten it was even happening until someone called this week. We've spoken here and there over the months with senior-level White House staff about various Oregon topics including what we're doing with the Oregon Conservative Caucus (OCC) and what it will take to flip Oregon red. We've had a standing in-person invitation for a while now, but since we're scheduling D.C. meetings for Republicans Overseas (RO) to continue with the quest to end double taxation of overseas Americans, we thought we'd take them up on it! At present, we have 22 meetings scheduled, and they will involve the White House, Congress, friends in various agencies, RO colleagues and more. I feel strangely relaxed yet excited about this trip, even though some of our schedule is going to be like the political version of speed dating! Policy work uses brain cells for both research and strategizing, and finding solutions to issues is very satisfying, particularly when it has the potential to help a LOT of Oregonians - and Americans in general. Announcing a new scholarship The OCC Board of Directors – me, Solomon Yue, Jean Sampson, Russ Walker and Randy Pullen – announced the creation of the Joel Pawloski Memorial Scholarship a few days ago. We voted unanimously to create this scholarship to honor the memory of the organization’s late president of the Oregon Conservative Caucus of Marion County, Joel Pawloski, who recently succumbed to lung cancer. The $1,000 scholarship, to be awarded annually, will be open to pre-registered and registered Republicans in Oregon who are entering a college, university, or trade school for the first time. Immediate family members of the OCC Advisory Board or Board of Directors are ineligible for consideration. Applications will open by the summer of 2026 with the scholarship to be dispersed in time for the fall 2026 school year. More details about the application process will be released at a later date, and will be consistent with the organization’s mission including registering new voters and promoting conservative values in Oregon. Events! Last week, the Oregon Conservative Caucus of Multnomah County held its first event, a free community barbecue right in the bluest of Oregon's blue counties. President Trump's last Sr. Campaign Advisor in Oregon, Russ Walker, was the speaker. (Russ is also an OCC Board member.) The group registered one new Republican and signed up five new OCC members in the end, so I think the event was a success. OCC is an all-volunteer, boots-on-the-ground group of real people out there working to flip Oregon red. We register voters, educate members and GOTV. Simple but effective. We have another great OCC fundraiser event coming up October 4th that you might be interested in. on the piano recital flyer below for more info! We're bringing to you a concert pianist, Daniel Yue, accompanied by Solomon on the violin, and closing the evening with an opera singer out of South Africa named Reinette who will perform "Time to Say Goodbye." On September 4th, I'll be speaking in Seaside to the North Coast Republican Women. I haven't been there in a couple years, so I'm looking forward to seeing those ladies! Finally, September 20th in Baker City, the Baker County Republican Women have our second annual banquet featuring keynote speaker Blaine Holt from Newsmax, radio personality Nate Shelman from Boise, Rep. Mark Owens and Julio Monteiro who will speak on President Trump's impact on politics in Brazil. All that and sirloin steak for only $50 a ticket! ~~ | | | | | ~~ Past Newsletters ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ | | The podcast is picking up listeners and advertisers! You can listen you'd like. | | | ~ | ---|---|--- | ~ "KerryMcQuisten.com" You received this email because you subscribed to our list. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Why your doctor left New Mexico (it's not what they're telling you)
body:
New episode of No Doubt About It out now for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9082e984c7&e=567664f14c)
| | | | |
The healthcare crisis in New Mexico has reached a breaking point. Patients are waiting months for basic care because our state simply doesn’t have enough doctors. On [this week’s No Doubt About It podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d128813807&e=567664f14c), we break down what’s really driving this shortage—and why political leaders keep looking the other way.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5210dbcaf2&e=567664f14c)
|
* New Mexico needs 200 more primary care physicians right now. That may sound smaller than Texas or Arizona’s numbers, but proportionally our shortage is far worse. If Texas faced what we’re facing, they’d need nearly 3,000 doctors—three times their actual need.

* We rank 7th in the nation for malpractice claims per 100,000 people. That makes malpractice insurance costs skyrocket, driving doctors to other states.

* Trial lawyers are funding shadow groups like New Mexico Safety Over Profits to block reforms. Over 74% of their donors are tied to the Trial Lawyers Association.

* Earlier this year, a bill that would have capped attorney fees and brought relief for doctors failed by just one vote. That’s how powerful the trial lawyer lobby really is.

This isn’t about politics—it’s about people. Cancer patients can’t wait months for care. Families shouldn’t have to drive out of state to find a doctor. Retirees shouldn’t have to question whether they can grow old here safely.

**The bottom line: until we reform malpractice laws and stand up to trial lawyers, New Mexico will keep losing doctors—and patients will pay the price.**
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=817199b527&e=567664f14c)
---
| **But that’s not all we cover this week:**
---
|
* The surprising rise in Republican support for Ukraine aid.

* Why younger Americans are drinking and smoking less than ever before.

* A lively debate on the NFL’s decision to add male cheerleaders to 12 team rosters.

* Plus, some stunning wildlife footage from our mountain cameras that you won’t want to miss.

---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f074d6f50b&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=94efc7cc48&e=567664f14c)

✅ **DONATE** to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=60d7cb326e&e=567664f14c)

Together, we can push for real solutions—and make sure powerful interests stop putting their profits ahead of your health.
